subject: Could change everything

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=c37d398757a54b40bbffa7617c4586da&_e=xsIU7mTD3lKS69s416dtVMMv0Y7PXjOHPCbVn_cniPzhffHfh2VZ5Px9tbXpSVeAnObqhciszXa3FNNVCv4u9h--RoM3_ckZC_QwWmdc1Klxixe7GD0GXFB5pBjzkBjpN00zvkptrCB7cIi8Itu5OITBmcOPGnHyka2fRhjI6Brk0ElDz1DSUAO5xdXOqOHrv6FZ6kv2J4ekJpTbtYXqUcnodashf-1wFQ4gk5-HJvUm3CKWho3zzYnYuvC6g3QS-XUh9plPWNyefzZYLXRSAuEhV_5CGqETqjdZY2HwLdApHkcfai1VTEhO2EjUUOw7c8FSxax24-vIs66Hu4RYImSvjngWa0pG0BVuofE43Ax_6eKcdR5xxE8Y4iBKczaQ)

Hi there...

I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot.

**These election results weren 't good news for Republicans.

I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all...**

My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman.

I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son.

The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate!

[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=c37d398757a54b40bbffa7617c4586da&_e=xsIU7mTD3lKS69s416dtVMMv0Y7PXjOHPCbVn_cniPzhffHfh2VZ5Px9tbXpSVeAnObqhciszXa3FNNVCv4u9h--RoM3_ckZC_QwWmdc1Klxixe7GD0GXFB5pBjzkBjpN00zvkptrCB7cIi8Itu5OITBmcOPGnHyka2fRhjI6Brk0ElDz1DSUAO5xdXOqOHrv6FZ6kv2J4ekJpTbtYXqUcnodashf-1wFQ4gk5-HJvWPv7HGTtUhvZWR9sqnGDK0mDnetAYplyawSE1TpQ0yERreJ4k_XwAvRI8rG1yy_GSCPQWuDaFSOkY9j9vqtOj-sfNKLTzS60ewVBQl1nve5RwWGl1Mt1UpuxgLCd1p_hAa98U39bm2oU4LxrXFuza0)
The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down.

But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own.

I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot.

**_So please, help me out this one time, Patriot:_**

As a private citizen, a soldier, a volunteer, and now a Congressman, I've always worked to put America First.

These election results weren't what Republicans were hoping for, so we need to act now to prevent the same result when the stakes are even higher next year. That's why I'm leading the fight for America First, protecting our conservative values, and standing against the Radicals working to destroy our country and our allies!

I didn't back down when terrorists blew off my legs, so I certainly am not going to back down now. If you are willing to give your support, I give you my word I will not give up this fight.

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: Will you personally endorse Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re counting on your help, Peter
#
Peter — will you endorse Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?
Since Lucas launched his campaign to defeat Josh Hawley back in January, he’s earned support from community leaders, former statewide elected officials, the Missouri AFL-CIO + dozens of other statewide and local labor unions, and major national organizations like the League of Conservation Voters.
**But now, he needs one more critical endorsement — from you.[Will you stand behind Lucas in this race against Josh Hawley by adding your personal endorsement today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231118_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=4212%2E614464%2EBUFqwg)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231118_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=4212%2E614464%2EBUFqwg)**
Lucas’ bold message of taking back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley is already resonating with Missouri voters — and all the GOP insiders propping up his campaign know it. So now, they’re determined to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to tear down Lucas and the grassroots movement we’re building together.
They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley in 2024 — and that every endorsement, donation, and everyday person like you sharing Lucas’ message could make all the difference in what polls are already showing is a neck-and-neck race. **That’s why we have to ask:**
**[Will you join the national organizations, local leaders, and everyday people supporting Lucas Kunce in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race by adding your personal endorsement today? When you add your name, we send a signal to everyone watching our race that this movement is growing even stronger every day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231118_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=4212%2E614464%2EBUFqwg)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231118_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=4212%2E614464%2EBUFqwg)**
It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of support from real people like you to elect Lucas, flip this seat, and take back power for everyday Missourians — and we’re so grateful that we’ve always been able to count on you, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
Team Lucas Kunce

clean_body: We’re counting on your help, Peter Peter — will you endorse Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat? Since Lucas launched his campaign to defeat Josh Hawley back in January, he’s earned support from community leaders, former statewide elected officials, the Missouri AFL-CIO + dozens of other statewide and local labor unions, and major national organizations like the League of Conservation Voters. But now, he needs one more critical endorsement — from you. Lucas’ bold message of taking back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley is already resonating with Missouri voters — and all the GOP insiders propping up his campaign know it. So now, they’re determined to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to tear down Lucas and the grassroots movement we’re building together. They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley in 2024 — and that every endorsement, donation, and everyday person like you sharing Lucas’ message could make all the difference in what polls are already showing is a neck-and-neck race. That’s why we have to ask: It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of support from real people like you to elect Lucas, flip this seat, and take back power for everyday Missourians — and we’re so grateful that we’ve always been able to count on you, Peter. Thanks for everything, Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

clean_body: | Peter, this email is long, but it’s important you understand just how critical it is to keep Ron DeSantis out of the Oval Office. If his campaign is this much of a disaster, his presidency would be infinitely worse. That’s why I am counting on my supporters to help me hit our $15k emergency goal to mobilize youth voters against DeSantis. FACT: DeSantis has been horrible for my home state of Florida– pushing his fascist agenda at the expense of Floridians for his entire career. Here are just a few of the horrific bills that DeSantis has signed: One of the strictest abortion bans in the country Permitless carry legislation that will put more guns in unsafe hands Bills that have hurt our public schools by attacking LGBTQ+ youth and banning books – including the inaugural poem of National Youth Poet Laureate Amanda Gorman Ron DeSantis is a fascist who couldn’t care less about his constituents. All he cares about is power, his mega-donors, and taking away our basic rights. ~~ | | | ~~ FACT: DeSantis wants to take what he has started in Florida and spread his fascism to the entire nation as President. If we don’t defeat him, DeSantis would: Threaten health care for millions Put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block Do everything in his power to ban and restrict abortion access across the country Attack LGBTQ+ rights and healthcare Choose his NRA donors over gun violence prevention Ron DeSantis is saying he wants to “make America Florida,” but what he really means is he wants to make America fascist. ~~ | | ~~ FACT: My generation will be critical to beating DeSantis and keeping the presidency out of the hands of fascist MAGA extremists. Here’s our plan: → FIRST: In the next 24 hours, we raise $15,000 from my top grassroots supporters to hit our emergency goal. → NEXT: My team will hire amazing Democratic youth organizers who will travel across the country to register and turn out young voters at high schools and college campuses. → THEN: Young people will hand Ron DeSantis and his fascist mega-donors a HUMILIATING defeat at the ballot box. The first poll since MAGA freak Kari Lake joined the Senate race in AZ, and she is tracking AHEAD of Ruben Gallego... _No!!_

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11808%2E878179%2Edvrfqf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11808%2E878179%2Edvrfqf).**

name: GOP Update
subject: The Democrats won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

Across the country, we saw the same pattern.

Friend,
Ask yourself: _Why do the Radical Democrats hate the president who Made America Great Again so much?_
It’s because I can’t be bought, bullied, or controlled.
Unlike Crooked Joe, no special interest owns me. My only “special interest” is **YOU** – the PEOPLE! _(No wonder we’re up so big in the polls!)_
And remember, Friend, our historic movement will _never_ be judged by the amount our supporters give, but rather, by the sheer number of grassroots patriots in our ranks.
Which is why I want every single one of our incredible supporters – no matter the size of your contribution – to have the exact same chance to be my _*VIP GUEST*_ at my special year-end campaign reception.
I’ll fly you (plus a guest of your choice) out to my beautiful Trump International Golf Club in West Palm Beach, Florida for the event for _FREE_!

body:

I’ve been trying to reach you.

My team and I need to know where you stand on the issues that matter most. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp4spl4vfqtuaann90hi7n74e1f14frevst2ikeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8n375fo0kr9lhijktpaco0cgnearneg10l3c0k8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv41lnsrb0q6uujq0iu526f6qj1q2dgh2ht6b4m0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv3tci49rg0nf7p0il36mgft0mse9ni68e1nn6hg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

[Donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjk7u62gm13kc85536olh2pe18rb4pt1a42ojb18_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg927hfaca2fduule9gue3gnff528hu08kp4bhp0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2cht2g9jtrqkar9l0u4edvpdnpq689fnrj8ctto_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8apfnri49d174qk1j1i3f82e07lpidrbuh0gsco_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhnr076so7hphgv7oju8hdalu66ajqv6a3oq0sdg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfse0dvt3ho8a34k1tmkh7hoib3q337cbrlh4l10_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt53dm4u4u9g9dfd2ct5k2a7a91pcqiltcs8ht08_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z61bicuj8lq5o92u0d4kug11fpjr8rc005pe2f2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8gqmt1omk7ech7r46uj05opp77dshgra8murn7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsorvkgedgvnifb0qik92pk2oak1ngrpf8tg9e60_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

A reminder of what we're up against:

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9qfvcvurur5scmj1ahse893p543uea2qsc803so_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

[Click here to donate and help SkyTree change the world.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlc9tinkl7hhhvopc6l860ol9bb7up1hhr4modlg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpge1o36cdh2bs)

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674839%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tJrI6U1Kq8tEkHX8ZEVrIw&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674830%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fF4FRrMjVOByF7370kPxGQ&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674831%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vl97ZbB8HdAPT8GlAm135w&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674832%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xrc5dIprPldfXz6wnbX4Pw&sysid=1)
---

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from America Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztf6efhbjuhd49ftvhcho1vdcicegfcrg9ec3lcg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpuj4m3l2jav084rvrm2f7c7i251623vak5latso_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z26mbj68kcabpnbhkq4475mf646me2h6r74dvc3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zouthnoouhf7nfbuq6j97qi10te4h7uf10s4g3d8_)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z75oqgjaenplaiu0to30o7hljub6dqm6p0q037jo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfloni18569bhemrt2thlssbp0k2lk9g64pj4chi69op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti46h22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h2bs) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbtl81ad7fvu0majia1am2popv3kb9pd4vpb6o1g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfloni18569bhemrt2thlssbp0k2lk9g64pj4chi69op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti46h22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h2bs)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zit7fuf5sl8fu2ntucsp84hjjv1n53vcnrr2091o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfloni18569bhemrt2thlssbp0k2lk9g64pj4chi69op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti46h22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h2bs)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z22ce01mvrcflm9a93aarp58tj6c9pdeb904c3vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqsbp0k2j4lonbduheoque5sga1aq4o32cpi68p34scin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep2bs)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztekp06s1mo1ggih00fpk6qtcchfpsknl3vnq6m8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqsbp0k2j4lonbduheoque5sga1aq4o32cpi68p34scin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep2bs)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbcq4laoo4n2p5ssq76vfa95e0ihjs35bebsatio_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqsbp0k2j4lonbduheoque5sga1aq4o32cpi68p34scin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep2bs)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zska7gelcv6q2ca1ggio13ht744riaa76bi34mqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqsbp0k2j4lonbduheoque5sga1aq4o32cpi68p34scin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep2bs)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1uj8tbg0fu89862ms8akl7qlneq73ttnfhmf1lg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfloni18569bhemrt2thlssbp0k2lk9g64pj4chi69op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti46h22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h2bs)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfndgoiuqp401h13iiq0atvkh4ddvlghbo7mfks8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqsbp0k2j4lonbduheoque5sga1aq4o32cpi68p34scin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep2bs)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zchageccm325ru4h0495vuquuo785jtbcjnsnk0g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfloni18569bhemrt2thlssbp0k2lk9g64pj4chi69op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti46h22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h2bs)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvefnd9d8tgv1l30k9s10i128liker4ll9pk8l60_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zatm3tndapjauu6k5t6rpfb0uhue4d88ok3vesf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbiegcu72ansgduq37852t1gofvudkknmhlhgt5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1ro0pl7abbm71lmvls19hnihfm0458ga4hlb1ko_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

subject: #1 Solar Gadget Can Save Your Life In A Crisis
body:
It's Finally Back in Stock

# #1 Solar Gadget Can Save
Your Life In A Crisis
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeff56u4umerajfavecpc30eos92u1crraclnjmg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqetglkbqurgrv1lnjjgm3sns98ube0fid0ke810_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgnbhc4v0ibkvne2t9mag63ed6mu0jct35ek95io_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9d794jh9ipdthcf4md67vbmlqqd619uhmvnjhf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zthd315boforgvhidmtleds2c442gapjd78r78mo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z61pa1vuh92460r1usgoh6cgb5232m6qsmplvebo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c5h2bs)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr4d9v9nptaoc6c58ugetvl1oga8i20ue7q6jtvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsk946m49nnc2h130brej8ppbbv2mqq4ffj1k4v8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zejsdgbct9ovj53cpm79i6qetqbgvapvkqtg4ot0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zibbeofg3f61glim4ctdd4punjo3mp05c5f9g47o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or5c9h2bs)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zts4qidkbkjblerukhdqji63vj56bq7c3m1u4bso_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or1c3h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmglchk8kue96n7lnopd0n7ib2odsovheu7f0rhg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or1c3h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ufviapird6vfjhnlfjidc4bordkknhdef6son0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or1c3h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjel06fe85q2m9hm5nd1vol4209tphsbvurbs7u8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or2c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb10jq49eqa7plg15lbha2k5lj4q5q8d8rk8hpug_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or2c3h2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztd3s03f5qbuhdlh908nt14b9iuepkmjqnj7j4co_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or2c3h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrsnukpep7qpah1v6692pcfsivq5f4nbqdmqkb4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or2c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cjge4p73c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zae5ua72pseea4rn9j9d0shgoq7qssitd893ul28_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpie8or2c3h2bs)_

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36603%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xzMOexPt7VNhpKTe4lSXQQ&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36604%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fSu9oNDbtI1YvQLBJ2BOhg&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36615%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vr85boSA9y6jSku2QFmUxA&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36616%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f7X8RyJ%2fHqUIBFLQvaezLg&sysid=1)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674848%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tG4g%2bxde4n0I9CTuMjxXCA&sysid=1 "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children’s schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here’s what we’re up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from “Welcome to St. Hell,” a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We’ve censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674849%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TC6Ucxpe99OkF9O9nEz9yA&sysid=1)[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674849%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TC6Ucxpe99OkF9O9nEz9yA&sysid=1)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here’s how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674840%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nqRW2etT08DyIlbUsd4j%2bA&sysid=1)

[Donate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674841%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DNwgCJN2cKwhR0rCOsv6Fw&sysid=1)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children’s book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here’s the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it’s working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wDVD3KKnMdQKfe4S8pYEgw&sysid=1)

[Donate $250 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674956%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T%2bFTLqZ5OkrVLMMYQFtb%2bg&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674958%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SSzrF5c5rXowQpSaoaNtWA&sysid=1)

Let’s bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It’s not complicated! It’s what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic’s monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I’ve partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674950%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CYwhQ%2fIbjGBBEEsO4D1fJA&sysid=1)

A reminder of what we’re up against:

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk5uat9ne7tvb4mtql5hqtgm56h008b3g2ev80ng_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6clh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgif8k7jjlnoa1428ce5i75154st03hjl2k0o318_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6clh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zum2gctq27pf03nd4uucnb8uil63aj5pk4r9t85o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6clh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4plbeo77jcqafuu4qffbbt8lffbvi0o0q00notg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6clh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zarra84u7q0tdr3mj6nj091vdftjfh3mcun9d8qo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6cdh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ur6ufa6pu05185dtmi8jg6rejcmk350hiibttg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6cdh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z735rij2tjc3mbgsfr4fr8c6adj1fduj77of5kpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6cdh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkp49sk8gm63fv7j5lo4tctqe12otvffkceul40o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znr18mk79tal0egg39es5vncmif4ev5biga14ai8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6clh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7dp8vleccvflcm68ldvqm6mvu8hcrs0a4bue1h0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6clh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn7uusgqe0ansuo7lloal83iuo2qs635gnc2oufo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6cdh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaflepo7oqps2lim7vf93aeikf79ltknfgj4evq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6cdh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj27c2qvbdurpj5vnu280pi33vihf9bbp4lmgafg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpieaoj6cdh2bs)**

name: John Kennedy
subject: all due respect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase

| |

---
| | | Hey folks -- John Kennedy here.

I respect you too much to beat around the bush. You’re busy. I’m busy. So I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

My Republican colleagues over there in the People’s House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and they sent me a note saying they’re falling **DANGEROUSLY** behind their big November goal.

They also made it abundantly clear to me that they’d have a real mess on their hands if they came up short.

_**[So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We’ve only got a few days left for a last-minute surge before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z74gqrk0ss604p00i83u6h4m0kevf4sjqdsfhs68_ "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We’ve only got a few days left for a last-minute surge before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help.")**_

_Do you think you could do that? For me?_

Look, this deadline was important before... but now I’m hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the country -- **yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next election.**

And I’m afraid this much cash could be enough to push Liberals over the top...

With an ARMY of Liberal donors whipping out their credit cards every time they flip on CNN - and Conservatives missing their goal - it could be all over for us. **That's why I’m pleading for your help right here and now:**
---
| | | [Send In Ten Bucks Now >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmp5g31dvnfus422lig1rlte9r1arcnn5rg3gtpo_ "Send In Ten Bucks Now")
