| | | [Send In More Now >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1s01e4ns77flpu1novvrhh8o3vmi2ppor6m2ou0_ "Send In More Now")
---
I know Kevin McCarthy reached out...
I know James Comer reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Jim Jordan reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...

And I sure as heck know you’re probably tired of hearing from us, but we don’t have time to stand around - not if we want to win!!!

_**[So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I’m personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4381h1gn1gegbokc1rgi7383lflnq2t6rf990e8_ "So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I’m personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.")**_

God bless you,

John N. Kennedy

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: How are we as Christians to live in the light of these events?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzIzLTczODgxOTY3ZmI3NzQ1MTQ5YmY3NzU2NTk1NjhiNmY5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5wdHYub3JnL2lzcmFlbC1wbGVkZ2U_dXRtX2NvdXJzZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1pc3JhZWxfc3BlY2lhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk80NDM1OSJ9/Hb9a6GAb4CWogViL796Xiw)
---
Hello,____My heart is grieved by the recent violence and suffering in Israel. I hope you’ll stand with me in support of God’s people in these dark times.

As Christians, we know that what’s happening in Israel is not a human struggle; it is a spiritual struggle against the forces of darkness.

God has promised that His chosen people will endure forever. The Bible assures us that the enemies of Israel will not succeed. And when Jesus Christ returns, believe that Israel will receive the blessings God promised.
---
| | How are we as Christians to live in the light of these events? One small step would be to join me in signing the pledge to pray for Israel. When you do, you will not only commit to joining thousands across the world in prayer that Israel can defeat evil, but as a thank you and personal reminder of your support, I would like to send you an Israel prayer bracelet (while supplies last.)
---

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36639%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AQfu1kc12zA2e6WhtAgA9w&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36630%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DVkGMgvAf9LQjRWck8Vd3w&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36630%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DVkGMgvAf9LQjRWck8Vd3w&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Kash Patel
subject: How to fix the two-tiered system of justice
body:
You and I need to bring more whistleblowers forward.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvqo0klqevve78pqaj2q3rfa5oa651ipoqrc30i8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr0m9h3cdhheprrbdbjm5o7fddmemp73dhkc9qmbc5ncmqe8ddmecpm4spn6qoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr56ur60phlcspm2pti6dj39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hjm0o31c1h62pj2c8iv0)
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpm3m7bn3ped2f51vvh6svuq0u8r20dag5b8t7bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5g64ob6c9h2bs)

Friend,

Here is something you would NEVER expect to hear me say:

The recent Trump indictments are NOT just about President Trump. It's much more sinister than that... **_They are about destroying a movement to take back the country from the Deep State._**

Just look at what they are doing to patriots around the country -
* DOJ prosecuted pro-life activists, each sentenced to prison terms.
* They indicted several lawyers who worked with President Trump.
* They sentenced a 61-year-old grandma for being present on Jan 6th.

These are just a few examples of how the two-tiered system of justice goes after its political enemies, especially if they are patriotic, law-abiding citizens.

I knew the government gangsters leading the Deep State would use any means necessary to interfere with our republic. But **I have a solution to dismantle their two-tiered system of justice.** You and I need to bring more whistleblowers forward.

That's one of the reasons I founded Kash Foundation. The Kash Foundation supports, amongst many other causes, whistleblowers by providing them with funding and legal assistance after they come forward with credible evidence of government waste, fraud, and abuse.

_This is where you come in, Friend_.

I need to reach 5,000 new donors to continue our efforts to get whistleblowers to come forward. **Will you click the button below and help me reach my goal?**

**Support the Kash Foundation**
**Goal:** 5,000 Donors

**Response: PENDING**

[Donate >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zemcgvgrss26d9hd09jn5j5smbihbe22nh0ajuro_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5g64ob6c9h2bs)
The Kash Foundation helped brave FBI whistleblowers who exposed Chris Wray's lies to Congress under oath and his retribution against them for speaking the truth. We were not going to let that stand.

Whether it's Hunter Biden, President Joe Biden, or even Democratic elected officials - the two-tiered system of justice is a plague destroying our nation. We must destroy it.

I'm requesting your immediate support to reach 5,000 donors online this week to support whistleblowers against the Deep State.

Please rush your support today by selecting an amount below:

[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zafj9470j1fhmdl4d3sp02gn0dmm5vjkvni8i6lo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5g64ob6c9h2bs)

[Donate $25 >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp6por35dleerte9ubmnqcetamqvfi18l02l9vhg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5g64ob6c9h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu8rq7tudlemjdoedu7tl872vrmqd6tdr7739g1o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5g64ob6c9h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgrug0c5uq6ik1emjg30dbcvv1pf61kp7s6rliu0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5g64ob6c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdla5ob5i3muvq8uhpq7uui7tqt50rnndmc7vaoo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5g64ob6c9h2bs)

[Donate $2,500 >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8hrf2ksi3bar4qsnl3ajqb0a5m5s9i9rdricipo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5g64ob6c9h2bs)

I know personally how to out the government gangsters embedded in our agencies.

**I 'm the one who led the real Russiagate investigation, and we exposed the lies and corruption by the Deep State to create the FBI's criminal conspiracy known as Russia Gate.**

Once I found the truth, they began spying on me...

But I wasn't going to be pushed around. I fought back and exposed their actions to the American public.

Now, I want to do the same for others. But I need your help to offer legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and America-first patriots who expose Deep State corruption from these government gangsters. Click below to help out.

[Donate >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3ku3m9fj5uokrf73jmtug33vro6ajec9akpvn5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5g64ob6c9h2bs)

Thank you,

subject: The big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsX54uAidN

We sent this to members of our team the other day, check out our
new ad here!

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osX54uAidN

Friend,

OUR NEW AD

Our SECOND official campaign ad
is hitting the air in Iowa!

WATCH NOW

We
are SO excited to announce that our second campaign ad has been
officially released TODAY! And you get to be a first viewer!

CHECK OUT OUR AD AND KEEP IT ON AIR!

Donate $25: Help us reach a local audience!

Donate $100: Help us reach a national
audience!

We
are spreading our message everywhere, and it's up to us to make
sure we go the distance. Ron DeSantis EARNED this endorsement, we
have earned this ad, and we're ready to make sure everyone knows
it. Will you help us out? (Check out the ad here:
https://RonDeSantis.com/watch-now)

In
Freedom,

Team DeSantis

WATCH NOW

P.S. Missing out on our texts? It's easy to sign up! At any time,
you can text "FREEDOM" to 512345 or scan this QR code to sign up!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isX54uAidN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osX54uAidN

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop Big Oil mega-merger
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130155?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Big Oil giants ExxonMobil and Chevron are trying to get even more powerful by buying up other major fossil fuel companies!_Your gas prices could go up as a result!_** In just the last quarter, the companies had combined profits of more than _**$15 BILLION!**_ Even as they roll in the dough, Big Oil executives want even more. ExxonMobil and Chevron have initiated two of the largest petroleum deals in U.S. history, which would reduce competition and could give **the green light to hike prices even higher.** This is corporate consolidation on steroids! ExxonMobil’s and Chevron’s deals likely violate anti-trust laws – and that’s why **we need your help to urge the Federal Trade Commission to investigate and BLOCK these acquisitions! [Please, Friend, tell the FTC to STOP this Big Oil mega-merger!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130156?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130157?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
As Big Oil companies like ExxonMobil and Chevron get bigger, they wield even more political power. We already know that our political system is crawling with fossil fuel lobbyists pushing to suck every last drop of oil from the Earth even as our planet catches fire. Imagine how much worse it could get if those companies got more resources. Fossil fuel lobbyists would double down harder to **undermine our democratic processes,** thwarting government clean energy initiatives at every turn.
Here’s the bottom line, Friend: **letting corporate dirty energy giants eliminate or buy out the competition is a dangerous game. **
The fossil fuel industry was widely condemned for price gouging during the covid pandemic. Would you really be surprised if they took advantage of this moment too? You might start seeing higher prices at the pump. But **you can help STOP these mega-mergers right now![Stand up to Big Oil and sign the petition demanding the FTC stop ExxonMobil’s and Chevron’s dangerous mergers!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130158?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130157?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Karen Orenstein
Climate and Energy Justice Program Director,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D272568&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:
[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)
---
##### Connect:
[](https://www.facebook.com/foe.us?fref=ts) [](https://twitter.com/foe_us) [](https://www.flickr.com/photos/foeaction/)
---
© 2021, Friends of the Earth. All Rights Reserved.

Unfortunately, it will take a lot more than one donation to defeat Joe Biden, Peter. We have to recognize that we've got a long road ahead. The Iowa Caucus is just two months away, and we're in the fight of our lives right now. Joe Biden and the Democrats have joined forces with the legacy media, and our opponents are pouring millions into meritless attack ads to take us down--and **if we let these attacks win then we're letting the woke mob win.** I know that times are extremely tough under Joe Biden's economy, and finances are stretched as thin as they can be, but the most important thing you can do for our fight right now is signing up to donate any amount to my campaign monthly. ****[**Whether it's just $1, $5, or $15 that you can put toward my campaign, I promise we are making it go farther than a cup of coffee you could otherwise spend it on**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=69823052b2194760a19069e8f90261d6&_e=wjBY2DH-bhrcdcGnzXuqURJk9y0iaHoXsZA9oZpopfchBS6V-UWso9bhoheGOsXC1OxHbE7sfyoGcJjfl3fJZMzohvokzpuk8sSnaikf-IpjD_4aM4_rV7CRuSlFayhxDUXxZ4uncl9uFN9S5q2Tnzf4UFD8gryA8J5xa3i_GiPIzKNNJptaRuzUE6gDAY1h)**. **
---
| | [BECOME A RECURRING DONOR TODAY!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=69823052b2194760a19069e8f90261d6&_e=wjBY2DH-bhrcdcGnzXuqUSnCV9-SY9Lq_rU8I4tmGUpswKTlc4N52WrbnuWsBoQtxqM3kxFcmR1soEEhCGcTpUVSVbGXXehtJ7G7DEEUb7ydaRAwe97t0zNzZpLoLHUHn--ThetlcXhgolFj7dUX8xpIIxQELwTp9SADA8HDc3xO83muW0AWeszBxdtd2qzTOJUeK6qDc6cssiwF5pauFU5iaa6fT0IcCbLgFGI_yggZiH0jSQI8fOORLhxDnJks_bc78rfNanxQO7XUNKB4MPbdkLJNV-Dn7iqyjSCPontSlqOMpMNqvp281Q0lL_KrORjv76P8w2QO0k_AI9blvO1obDYb0FgNPhy3FV7U9MuBnxmHu_6erYYVpvp4AvBxHfoKuZjSn4_d73TZOl3J4WP826SZiUju_QxEjs3uWkg%3D)
---
Becoming a monthly donor means helping us plan and budget for every move we can pull off. Your donation will go directly into helping us plan how much we're putting toward our advertising and voter outreach efforts, ordering new merch, and cutting the ribbon on new offices like we've done in Iowa. Every dollar counts. I need my team to come together.
---
| | [Help the team by signing up to donate monthly!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=69823052b2194760a19069e8f90261d6&_e=wjBY2DH-bhrcdcGnzXuqUSnCV9-SY9Lq_rU8I4tmGUpswKTlc4N52WrbnuWsBoQtxqM3kxFcmR1soEEhCGcTpUVSVbGXXehtJ7G7DEEUb7ydaRAwe97t0zNzZpLoLHUHn--ThetlcXhgolFj7dUX8xpIIxQELwTp9SADA8HDc3xO83muW0AWeszBxdtd2qzTOJUeK6qDc6cssiwF5pauFU5iaa6fT0IcCbLgFGI_yggZiH0jSQI8fOORLhxDnJks_bc78rfNanxQO7XUNKB4MOtX2PEJbCdyY6xwb9dEDhJUGcE8km9zcDxRhefIZ3kpX-L8aLe2RRLjYKs3J0zAcNtbIExIRqNnV30TnjVGg0ZngKffIBOt61-5_6RTdO4hBMTm1rzENveMRCI1VUi_-UYCCYLf-cjJWxvFcrAg3gQ%3D)

This grassroots team is our foundation. I want you to help us rise above the fray and win at all costs. **If we all come together,**[**just a $5 monthly donation from all of us would help us fight back against every attack thrown our way**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=69823052b2194760a19069e8f90261d6&_e=wjBY2DH-bhrcdcGnzXuqUSnCV9-SY9Lq_rU8I4tmGUpswKTlc4N52WrbnuWsBoQtxqM3kxFcmR1soEEhCGcTpUVSVbGXXehtJ7G7DEEUb7ydaRAwe97t0zNzZpLoLHUHn--ThetlcXhgolFj7dUX8xpIIxQELwTp9SADA8HDc3xO83muW0AWeszBxdtd2qzTOJUeK6qDc6cssiwF5pauFU5iaa6fT0IcCbLgFGI_yggZiH0jSQI8fOORLhxDnJks_bc78rfNanxQO7XUNKB4MO1n2VbCt4TnSvWmIJAzFa9PNFzvVfvqCBJVzdGcmpnFuNgQu7N0F2D5Tk4sOx8c3FwpR3rwHyngK29ko59PuLhInZDm5lA5J8cNNluS3ZY57GL0wcQM14w2JNocvUjG3lAvFaCX_0txgkjZ049bQys%3D)**.** I need your support, Peter. _Sign up today to be a top member of my team helping me fight EVERY MONTH until November 2024:**[https://RonDeSantis.com/fight-back](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=69823052b2194760a19069e8f90261d6&_e=wjBY2DH-bhrcdcGnzXuqUSnCV9-SY9Lq_rU8I4tmGUpswKTlc4N52WrbnuWsBoQtxqM3kxFcmR1soEEhCGcTpUVSVbGXXehtJ7G7DEEUb7ydaRAwe97t0zNzZpLoLHUHn--ThetlcXhgolFj7dUX8xpIIxQELwTp9SADA8HDc3xO83muW0AWeszBxdtd2qzTOJUeK6qDc6cssiwF5pauFU5iaa6fT0IcCbLgFGI_yggZiH0jSQI8fOORLhxDnJks_bc78rfNanxQO7XUNKB4MPmVxALrTpWgqnv6djpXC8z9_PnzAuPrKVR76VfmqvehjX9vmevbzAkRIPo3a9h0K3pFCeYpoA1CZE44a68jQmxDcUDA5e44omQuf0UZqZa34ehUAcU_qnRpRHgj7HQGR5uFKPMmz5dxrhZ9Nhx0o4w%3D "https://RonDeSantis.com/fight-back")**_ Thank you for helping me lead our Great American Comeback. Ron DeSantis

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_

| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=69823052b2194760a19069e8f90261d6&_e=wjBY2DH-bhrcdcGnzXuqUSnCV9-SY9Lq_rU8I4tmGUpswKTlc4N52WrbnuWsBoQtxqM3kxFcmR1soEEhCGcTpUVSVbGXXehtJ7G7DEEUb7ydaRAwe97t0zNzZpLoLHUHn--ThetlcXhgolFj7dUX8xpIIxQELwTp9SADA8HDc3xO83muW0AWeszBxdtd2qzTOJUeK6qDc6cssiwF5pauFU5iaa6fT0IcCbLgFGI_yggZiH0jSQI8fOORLhxDnJks_bc78rfNanxQO7XUNKB4MK27ower-fdC5ofmbeyjYZh2kBo-2fkVpkb5aQ845SzRE_lvFIVt8_GfBmGE6hzKrTooweRgyzbQHWc774c2gXsGYaasegqoFLE-ShsHIOGGBXNd5T_AXhOD8JNJzM9gcXBtgxVHPy75yun8xhDUyw0%3D)

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=69823052b2194760a19069e8f90261d6&_e=wjBY2DH-bhrcdcGnzXuqUSnCV9-SY9Lq_rU8I4tmGUpswKTlc4N52WrbnuWsBoQtxqM3kxFcmR1soEEhCGcTpUVSVbGXXehtJ7G7DEEUb7ydaRAwe97t0zNzZpLoLHUHn--ThetlcXhgolFj7dUX8xpIIxQELwTp9SADA8HDc3xO83muW0AWeszBxdtd2qzTOJUeK6qDc6cssiwF5pauFU5iaa6fT0IcCbLgFGI_yggZiH0jSQI8fOORLhxDnJks_bc78rfNanxQO7XUNKB4MJ5lRQVBArvjD8gLLAfkQ0ygbXNv3vJJ0HXp39x2_5CQtzbk5w_1gy5BFGd71SurenuUhgt_X-X92jMMmqKyIlIWWJyKMzx0t8y9aPrpibPfHVYUQjdou-MaOkG6blIn2ZBEgpybI7S5u1KZxj1w4gg%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=505d6f36a82a468cb4d00267338dc7ff&_e=ZvP914Rt93naeRHEsdURwiNUKSjtW6_HEVx33UQGI0XZZTsWU94pFr50HBf0nQnHUj8RUfaiJ7lHhuxn_agdP13stml955MRQZyI7Fh2JSewG0KZ2_M7kORkgi7GGQ7FgejJGd9_S3_FqF0bK_lDo9_2zoG3vzN2H5EyOWxik-Oo0vZHfj8uV3iRe4bq-LMQhlSz9JJEddhTAaMWIS_8LFn1j0Rtm8XiB5Gthc9ap3x0GRnEom_60B0HNLRc4dS7Bko_xVT9-KN-qgmVmmNsbgPzspe_b7yf5_NmGojV4Jc9ibHklfKhCZlj2Kp07xmZa4Cmyu8-fV4y27KIORR4igkNe7RgrLCKkHuv7cua5v9hkGOku9AMOjSVODCWpDwa)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=505d6f36a82a468cb4d00267338dc7ff&_e=ZvP914Rt93naeRHEsdURwiNUKSjtW6_HEVx33UQGI0XZZTsWU94pFr50HBf0nQnHUj8RUfaiJ7lHhuxn_agdP13stml955MRQZyI7Fh2JSewG0KZ2_M7kORkgi7GGQ7FgejJGd9_S3_FqF0bK_lDo9_2zoG3vzN2H5EyOWxik-Oo0vZHfj8uV3iRe4bq-LMQhlSz9JJEddhTAaMWIS_8LFn1j0Rtm8XiB5Gthc9ap3yjkePOQXgvvgZcepM-gWHcZCwzGC0ZDosPN5sVTu7QMlb7TlrTR6dLQae_1rxo83ZB6GZkflQLPoEgAFFxP_NSbOrk-K_nv-AF11LmW1ylgEYXdt8dld8g5eTIcp7T8pTjxi9M-lcQgpPJV7bDdC3g) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=505d6f36a82a468cb4d00267338dc7ff&_e=ZvP914Rt93naeRHEsdURwiNUKSjtW6_HEVx33UQGI0XZZTsWU94pFr50HBf0nQnHUj8RUfaiJ7lHhuxn_agdP13stml955MRQZyI7Fh2JSewG0KZ2_M7kORkgi7GGQ7FgejJGd9_S3_FqF0bK_lDo9_2zoG3vzN2H5EyOWxik-Oo0vZHfj8uV3iRe4bq-LMQhlSz9JJEddhTAaMWIS_8LFn1j0Rtm8XiB5Gthc9ap3w4Jt12KRPpPDkEOYrEm1pTJY28yBcpzqNVVjzTRKgSdmntUn6dJrUB_4VM2KvjpraFitfbB-9nR_VAXBOGGvAe9NCsekeRGRW3y0_LpQJWseZzPItYvn83FDQe9t8tZYEF2k8QSUb1s44ZTmizgcd0)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=505d6f36a82a468cb4d00267338dc7ff&_e=ZvP914Rt93naeRHEsdURwiNUKSjtW6_HEVx33UQGI0XZZTsWU94pFr50HBf0nQnHUj8RUfaiJ7lHhuxn_agdP13stml955MRQZyI7Fh2JSewG0KZ2_M7kORkgi7GGQ7FgejJGd9_S3_FqF0bK_lDo9_2zoG3vzN2H5EyOWxik-Oo0vZHfj8uV3iRe4bq-LMQhlSz9JJEddhTAaMWIS_8LFn1j0Rtm8XiB5Gthc9ap3wCgjpKlgDzmjvGA0GOF154u7GfEFsFEiuYJbXc3qPw1EU1R1ChXN1riWrwjZ_Vij-H3D8991Il3sGbwhHgUeru5_zkq6QqATJSWlG7hLtqjo67vt718U76Q65IOVzKhtvmDKe6unQ9FD7Tiz433xqz)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=505d6f36a82a468cb4d00267338dc7ff&_e=ZvP914Rt93naeRHEsdURwiNUKSjtW6_HEVx33UQGI0XZZTsWU94pFr50HBf0nQnHUj8RUfaiJ7lHhuxn_agdP13stml955MRQZyI7Fh2JSewG0KZ2_M7kORkgi7GGQ7FgejJGd9_S3_FqF0bK_lDo9_2zoG3vzN2H5EyOWxik-Oo0vZHfj8uV3iRe4bq-LMQhlSz9JJEddhTAaMWIS_8LFn1j0Rtm8XiB5Gthc9ap3xbXm1JJYpKbU_UhKzatTttCThK8I_2S74k1Kg-_-j2AquczfdNiHJKgkkTj-xVguNJ4yrdKSBFH7QuMFBnKmqjuUtZNwNLes_YeCO043AgfyPifPF6qYcG29o6GWGCh_rzpFg5UvCSbVQvN-GbgwB5)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=505d6f36a82a468cb4d00267338dc7ff&_e=ZvP914Rt93naeRHEsdURwiNUKSjtW6_HEVx33UQGI0XZZTsWU94pFr50HBf0nQnHUj8RUfaiJ7lHhuxn_agdP13stml955MRQZyI7Fh2JSewG0KZ2_M7kORkgi7GGQ7FgejJGd9_S3_FqF0bK_lDo9_2zoG3vzN2H5EyOWxik-Oo0vZHfj8uV3iRe4bq-LMQhlSz9JJEddhTAaMWIS_8LFn1j0Rtm8XiB5Gthc9ap3z0KjQPYfJ5-KhGfieDE1I03LuXS2z-YDi82Xb1Jv7PbUajw9tTVZlBKjVQc-i43bWs1KoqJQkqMK898Epql7XTxhwm4GokWuyYV4byGln5kud0dzOxpH_hxPBPOK1IWG9-Ype_8hDXnS0IYSZkNWyh)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=505d6f36a82a468cb4d00267338dc7ff&_e=ZvP914Rt93naeRHEsdURwiNUKSjtW6_HEVx33UQGI0XZZTsWU94pFr50HBf0nQnHUj8RUfaiJ7lHhuxn_agdP13stml955MRQZyI7Fh2JSewG0KZ2_M7kORkgi7GGQ7FgejJGd9_S3_FqF0bK_lDo9_2zoG3vzN2H5EyOWxik-Oo0vZHfj8uV3iRe4bq-LMQhlSz9JJEddhTAaMWIS_8LFn1j0Rtm8XiB5Gthc9ap3yotdk3EmGYgQyi6ED9_3c-79GTWbBhCKFcGqXN3vBXfvCnBrh734y4B4rVoHIzQCwAAGqGxOdLNeLYBh5buToGxXU8B0QTOEfQSSZwzOvrJsUrTGauh6EezN3Jpc0iew3la9KLTC5m-4OPoQ2QFmaF)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=505d6f36a82a468cb4d00267338dc7ff&_e=ZvP914Rt93naeRHEsdURwiNUKSjtW6_HEVx33UQGI0XZZTsWU94pFr50HBf0nQnHUj8RUfaiJ7lHhuxn_agdP13stml955MRQZyI7Fh2JSewG0KZ2_M7kORkgi7GGQ7FgejJGd9_S3_FqF0bK_lDo9_2zoG3vzN2H5EyOWxik-Oo0vZHfj8uV3iRe4bq-LMQhlSz9JJEddhTAaMWIS_8LFn1j0Rtm8XiB5Gthc9ap3z4m3wp0uyBVNRns-MEunuFLDAa2dD7kqomc1eYs0j5k7eLhUUjZ3KNL1LHRI4rOKS8qFGbElqL_I0tysz5C2QqCbAZjlItmAmwqCWKlo6XZYd0winSzzeCkkfaH_rlGe4OTgKTY0TO1954Wv7m-x82)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=505d6f36a82a468cb4d00267338dc7ff&_e=ZvP914Rt93naeRHEsdURwiNUKSjtW6_HEVx33UQGI0XZZTsWU94pFr50HBf0nQnHUj8RUfaiJ7lHhuxn_agdP13stml955MRQZyI7Fh2JSewG0KZ2_M7kORkgi7GGQ7FgejJGd9_S3_FqF0bK_lDo9_2zoG3vzN2H5EyOWxik-Oo0vZHfj8uV3iRe4bq-LMQhlSz9JJEddhTAaMWIS_8LFn1j0Rtm8XiB5Gthc9ap3yJKZ9ZvnrEl2ymiUFnZGeYQeJMaKW0S-ACrMWEhJN7eS0vOub-AhNfdIFFFcHbdNfKUgEXcglj5IxoVN60BhAVnEfp233WzFD_K7xHNIDGNZ9Bp6Eqx62Shfy0vIXCWJEcozYKOuN-1jg9tdOby9ik)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=505d6f36a82a468cb4d00267338dc7ff&_e=ZvP914Rt93naeRHEsdURwiNUKSjtW6_HEVx33UQGI0XZZTsWU94pFr50HBf0nQnHUj8RUfaiJ7lHhuxn_agdP13stml955MRQZyI7Fh2JSewG0KZ2_M7kORkgi7GGQ7FgejJGd9_S3_FqF0bK_lDo9_2zoG3vzN2H5EyOWxik-Oo0vZHfj8uV3iRe4bq-LMQhlSz9JJEddhTAaMWIS_8LFn1j0Rtm8XiB5Gthc9ap3xTph1Wsg66qdu5_tpkRwBZFn60dYlsgPLS3eF4No09XnDHXT2TpkyKRhcgnisAYUtgsXZyCLKnp7qkXAFNk66QlcLfKKJVTf73V9iuF6V-a366N3O9dTDZ6FTghwU7Q5gX6k1HKTcnKj-rC0fPFIoH)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb08a6bf9ad7448e9d97cb3705bc444d&_e=uSyaJ9g5oOZUmvqJAzmjOyxdEtQBZT4zvXoAqbEfl5FX811uLtIZzXcf99nd8L9EvF2HGOUUWVOeuiKmHaXYlQxJbguP_SHon5cjGua77pguVFWc3Io9DfNxbfaKy1KlbtvnUznaziEccIRS4fPWD81sjdjcNhS0wOTBZsLY4RhP0_yg3JnXTLrLInPW6UKzeXR2Z8LNBXVQ-xWqrVxwoGjSLidUkJF8ulS3d-v966P8dEH8IZc-rF0crgoJePSfdYOLcFSpyO_rcrgL1dS42FfLr2_CRwMabnYDHf7JMtR-ciJZVvF08xLW45phlku0) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb08a6bf9ad7448e9d97cb3705bc444d&_e=uSyaJ9g5oOZUmvqJAzmjOyxdEtQBZT4zvXoAqbEfl5FX811uLtIZzXcf99nd8L9EvF2HGOUUWVOeuiKmHaXYlQxJbguP_SHon5cjGua77pguVFWc3Io9DfNxbfaKy1KlbtvnUznaziEccIRS4fPWDwqknqUsYVke__6TQIRmIqT5hFEAUoR0bjpxTJ4a-5BkWqTBpfA3-E0FH1UwWJiWrAUcXhxUqJQwBcNx12dMMh9nyqax9HwfxWHmB2t9EgeT0Xl7o9ymZS3vqq0J7swBeAaNJIbSwk_C-Kvh1G92keL6aJjWfbhIKgz689wyk-4R) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb08a6bf9ad7448e9d97cb3705bc444d&_e=uSyaJ9g5oOZUmvqJAzmjOyxdEtQBZT4zvXoAqbEfl5FX811uLtIZzXcf99nd8L9EvF2HGOUUWVOeuiKmHaXYlQxJbguP_SHon5cjGua77pguVFWc3Io9DfNxbfaKy1KlbtvnUznaziEccIRS4fPWD4B6rrVUkxp7V9ktV3hL98wgRXgaho6Ip8qc-98SCOnQgc3Nbvf_Td4B9VRPxRUK1CYIL3UFF8kGsViHHVWiJVm_lUz_1dWjlYxyFqgNvr2jRY2Z3DyhjHii_K0jWGgUfhjZlpuWKZcYYXPB0OGYrXHFOo8eXluuqIAb2cq63xKM). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb08a6bf9ad7448e9d97cb3705bc444d&_e=uSyaJ9g5oOZUmvqJAzmjOyxdEtQBZT4zvXoAqbEfl5FX811uLtIZzXcf99nd8L9EvF2HGOUUWVOeuiKmHaXYlQxJbguP_SHon5cjGua77pguVFWc3Io9DfNxbfaKy1KlbtvnUznaziEccIRS4fPWDzLCtm9ZKF7CPcaqa5nffBSvXVe6dtOggKcCmezVoiZgapPEp0I3kK9PcejFSXzOqHFrT3sjAMLcC_4rkjMu7iDRKuCm-2zB-uWN_E15VJkMEF5TR39pB6bTiOLR20Uy9btFqO-VV-PV6VjoCe0Gb7naEH6TUK6g0shxT1o5LdU1)

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Interview with a Congressional Candidate
body:
We here at Shift WA are already looking forward to covering the
2024 Elections as your trusted, rational conservative
perspective. But we're even more looking forward to spending time
with friends and family this Thanksgiving!

The team here at Shift WA has
been working to shift the political debate in Washington state
since 2013. We've spent the last decade providing people like you
with the facts and perspectives needed to hopefully make a
difference in your community. So, as always, we will help keep
you-up-to-date with an item or two of interest from your own
backyard. Read on...

This week's Newsmaker
Interview...
This week we talked with Andrea
Suarez, Founder and Executive Director of the non-profit
volunteer organization We Heart Seattle. In a very short time the
group has made a significant impact in cleaning up encampments
and helping people get off the streets. Created during the
height of the COVID pandemic in 2020 when homeless encampments
were filling Seattle's parks, sidewalks, and other public places,
We Heart Seattle challenged the status quo regarding how best to
help those struggling with drugs and homelessness. Along the
way, they have encountered protests by a small group of
extremists as volunteers have cleaned up encampments and
attempted to help those who were suffering. Read more...

This week's top story…
We assume part of Governor
Inslee's decision to take a carbon polluting flight to the U.N.
was to get away from the increasingly louder local noise over his
costly cap-and-tax scheme and the Washington Policy Center's case
that "Governor Inslee's office and others in his administration
are upset that we and others refer to the cost of the CO2
allowances in the law as a 'tax.' The governor's office and
others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic
to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more...

In case you missed it…
Leave it to the local paper to
put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts
do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the
Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever
happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't
be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon. We
wouldn't be surprised if the courts were still haggling over this
one when the next census comes around." However, the local paper
takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit,
pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live
west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino
majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue
to Central Washington. But they're living in a fantasy world if
they take for granted that Latinos will lean left." Read more...

Governor Inslee's pennies can
sure add up...

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.
clean_body: We here at Shift WA are already looking forward to covering the 2024 Elections as your trusted, rational conservative perspective. But we're even more looking forward to spending time with friends and family this Thanksgiving! The team here at Shift WA has been working to shift the political debate in Washington state since 2013. We've spent the last decade providing people like you with the facts and perspectives needed to hopefully make a difference in your community. So, as always, we will help keep you-up-to-date with an item or two of interest from your own backyard. Read on... This week's Newsmaker Interview... This week we talked with Andrea Suarez, Founder and Executive Director of the non-profit volunteer organization We Heart Seattle. In a very short time the group has made a significant impact in cleaning up encampments and helping people get off the streets. Created during the height of the COVID pandemic in 2020 when homeless encampments were filling Seattle's parks, sidewalks, and other public places, We Heart Seattle challenged the status quo regarding how best to help those struggling with drugs and homelessness. Along the way, they have encountered protests by a small group of extremists as volunteers have cleaned up encampments and attempted to help those who were suffering. Read more... This week's top story… We assume part of Governor Inslee's decision to take a carbon polluting flight to the U.N. was to get away from the increasingly louder local noise over his costly cap-and-tax scheme and the Washington Policy Center's case that "Governor Inslee's office and others in his administration are upset that we and others refer to the cost of the CO2 allowances in the law as a 'tax.' The governor's office and others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more... In case you missed it… Leave it to the local paper to put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon. We wouldn't be surprised if the courts were still haggling over this one when the next census comes around." However, the local paper takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit, pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue to Central Washington. But they're living in a fantasy world if they take for granted that Latinos will lean left." Read more... Governor Inslee's pennies can sure add up... DONATE This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can click here to do so. You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on Facebook & Twitter. If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, click to unsubscribe.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35f0d24e7398494985e54e85c8421e39&_e=x64qbU2MEPQowm59n6i6XOkmB2COkYrgUJR9yFAroxteHZxujcbEkD4D2GZXZ0nT9BWUpBFzO2egU3t3qvT8VknyjWTCSBPGw_XXwdXUND69DS043V7FEhfwnpdhZ04C-PUnEoE6m107q8d-DNn96BVAMADkCjTXlpGTiwmyG0VQ1uZGfocXa2wYh-lXbvs02D4-MmwKPXWXfjffpxmEmeT9vt5PNlMAXsovYaoGPY3SMCPSfSlnL3KIhLnQYL1M "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35f0d24e7398494985e54e85c8421e39&_e=x64qbU2MEPQowm59n6i6XOkmB2COkYrgUJR9yFAroxteHZxujcbEkD4D2GZXZ0nT9BWUpBFzO2egU3t3qvT8VknyjWTCSBPGw_XXwdXUND4irqpfs3LQBuKqm_gdMGarhyho1_6zNLAL3-PzucPoK4INYXdwCrYZ4xNbWzE49ZBhFcJQ8_w8mFx8puSXFeOrQPzqJC7ENlvdM-Td0AGHizemPztukHeqYrSxzBPVd8ZgEixyKnFJV2qjZ4fr1aCU)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=994ec9efe1ec4cfa8dc6ad1819faf888&_e=qSYVyOgIOFeKab0pf0fNpRYfX00yegr9ckLa1jOsKx-sQ8m08BnSGJf7B1_Xi8ZaJrWEl9dohNGcplseupVBHVHKcNFCgqC_MzQHhPVESqxHQj4FUOkaGVeWRyxYKOXJ_BYiOIcD-sBUw5Qex7rjN6Fo57NgzazTS_UToPT1QkE5_IammenSuEvpiwU_Vhl0Eb5AwsM8OI3itnKP2PcfIqgQ8fmMHTfZa5Fuq0WQj3udi2TSgjiKqnwh0B3Gc2ShF3Vylgfk_0b8fvZ4AUUkbKx8Tn6IP9SZyvYZF84wvTXSu2upd__CZ587Rw6Io6s8). FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. name: Fred Guttenberg via Blue Amp Action
subject: It’s always hard to tell this story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f79f11d-b989-4f9b-a71b-1277ed196b97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d6e039f-0ae4-41b2-bfe3-4f997f965dce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter – It’s always hard to say these words: On February 14, 2018, my beloved daughter Jaime was killed in her own high school in Parkland, Florida, at the hands of a mass shooter who never should have had access to a gun. That day, Jen, Jesse, and I lost a piece of our hearts that no amount of time, thoughts, or prayers will ever heal.

I was devastated. And enraged. I knew that I had to do something. No family should have to endure the loss that mine did but, unfortunately, far too many have and will.

**The truth is, the only way we’re going to prevent future mass shootings and save lives is by electing a historic wave of gun violence prevention candidates to office who will have the courage to enact common sense gun reforms.**

[**_That’s why I’m humbly asking if you’ll join Blue Amp Action and me in electing one of those leaders: Dr. Brian Williams. Brian is a first-time candidate and trauma surgeon who treats victims of gun violence who needs your help so he can win an open seat in Congress._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc7b5e26-c944-499b-90b0-3942e7e0cc03/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68c41533-fb68-413a-bfa9-b6b4e2796d9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In the aftermath of the Parkland mass shooting, it immediately became clear that the politicians and institutions my community had trusted to protect us had failed us miserably. For the extremist state legislators and federal lawmakers supposedly “representing” us in Congress, our children’s lives had a price.

But through that anger and despair, I found a sense of hope.

**I remain hopeful because of the great people I have had the good fortune of meeting over the years who are dedicated to saving lives from senseless gun violence. Dr. Brian Williams is one of them.**

He never thought he would run for office – but after responding to a mass shooting in Dallas, he knew there was work to do beyond the operating room. He then advised Congress on what would become **the first major Federal gun reform bill signed into law in thirty years and is now running for an open House seat in Texas.**

He’s a person who is putting himself out there because of what he has seen and he’s exactly the kind of leader we need representing and fighting for us in Congress. Dr. Brian Williams has been a fearless leader on this issue and will be in Congress.

[**_For all the families who have lost someone to gun violence and for all those families who will soon experience this devastation without life-saving reforms, I’m asking if you’ll join me in electing Dr. Brian Williams and a wave of gun violence prevention champions like him at all levels of government._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee164c94-d40f-4d63-a243-3bd0b9049b42/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Thank you,

Fred Guttenberg

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | Peter – It’s always hard to say these words: On February 14, 2018, my beloved daughter Jaime was killed in her own high school in Parkland, Florida, at the hands of a mass shooter who never should have had access to a gun. That day, Jen, Jesse, and I lost a piece of our hearts that no amount of time, thoughts, or prayers will ever heal. I was devastated. And enraged. I knew that I had to do something. No family should have to endure the loss that mine did but, unfortunately, far too many have and will. The truth is, the only way we’re going to prevent future mass shootings and save lives is by electing a historic wave of gun violence prevention candidates to office who will have the courage to enact common sense gun reforms. | | | | | | | | In the aftermath of the Parkland mass shooting, it immediately became clear that the politicians and institutions my community had trusted to protect us had failed us miserably. For the extremist state legislators and federal lawmakers supposedly “representing” us in Congress, our children’s lives had a price. But through that anger and despair, I found a sense of hope. I remain hopeful because of the great people I have had the good fortune of meeting over the years who are dedicated to saving lives from senseless gun violence. Dr. Brian Williams is one of them. He never thought he would run for office – but after responding to a mass shooting in Dallas, he knew there was work to do beyond the operating room. He then advised Congress on what would become the first major Federal gun reform bill signed into law in thirty years and is now running for an open House seat in Texas. He’s a person who is putting himself out there because of what he has seen and he’s exactly the kind of leader we need representing and fighting for us in Congress. Dr. Brian Williams has been a fearless leader on this issue and will be in Congress. | | | | | Thank you, Fred Guttenberg | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Aozydk3ym0NuUkM-SOP3iA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOVcDc3BjQgplVdn1WWUGG3RXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Aozydk3ym0NuUkM-SOP3iA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOVcDc3BjQgplVdn1WWUGG3RXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Aozydk3ym0NuUkM-SOP3iA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOVcDc3BjQgplVdn1WWUGG3RXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Aozydk3ym0NuUkM-SOP3iA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOVcDc3BjQgplVdn1WWUGG3RXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

[Donate](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Aozydk3ym0NuUkM-SOP3iA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOVcDc3BjQgplVdn1WWUGG3RXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5lLPrE0M-d9K7dqr9FQWkA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0REaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOSZhbW91bnQ9MTBXA3NwY0IKZVXZ9VllBht0V1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BlViTXc1uiKjfdNioK0ETA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOSZhbW91bnQ9MTAwMFcDc3BjQgplVdn1WWUGG3RXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BlViTXc1uiKjfdNioK0ETA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOSZhbW91bnQ9MTAwMFcDc3BjQgplVdn1WWUGG3RXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Aozydk3ym0NuUkM-SOP3iA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOVcDc3BjQgplVdn1WWUGG3RXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

A reminder of what we're up against:

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Aozydk3ym0NuUkM-SOP3iA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOVcDc3BjQgplVdn1WWUGG3RXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

[Click here to donate and help SkyTree change the world.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Aozydk3ym0NuUkM-SOP3iA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPJ-AP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExOVcDc3BjQgplVdn1WWUGG3RXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
