name: Tim Sheehey
subject: Everything was washed away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
When I saw everything that we'd worked for in Afghanistan washed away in a matter of days, I decided to consider serving in government once again
%recipient.md5_hash%
"It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn't an easy decision. I don't want to make money; _**[I don't want to be famous; I don't care to be someone important - but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice that it's taken to build our country."](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e4BhqIFyogZJcDF6hgtS4BeMDVWO-d_17FXVcMcEzICygsPuSAk_q0-OZh7K0_KtBBwgUp-7uJPkmeRfoxNrlOVOAtBYqjPVp-36unYXLiEOgAGS1AS0ol7wPtEGKM1ZWuTbNjK83DI7n9Udye6vYA2xIdLAoby32CcFOw-9AS82U%3D)**_

Friend,

As a former Navy SEAL and special forces veteran, I've seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife's service to our country, we've sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I'm proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e4D4yM9SghR6YrsuWJ1YOunB3uC5EpDV-1N3R4ZndCacFcoNiTnuuBkRRRzbl0j4W3JrtlPgm_Q1t3f1nK4viCHa76iO95b65ykIcRe_EMwQ4TW1GZc9IRfBSk33isseiSeEI23oVspRtw-u7tQ-ZRVcT1UBpjfsIUxhrPuUaxesY%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues _**[[many veterans like me]](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e40QtsbdLGzZrgEnF7RcH1mB7wsMb4FASccS9FUWgaThMzNnzHqwaU3BjfUm44SNR24HW4TYBhUxg6YLH2DDL286WboU6hM9KyuAyHR0vIZxvclD7SRog6S9NaYynQ_ZDCgbPUMhyV8KnuWspDjgK2DF12SELA8fAei9qaiHGMppA%3D)**_ and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally _**[sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e41ol2znRs7lEt_6gOMvIXrZ2tVsIzAjnmZKEqKJASGWdRc-9c5zfNoPu3LNgqalBmrlUuLARp5CYXQ4wGBtUm_QF7mmEtF7hpp5TD3DTE4MQGCzMyncYxTwXqZ_tR3NeSPE4VOfDZR7ACqId7RQ8w_qpnHTDv-3ZVvcX2qZ3Zy2M%3D)**_ so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**[I kept thinking to myself,"The adult will come in the room and say, 'Hey, this is a disaster; we're going to stop this.'"](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e47NLnIm9y3TwzUfDezHIIdDNFx--5iG1gWgGQ-OFghuTKC06vjtDO6-RMoKaLX5gqeirBn0p0zoiZrCLYtq0961rr9WtgTkseptvDckHLyAlwG55lMM7rEKqnwg4_yyYIllchnVVn0xwLC1GAT7YqCg6yNIxu9onews29pzhs204%3D)**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**[Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul's airport.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e40sQ5546UFQ4_pE9f88BVj889hVPPkp0S1SW0t2A4OL2PCavucD7GoZ5bkhNBJsiSaTIicgbOZYEp4G5rDsn_uzxqYriLFaKPKdzWDItbNtP6NxTNylyqnYz3mxz5FLkW6qWCQoboLoQxtVHBHSJ4cl06zxkZHzNTE68Pn0hZYew%3D)** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind - all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he'd pulled the country out of an "endless war."

I'd sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I'd promised them that we weren't going to leave them behind. So, _**[you can imagine the dishonor that I felt](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e4rGVL72A4JkXBQnK3PEiDB-2NDqCqJXG-ufwiF1YfJptMht7nBQIGwfUHfu2353rvT-hVNRJus0tGpFHjLK3PDpvTAtuDjZyw7-RhXBPfER52dI7STkauj5_iCB7sKvy9upAXdS032086dFvinO3LZEi3yF4ug-daLVUWCw3AeKg%3D)**_ because of the promises we weren't able to keep to the people who'd sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn't an easy decision. _**[I don't want to make money; I don't want to be famous; I don't care to be someone important - but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice that it's taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e4EZSmRnt70_DIkqHDRG0YAobE7mU7R-cVOD4vHX3HiruXKc-L_kdMSADRRhSF4WO6iRarzpcBccnUTLjZwmlRZEzQ8Be9TkoDNWCSU_Emig2wDDrEAIQiAbTok4bohHLJrlTTQz5l4RHcrp7oCjUbiyFleyf2j_LhEzEIlacJv-U%3D)**_

**[Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e4ZZ1ijLtPnNEM6YrrwnENKnYY4287-5Pj5tMMa15O8L-DGPdPM9ijvRl9d5e7ODn1yp6wgKQXU_igJ1oEYwHlUvdCseevoSQWzBbTMeO0pKJCnY4P1y4aCndw4blqCvG3y_sv6dzPb_9oWA5F8prjSIjFVUNF_A69aa5xK-4EUGw%3D)** I've been wounded in service of our nation; I've lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

I'm reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana's U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, _**[I'm going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e4quUq9kjiWlODTuU1prcXLgtmqwVtVFgVnW2ASUOa6Svlbg7xOnJV9oJ2EYiaVEQGwkAKqVZJZ2UPGByysetLso9ke8QcbYjGBUysV0s2RNdUzK8wQgUYnVPDslUOSweV73Uo4er6IgCHJP4KN-SsqhD5jNgbXaMy-udRpxNTvbk%3D)**_
******************************************************[Help flip this seat>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e4lvemiMqq7lhXvj2-1Fr1CZ2MTMfqEndSwnE2ku00dR_Avn1X8veMtndeHNB7qwTshWsY0f1FmnNKq54LRasgR1FWJnJtQAxBjm4Y930cGl1TRvPyRoY0gaE1mCDM_n5vAn6aW2XsJWA0-HrwGWiZgLBz2JeuHoRNioCxklXkGfE%3D)******************************************************

******************************************************[Elect a fighter to the U.S. Senate>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e4AqdAET3pcMRV69ZzAc6sePWme1zwSALvlFtI8OyfWFm7ihihEHBozEMirrqCl0VoiEYuYAkFmNsosNaQsXhBYjdF4xWtsF341NMUUdmVq0UWzlQORPq4KqoMlW9w1Q-JjigzPmKjnE_8XlArPSLU3WHG5Sstg_i513hiTbJCrPM%3D)******************************************************
Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, I was there.
We fought in Afghanistan, I was there.

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation's reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to be able to look at my children and be able to tell them, _**["Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same."](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e4dvdWpr221KU8IFtBtp_QjT3UDL6y0eZDXwn_4YYgyR239HkD3l0qvPDPNnCPYumote6FPetRZpMF3hNsZPVECbowJ9Pzqv7VDgKGK-3rvozbaYjV18eoRpcL6bYzeFyXt2rnJgc1Zk04f4dBuBP_8bIpob3qOC_ME4XFzBfwxw0%3D)**_

**[But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it 's hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e47A5Wxs5k5HITHPQnfNoTV_o0V6NSzQI7JTtQ2jK-vN6mT6gdr0phkiPvZ2SmqWNLemlsxoaGz41v1mcI0PAtu72g4dBOlmcv6O7ThpBVHStmTzyBPmadfhbmYfjf0aN3-s6fgOW4DEU4BiyoRsivWFPAO6tlQgYarbDp20huprk%3D)**

So, Friend - that's what I'm fighting for. I'm fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren't made in vain.
******************************************************[Help flip this seat>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e4vA7o_DXhhaqvEUH8k8O0E0a2tsdCjTnJI8nwx6971i9h0QCdQaaGsEnLj5YH7E9255PW_5wcsf_WdcCLVNzzDGe04Dr9_MgdZhz29CPXHBY1twbRbEaEqGTBcIWQXGQfRYnT6IfaV0CYIOz7D_GxDiORIyn00s8G7cYRVp_m8Po%3D)******************************************************

******************************************************[Elect a fighter to the U.S. Senate>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=314b598705814bab99b8a056731bad8a&_e=g3gu3Aj1EnowXWv-sKY3zOqlWtPXaRAbqblHvZjHE8VgmyVspB10nuYHRmimG01kJxMyuYTduBh2k7lluBER0Gn7DhVrwQL_YIetkq6zhYUe-ZaIlFBu7amrx6iPRe4n4htb8qQhNUHqj5M3577nRlLuCqBqjLci8YxDN54sjVmjoKRyjeC4jgeA3_9PVrQq5MJ-SwFiFyaLEpQHVoajU6qZZdbd0yzaE3gYs3SWAHSAQPWsUHXUCRUf60j_jIoKvq330J-g19IpsxeABUaWKvJjx6t1xv1dRpxqFXVnZKM3pW4UIZRHxFZH8ioFh4e48bl89OJlRzaA--QulRbdsfD2t78GO41s_XiEpjYbPO3r0qa0fI8ViHj0Zjw1AzoGdEbqQULNixMdtxjs5j_8v86CtfT0qH4qYOYz7AEUBdbacFCuWgc5_IKJV-AdG_mpXiHoagokEe99H9MTEFZFDj25cJcItv_1q54f8l-MX-g%3D)******************************************************

clean_body: When I saw everything that we'd worked for in Afghanistan washed away in a matter of days, I decided to consider serving in government once again %recipient.md5hash% "It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn't an easy decision. I don't want to make money; Friend, As a former Navy SEAL and special forces veteran, I've seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife's service to our country, we've sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I'm proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [[many veterans like me]]() and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind - all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he'd pulled the country out of an "endless war." I'd sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I'd promised them that we weren't going to leave them behind. So, because of the promises we weren't able to keep to the people who'd sacrificed so much to help us combat evil. It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn't an easy decision. I've been wounded in service of our nation; I've lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. I'm reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana's U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes. We fought in Iraq, I was there. We fought in Afghanistan, I was there. And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation's reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times. I want to be able to look at my children and be able to tell them, So, Friend - that's what I'm fighting for. I'm fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren't made in vain. **************************************************************************************************** ****************************************************************************************************** For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | Paid for by the NRSC. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c279c92b746c4f97b6874ccc1a6e0e3e&_e=wNH0jOVDmeggQxy9eIm-dEUiBVLHtRzDlPmz5TawQzEZhNLNNOOQeh89sC_Vf4PxKS0dprxmsBIwj9Bf7WBthNjtvfdvSIykSEWTmOOPnFR10_H8M6DPjV_cid7DjVO9yeOih0cCNOz1CpyWjxJFrWWImIUB1t8GVGQ9_kkyhGgsxXKf3RS7cQv2BrEzoaPCFbr4RUM1UWVRCDb-jBt4dW3R8s4Alg5yG8WLkqUpDZay5gHxaUkZbDf-jMXACKlxUQSGe6yNAKci3YwIQntLGDxbwZxAjr4JjITxMbTQTF-3ul6AzCGXRPww_DeN9v50XoeF6MTjWCXsbl7FfEqoES2CQYQ4KdtEzdwAMexXU-kz20Mnx5zyIW567Vn1c8b9ZbMbiUeYirhyA82Nh3Sb7W1yaHe6-W6bSgJWCzb5Kh4%3D)

| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c279c92b746c4f97b6874ccc1a6e0e3e&_e=wNH0jOVDmeggQxy9eIm-dEUiBVLHtRzDlPmz5TawQzEZhNLNNOOQeh89sC_Vf4PxKS0dprxmsBIwj9Bf7WBthNjtvfdvSIykSEWTmOOPnFR10_H8M6DPjV_cid7DjVO9yeOih0cCNOz1CpyWjxJFrWWImIUB1t8GVGQ9_kkyhGgsxXKf3RS7cQv2BrEzoaPCFbr4RUM1UWVRCDb-jBt4dW3R8s4Alg5yG8WLkqUpDZay5gHxaUkZbDf-jMXACKlxUQSGe6yNAKci3YwIQntLGMvSn-VCoOswDVWCRVWwercGX8ZObcuLunk0H73dJII6DanNPOQVR_pMNBVWtbcFqbEeawVLr3tSaEsFrQ0Q-3xJQuwB2bnwqSfKkVhLFZx2_eSWAQwlOlXdNZeSI4L5i0YbK3w4wII9qBLSq8PzXEw%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c279c92b746c4f97b6874ccc1a6e0e3e&_e=wNH0jOVDmeggQxy9eIm-dEUiBVLHtRzDlPmz5TawQzEZhNLNNOOQeh89sC_Vf4PxKS0dprxmsBIwj9Bf7WBthNjtvfdvSIykSEWTmOOPnFR10_H8M6DPjV_cid7DjVO9yeOih0cCNOz1CpyWjxJFrWWImIUB1t8GVGQ9_kkyhGgsxXKf3RS7cQv2BrEzoaPCFbr4RUM1UWVRCDb-jBt4dW3R8s4Alg5yG8WLkqUpDZay5gHxaUkZbDf-jMXACKlxUQSGe6yNAKci3YwIQntLGGXks2w_KPj-bTF2t2xG7Da4qJUnmRSByKOMTnnfCHV4Ktd7PxYyF4-TbkHSnXVOdzvYNfiiIwKaqM9E4pkdUd-jCYIXRyY-5wGQ-TtxafvIyEsaeRGGoC79gufbNfYf9zVVz3bsCv16StkIO5vw2CA%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c279c92b746c4f97b6874ccc1a6e0e3e&_e=wNH0jOVDmeggQxy9eIm-dEUiBVLHtRzDlPmz5TawQzEZhNLNNOOQeh89sC_Vf4PxKS0dprxmsBIwj9Bf7WBthNjtvfdvSIykSEWTmOOPnFR10_H8M6DPjV_cid7DjVO9yeOih0cCNOz1CpyWjxJFrWWImIUB1t8GVGQ9_kkyhGgsxXKf3RS7cQv2BrEzoaPCFbr4RUM1UWVRCDb-jBt4dW3R8s4Alg5yG8WLkqUpDZay5gHxaUkZbDf-jMXACKlxUQSGe6yNAKci3YwIQntLGJW3UXtiW_0oae_9VNJ-qMVSAlQmbMQAkAdEZwGSJfEqGEByCUKhicsVB0Qho8gyJZhKyfa5e-RnsZ8XtSp6kAcczzTy-R-sxM6usf9ZyHOeNFORg-IsgJhjAYY9Y3XFnVTXwGL7197Mku_Wffnrk5k%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb6ca9719f344360aa685ebfde837fc7&_e=jROZWM22uu8o4DO70n8nJOnB_8FkhcfDft3bpUddrhsDfSdSPkpT-U4ALv8hgSHe4NBTlhZldBf3zhcib9-nJ7Zmf_KoXJ4hZT0ISs4HT_k40-ZbbiDckQ7Xlqc4OKXAn05DDAGaLkfY8uRWxNZLVwGsDu7-iBpwWPx4kFzMRmS55VeY-9EpxwnX9kWe6rP1ayg-Htb1eMPA4ziSHTX5QhA-L84TW2lOwXtzJ0klk23b_sXfjH6p_ESD_WBdFVQ26wJCGFtn3p1tgYLpkLuBtEwRC7bLHzIjPh4aBcX2wubVDwmfl12TBi3BZS19UyDQ3yuEKngmp8MexL3cRDJZGyvwLDoVaf4Fjk0KwZSeGdJlmshEJB8r-w0FYRdzXd6GkEY1ULLfdohCCK-0cQo-XA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb6ca9719f344360aa685ebfde837fc7&_e=jROZWM22uu8o4DO70n8nJOnB_8FkhcfDft3bpUddrhsDfSdSPkpT-U4ALv8hgSHe4NBTlhZldBf3zhcib9-nJ7Zmf_KoXJ4hZT0ISs4HT_k40-ZbbiDckQ7Xlqc4OKXAn05DDAGaLkfY8uRWxNZLVwGsDu7-iBpwWPx4kFzMRmS55VeY-9EpxwnX9kWe6rP1ayg-Htb1eMPA4ziSHTX5QhA-L84TW2lOwXtzJ0klk23b_sXfjH6p_ESD_WBdFVQ2O2WonbPAN-_vRSr0HwlF_iqQYiAEe1NeHdiNn1s3lbcnZdy8vnvCl4d8T453Ys-aVxbbvfBfu63juVHYpXEvgFNURAsscg3Aw7GEAuRYkcw5_vTpTvcVuHmW6WbJKxa247GB06elx4BhiRStMybRIA%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb6ca9719f344360aa685ebfde837fc7&_e=jROZWM22uu8o4DO70n8nJOnB_8FkhcfDft3bpUddrhsDfSdSPkpT-U4ALv8hgSHe4NBTlhZldBf3zhcib9-nJ7Zmf_KoXJ4hZT0ISs4HT_k40-ZbbiDckQ7Xlqc4OKXAn05DDAGaLkfY8uRWxNZLVwGsDu7-iBpwWPx4kFzMRmS55VeY-9EpxwnX9kWe6rP1ayg-Htb1eMPA4ziSHTX5QhA-L84TW2lOwXtzJ0klk23b_sXfjH6p_ESD_WBdFVQ2mFCpMz1jIgRJD5cfO_KcG0VXmNcqk8ZnPdffqI5-xA0rnO5LgryMiJBhsb4wInSRMPNvrKU_vEyTE6PVcAnDrcqJMYaRz5o0wsgjpNG6T4TXGjwyVqAON9yjFFjHoDaf3zTyyyOFkREk2XUQ5g-zmQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=eb6ca9719f344360aa685ebfde837fc7&_t=MPJ4dxN9Ydgunl_0fMbgp8aiWufECFePn6hYhFcq18wy4QBOA5nRFCVXK1VCOgsrbWJ_x6RSqnmnALwygYUzJNWt6fPnKfbbHRtCa7-E3DCkmBSR-of-a5-6M-pHvD8XLASls3qiJclRko3vuFaIFOKiSfWYVV9yfNFYluCTqqw%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb6ca9719f344360aa685ebfde837fc7&_e=oUczhYQnIQED0FhDDxP7lpAJ1EeFxsWNjcRmR2Mu5jb1Rj6ALjFmYT5CTIIkwGN7cVQ0j6DZWVtuJoQRbn-u45FkAayYPfzAXDcDOXCxF8o4xpFiFNyjjkKUxoSC5bnW09nx42gUnxVkTsa0rSEZPfJd0knDoE4P7G_3y9zN7cVp9foIRQv9RRdGqYCW3PM46loTGmrOf3Yl-EOoRA5qd3OOMdgJZrlAhcSNkEM_CDmWEHU1eOC_TglebYE7RC_ZdJWNpSC8vaShrcA_6gCdoA%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb6ca9719f344360aa685ebfde837fc7&_e=jROZWM22uu8o4DO70n8nJBQjak226ISDzCZrrjIRPaTRw0rxfEXzvAxMgvZmZslHxFlK92A0McZ0USW9m20dU9HpTspwa3KxeIwXNVFqVA-ewsuskrdEjaAO_USJsMhNcNqQehNhUeHldGVqDd5SonADeEaWlGSyk6qrd91k4TA7hOczy-D1XgrE20dLvxIkHtCXEhw2WyG3YUZs1RXWioS5UcHtx_6Y4dQIaly1jN4%3D)_

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Just about one year ago, I emailed patriots across the country about my client, Jesus Rivera.

Jesus is a Marine combat veteran and patriot.

On January 6, 2021, Jesus peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn’t protest.

He didn’t attack police or use harsh language.

He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids, and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies, even outright fraud.**

Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times, but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

**Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by FBI thugs.**

Then leftist District Judge Colleen Collar-Kottelly sentenced Jesus to 8 MONTHS in federal prison!

(Let me tell you, she’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.)

Well, Jesus is out of prison now.

And I’ve filed a NEW class action lawsuit for him and each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent update.

**This crucial new lawsuit can PROVE that the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. Their convictions can be THROWN OUT. Their prosecutions can be THROWN OUT.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime.**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And let me tell you, my critical new lawsuit can be a game changer.**

Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS ... and I can PROVE it in court!

This shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can put an innocent Marine veteran in prison for 8 months, they can do it to you and me, our families and friends, and our fellow Americans.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**[Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkj71urDAQhZ9m6ED2GOxLQXETRIpIUdqkiYx_FkfMmjVm0b59xGqVJu0338yco2mZg791oJ4AcQp2BUQQ_wHx8rFT2r7p9aX8jO_lRb5RcwzxGRDzbXG_5uNI5UiH-aCqL2wnvGV14TquGBOt4vivmDpXi1EgG_1oGHO-VY3kzLRWNxK5lbIIHTIUnPOWo0Cmqhatampbe-S88aOGmt3_VJpcCkbzNe86pRipMpGKuZtyXtZ7sAFw8Mk5G2nX2UxVctdrZSLgQDqFsytvTqdS--xSSWMZCcSwZfpa45aMA9H_0QDlIZCzYSMQfaQHMZoWHU7nY2l8sOzS4eyJA0pNcTtnED02Rerssod5DqtUULPTvY-J9BMAAP__Pnp9hA)**

Please give what you can right away!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch

clean_body: This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock #1 Survival Item of 2023 This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... "Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?" Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: | | Melanie D. I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it. ---|--- | Shirley C. I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much. ---|--- | Wing C. I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank. ---|--- | Richard G. It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much. ---|--- Featured reviews are from real customers. name: Tim Sheehey
subject: Everything was washed away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
When I saw everything that we'd worked for in Afghanistan washed away in a matter of days, I decided to consider serving in government once again
%recipient.md5_hash%
"It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn't an easy decision. I don't want to make money; _**[I don't want to be famous; I don't care to be someone important - but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice that it's taken to build our country."](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2A1sCYkzWLKwd75ZG067HtzDnOFoQfcpMxJUKEaohlA6VYOFTgZ-beHBFVK46dp25zQyidY11SLwUECH3WNU97ybgnlbuEZkNDq7gHBUIZFXJ5VTzXblm_VCs3EYmhvExYsxJtLi8WTcwAegsvfvzQtWnI4FH-X-GDrVmj3qVVRo%3D)**_

Friend,

As a former Navy SEAL and special forces veteran, I've seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife's service to our country, we've sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I'm proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2dbODpYOBFXkrESEIpFXz0t278puv9FanBUdkGauNsFg0nox2dtBGQ9IS0cehtKG3GJT8vsYOIhz45hhIl8f7_0swV5TT5OXgO7u9sMNzShq_xeYGwEtf3IU6h4zgt44wF-iDSg06igmwh_1krIZJiYODKSAyiYQ8pwpSzY7EjBs%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues _**[[many veterans like me]](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2UawxovdlgORZAMLhK3gSc8b53Zm3ghzfaAYdh6OerootiLKyOZ9w2cyXU-TuD5D68Fs4xq505_dduzX0cMyp-tYyT7rh3mYR-meC69Bye9PScWpo3L8iL-kNW_1q28DhBAMEUjdPqziG3NJmjkz_rP0cUxpuCowU5rPX7lEY2A0%3D)**_ and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally _**[sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2ie1RpMdGTmkrzknBpm-twfjNXq4zsCQc2egGFZf2kYXNs50F9FQlp54DY0ItWlJlEjfKtBIiG6_O77am-RqM454uyRQE2ov5bvLkAhJ6L1XvTemX28D11jCQnzAu_TFqyPxPN3s13iq8zGx1DDU_JGQ61oPzG751uQuU5Of2OBQ%3D)**_ so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**[I kept thinking to myself,"The adult will come in the room and say, 'Hey, this is a disaster; we're going to stop this.'"](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2cQPqymh-GGLIxm7n8H56Y6Vv1d21m73JueC6TRXSmuAFXxIiXOyCGaWMiJCDRGma0bCRPtS6nsx55wV1xe5eCr3B0xFP9vKwu1ckMO5wONBialD8JAIZmjIlgCP0yO-MJG44iIEkqbKRE-IBFscTmsW_O4HfuQWIbMTPmH7VEgc%3D)**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**[Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul's airport.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX29x-8W-Egr1arzNF8tb4AQvbRSmr2s-z30NDmymTUVAlXOSTQPuSnHeO9SqWOo18v9d38vTxR1du88Xb4vt29TvvCxby-jK4gHdOZSS5bpBFoNwtXzq-ybFtyxmAOvGZ8XtIO2D0I1-zmXFhbUOphbu1M_2Ox0HpeB7WHtWqPgXQ%3D)** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind - all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he'd pulled the country out of an "endless war."

I'd sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I'd promised them that we weren't going to leave them behind. So, _**[you can imagine the dishonor that I felt](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2t2dx-k8alYnZvB5HLmkg2kHhBIdpnDIXN3oKuOr1m-vDfQSP16EATNaH6KrqAXrMVmi-VqlIllE4m8BokNof9kFbXliz_0_Aotp_nNRGQy9xiSrAgEuRdW6uQBScAZESgC_dWSYSJwofzt-nq4bTpGN9W_3g-wciTpwixl_PR2g%3D)**_ because of the promises we weren't able to keep to the people who'd sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn't an easy decision. _**[I don't want to make money; I don't want to be famous; I don't care to be someone important - but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice that it's taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX22-2mgEwi95Fjpr8xh8ESzYvAPSuhPnHmP-YQ8Z0QuHNunuWLvP3midicLXw6-RH5-F9EjEg8VfyPYX8XkPpllSMlSp1_Uv1FqYxq-uIOP7zeSDyJ062Buskn6DCfouaXaaDEe-GCUNqAE1atBLYiuFKBpLtJwTkzAVY83kZ8yhg%3D)**_

**[Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX25pmQIwbZjwKQoTphnHNeG0w7wSSGmr9LwO9Nno4GCnRNObaco3tKhgP6gbULK1a9lqiq_w8AUxuiTdzIpAqu5GubZp6IUh1MP1F1G65luD86qTve_B9QCeoMLUfbdFcBjgeToDFkRTPSsoWuUNFnIuG1lDVmhRUMcVQ4Vn6phww%3D)** I've been wounded in service of our nation; I've lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

I'm reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana's U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, _**[I'm going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2dOnAF-v8ZzlhYX8qNXwlEDQO7m63Uu0gfF3xs0k4iFsy5xaabLdGhztzkOmKCMExWqL_0MTSIj-Cha_8c4_nfpBU5nAU4ToelAXWW2Cz6Ova2mTdZ8tYgSY2eCVX6ze8EcP3mRbX2bn-EAkdR9Ry9S8OUCz4FH0PNbl3uk3vPT0%3D)**_
******************************************************[Help flip this seat>>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2u-xcz3nDuV_Nu5UMtGyYGUFHDhYEsk-F0r9YP3jFfr1Ddo6NUD-1VEssMCnSXgwnjjtJazx1xMPUu1nSBlfpKIV5Sij3rlrTfifv0ZqjB03m-XIlJxdg65gi_uG3KydADCi4r1Xxo90yNkaFH7klk8KPLoh-Qz4dSCDl3Knqbqc%3D)******************************************************

******************************************************[Elect a fighter to the U.S. Senate>>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2kK4DEp979BalSD6jG209l6bkYmmeZTGhIkl4jCqFmZKBVWIpnY3TKcZK7cM3UA4rtea8mLA9L6JtauR20w2PdlNCiHGKEidtoMsXoTPYDveehK8Ls6wHwO4_SYJbibMZ-1g4J3yWWjyo18HXWeOitMMKsYRUB4y7bn5IqLqqDHw%3D)******************************************************
Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, I was there.
We fought in Afghanistan, I was there.

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation's reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to be able to look at my children and be able to tell them, _**["Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same."](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2bWaDbbP6hc1LbM3_dipsl-KokM8TOyFW6SYsDnuv-ivcdDXbiEvadXhWa3EXcln8AC3icsaGaUOU8Zrhov8xAnNE1HpfjWmqNo2qz3lPgzcfJh5y4o29nt7Qs92oWift9CzSXc721PrubxlzZN-9aRv9TYbyzknGkfvm11giOFA%3D)**_

**[But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it 's hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e5618b336149a8a5ed40a0e0a7cba0&_e=IrMfuWlgd_T0Lqc2AD-JWdO9OCLcWVEpaUZLjQy5RZNOewpw7UexW1wxUeJgHCpmCwRyWqeY5b1WTYypSVnqEnX0hMa7BZEKcvLyGSVNdtPOiu7D2ToH9ePgKmnUvF-ZTsDEolPdn49wL7RCUs9AdHDc5XqyPGD69ipiDaTixRPfYhyvqbdacRH7poD4q8EosSTBHvLjMDtimS_C5lyI-ERpaiHgwSmLh_XQdJYilhlNCNga8pZzsnxjkK5WAvMhYIyVJHB5bxN5dULGzT7G9KsGEhSR9WkpF7Lx0emG72Kd06DVBRVmTrQOgGh48JX2ym9F6SePFi4RiSu8dWBl3BY9drt7184yPH26GRihFCGagVsCMTkPP5sUwUH315KLuUbIpyo6QSwKM4kYtgxQQ5OKFMk9XgUX_DZba8AxAXdcEVrTzoyrHTb76GDifHFO4kaVxvoTNrHOTkqHAgl6T1rfAsE0RzahBK227L6gwOE%3D)**

So, Friend - that's what I'm fighting for. I'm fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren't made in vain.

clean_body: When I saw everything that we'd worked for in Afghanistan washed away in a matter of days, I decided to consider serving in government once again %recipient.md5hash% "It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn't an easy decision. I don't want to make money; Friend, As a former Navy SEAL and special forces veteran, I've seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife's service to our country, we've sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I'm proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [[many veterans like me]]() and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind - all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he'd pulled the country out of an "endless war." I'd sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I'd promised them that we weren't going to leave them behind. So, because of the promises we weren't able to keep to the people who'd sacrificed so much to help us combat evil. It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn't an easy decision. I've been wounded in service of our nation; I've lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. I'm reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana's U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes. We fought in Iraq, I was there. We fought in Afghanistan, I was there. And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation's reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times. I want to be able to look at my children and be able to tell them, So, Friend - that's what I'm fighting for. I'm fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren't made in vain. **************************************************************************************************** ****************************************************************************************************** For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.NRSC.org Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

| It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms stack up so you can decide on the fit for you.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fcdc809f4ca420d9479eb7ffcde685d&_e=nYnGJQQmmApWvw6HBKFAZr3fmwf4xoEyIcg_jkd1fhUnxR5KZq3HmEzTPQZiT1GJs3co21LIe3fCDxCXyCbaDJr87kn6GKMUI4G5tcvNiYUfz0yxC-hQ9pCr0kRl48Z5hUAB--5Cmr_Q0Oy-B05gm2ZFH5QofxFfk9_u2p2hKzi71Cx6DsyUTUpgaKJ0l8z0MA1y93r8QmduhKSVNFeXdsMVp3DtuqqTddBSiIN1oOes6Mc4GdTx3nQjdOwvKxDqInT8yZdH_51IxCdq0u1VT1B8DtRsD4qjQTdKkbkCQ7iFlRQDoDW1X64h1NG7IAPowzfW4ApbwxsA3wprXGhp5CNopnWLQlx8NFReSuOFeWYroZVFALUZt0cioFeDXtgzpJ012lmLfL_idUzFG5Z1TKttWVLxZslcZrybRNPBbN4uErntU4CWdiAIr_zzqK9qGKwziP354n68Wb7Xt2zSsrVe0lcvaFgyrSHlCg1C_Lo%3D)
### Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds.

Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn't usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models.

Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. [Learn how the fees compare here.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fcdc809f4ca420d9479eb7ffcde685d&_e=nYnGJQQmmApWvw6HBKFAZr3fmwf4xoEyIcg_jkd1fhUnxR5KZq3HmEzTPQZiT1GJs3co21LIe3fCDxCXyCbaDJr87kn6GKMUI4G5tcvNiYUfz0yxC-hQ9pCr0kRl48Z5hUAB--5Cmr_Q0Oy-B05gm2ZFH5QofxFfk9_u2p2hKzi71Cx6DsyUTUpgaKJ0l8z0MA1y93r8QmduhKSVNFeXdsMVp3DtuqqTddBSiIN1oOes6Mc4GdTx3nQjdOwvKxDqInT8yZdH_51IxCdq0u1VT1B8DtRsD4qjQTdKkbkCQ7iFlRQDoDW1X64h1NG7IAPowzfW4ApbwxsA3wprXGhp5CcleB5fF2xkVGvI7h1v17hzYlG4HMCxY02RfWeFCHDPoiV93psPoyD9HRzJa34bUXSlfVFmpGZxUKWw0d55g6nxgGXiQa7OhRc4S0c0OyXPxo9tNVXwtgCzv_mrStRKskIr990ZAjaNw42kabsZRIc%3D)

### How to Speak With a Financial Advisor

If you're interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That's why SmartAsset created a [free tool](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fcdc809f4ca420d9479eb7ffcde685d&_e=nYnGJQQmmApWvw6HBKFAZnSGeuJmcVx93OouaV8ge2Y8ZJ6ALM-bRIk88fji2XVi_y3pk0c2dNfPiXbSkSklKKXndZqKKM9LfCHvTIgTEIjzQ6PxQpRzxmcIg6ckISoDIv7ixabAthFrOWLsuUmPmmHGt-rGuDSrCyAI-HaJfxh7q9_hNQx8oWGXOKfJdmqk2UfkZO1eAjiYfePnN-3F8q8Fn3t16Fzx7falHtTtOnV57uGj31QRp77ULTYi-ttQV4ae7se7O4Ii64YrePLeV60j5weFmVtHWhVICH_JcnPjhmK3Og2gsIt-KwTW5r7uofCQ5GEN360EiqQHktqYh5Q7sqGA5bTK9vm1TTibiq12nZgGNgpSlz6ARwZYMYcsahAB-ZwDKo7boY0-7yUUvOaPYAf3MCn2r8eWrs49_5AO__CZsTMTnfIFRjFkzBtOXFqOKL-gxtKHl9uWfu8QWw%3D%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.

clean_body: It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firm. %recipient.md5hash% | | | | | Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab | "Take Retirement Quiz" | Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free! | | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET | | | It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services. However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds. Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn't usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models. Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. How to Speak With a Financial Advisor If you're interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That's why SmartAsset created a to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process. While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement. | | Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool Get retirement ready. body:
and together, we’re continuing our commitment until we have fair maps nationwide.
|
---

We’ve had a busy start to our month; here’s what we’re celebrating lately.
➡️ **Virginia** ushered in a wave of legislators committed to transparency and fairness in their service to the people after more fair maps were put in place. ➡️ In a huge win for democracy and fairness in **Pennsylvania** , voters rejected a candidate for state supreme court who denied the 2020 election results and instead elected a fair and careful judge. ➡️ **Ohio** Issue 1 passed! This win shows the power in numbers that Ohioians have shown, and they’ve let their lawmakers know that they want their reproductive rights and freedoms.
---
Our collective efforts as a team produce results that are democracy-saving, and we couldn't do it without you. When we’re met with lawmakers who don’t support fair maps, reproductive rights, or basic freedoms within our democracy, there is no time to back down. And the results from just last week show exactly that. Our strength as a movement is powerful, and together, we’re continuing our commitment until we have fair maps nationwide.
[**Our mid-month deadline is approaching, and we’re hitting the ground running to continue our work to prevent, propel, and protect fair maps. When you support grassroots movements like ours, you’ll be sitting in the front row of our mission as democracy calls on our aid for its safekeeping. Will you donate to All On The Line today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73613118/439098145/-2027006038?refcode=20231119_AOTL_F_MMWins_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1YmUxMThjLWRiODYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KINtFkS1Ooa-R_o_UUJXa3_e84VDLAGD6rDIDgrFBQE=)

We’ve seen lawmakers challenge our democracy, and we’ve seen what happens when people like you respond; we win. And our progress will stand protected as we continue onto the next challenge within our democracy. Pro-democracy advocates and policies are crucial to our next steps in our mission for fairness. Wall Street Lines Up To Back Nikki Haley’s 2024 Bid

Wall Street financiers are looking to Nikki Haley as the candidate to
pull the 2024 Republican nomination away from former President Donald
Trump, according to The Wall Street Journal. Haley is currently
placing third in national polling at 9.5% behind Gov. Ron DeSantis of
Florida at 14.3% and Trump at 59.7%, according to Real Clear Politics.

PRE-ORDER TODAY!

By choosing to wrap your gifts in this future presidential paper, you'll be getting us one step closer to tying a neat bow on Joe Biden's presidency. We have the drive, the energy, and the spirit. And you can order yours here!

We only have 250 rolls! For $25, we can reserve one for you before they're gone.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c26fabca292bc5bf3b7fb516fdaad2efef777754cc539a3d633e479a77228fd788c42258b32704d0faff662efcfc3505761bf6a195c882cb83ee952c996a4c44
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c26fabca292bc5bff08e7bc5d24c92fba3570cdee0e5cc74dfd35c2b23f6f5dc0eb650ebec8744530ecb42183058665c5cc629cf02ac03e29b9e311b29b07edf

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c26fabca292bc5bff08e7bc5d24c92fba3570cdee0e5cc74dfd35c2b23f6f5dc0eb650ebec8744530ecb42183058665c5cc629cf02ac03e29b9e311b29b07edf

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mxaqoBCgD3E_40wp7Un0eg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPLvcP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMTAxMjNfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjMxMTE5VwNzcGNCCmVV3BFaZaTn-eNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mxaqoBCgD3E_40wp7Un0eg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPLvcP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMTAxMjNfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjMxMTE5VwNzcGNCCmVV3BFaZaTn-eNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mxaqoBCgD3E_40wp7Un0eg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPLvcP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMTAxMjNfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjMxMTE5VwNzcGNCCmVV3BFaZaTn-eNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mxaqoBCgD3E_40wp7Un0eg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnPLvcP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMTAxMjNfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjMxMTE5VwNzcGNCCmVV3BFaZaTn-eNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---

body:
Think about everything that’s at stake in next year’s elections...
#

Peter -
Take a minute right now and think about everything that’s at stake in next year’s elections, from expanding voting rights to protecting abortion access.
Think about the other extreme, too: flipping Kyrsten Sinema’s seat back to Democrats and keeping Kari Lake out of the Senate.
And remember: to do all those things Ruben has to win in Arizona.
He can. We’ve built a strong campaign. But he needs a big team behind him chipping in to do it.
[**So if you can, make your first donation of $3 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today to help take this seat back from Kyrsten Sinema and defeat Kari Lake.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231119-1-f&t=1&akid=1453%2E734936%2E1wOs6S)
