name: (2) Adam Schiff
subject: My faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Dear Peter,

I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me about a photo that — well I just had to share it with you.

Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73621719/439115998/-178630418?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231119_1_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0ZjIzZjY3LWU3ODYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qcM4CzfgBXyhvsFUAtF6Z3cWTy8nAS-qW0RwAmLUyZg=)
I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith.

Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause.

**Before I go any further, and while I still have your attention, I have to ask** — [ will you click this link and pitch in a few dollars to split between Defeat Republicans and my campaign?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73621721/439116001/-178630418?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231119_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0ZjIzZjY3LWU3ODYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qcM4CzfgBXyhvsFUAtF6Z3cWTy8nAS-qW0RwAmLUyZg=) If you are not ready yet or need more convincing, please read on. I have lots to share and more to say. I think you’ll like it.

I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman, and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company.

We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school.

This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.)

While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day. In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.

These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office.

And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours. That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day.

[If these priorities resonate with you, I’m asking for your help to continue that work by chipping in $15 to split between Defeat Republicans and my campaign.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73621722/439116002/-178630418?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231119_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0ZjIzZjY3LWU3ODYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qcM4CzfgBXyhvsFUAtF6Z3cWTy8nAS-qW0RwAmLUyZg=)

clean_body: | Dear Peter, I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me about a photo that — well I just had to share it with you. Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah: = I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith. Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause. Before I go any further, and while I still have your attention, I have to ask — = If you are not ready yet or need more convincing, please read on. I have lots to share and more to say. I think you’ll like it. I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman, and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company. We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school. This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.) While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day. In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God. These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office. And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours. That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = = Hopefully, this photo helped brighten your day and gave you a bit more insight into why I have dedicated my life to this cause. Shalom. Adam Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=827%2E135344%2EBRMR6v).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.
clean_body: Team, We didn't want you to miss this headline from Business Insider: For years, Betsy DeVos has funded candidates to push her policies at the national level. And now she's made it clear who she wants as Michigan's next U.S. Senator to advocate for her burn-it-down education policies in Washington. As of September 30th, Betsy DeVos and her family contributed $46,200 to Mike Rogers' campaign in a single day – and this is only the beginning of Mike Rogers receiving huge sums of money from Republican megadonors. So we’re getting prepared, which is why we're looking for a lot of donations for Elissa Slotkin today to ensure our campaign has the resources it needs to fight back and protect this seat. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks so much for being a part of this campaign. \- Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

name: LTC (Ret.) Alexander Vindman
subject: Humbly asking for your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| It wasn't just me who blew the whistle on President Trump. It was me and my brother, Eugene
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4503%2E5257348%2Ea-T9qG)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_vindman.t5vKbb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20231119_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4503%2E5257348%2Ea-T9qG)
It’s Alexander Vindman.
Most of you know that I’m an Army Veteran. And most of you know who I am because of Trump’s first impeachment trial.
But it wasn't just me who blew the whistle on President Trump. It was me and my brother Eugene — a former Colonel in the U.S. Army — who was the senior ethics official at the National Security Council in the White House at the time.
Today, Eugene is running for Congress in Virginia where he will continue the fight to defend our democracy and the Constitution both of us swore to protect.
But he can't do it alone.
I am with him – there is nothing more important to me right now. So if you believe Congress needs more members with the integrity and courage to put service to country first, I am asking:
**[Can I count on you to use this link to contribute to split a donation between my brother Eugene Vindman's campaign for Congress in Virginia and Adam Schiff’s campaign for Senate in California? They need all of us to stand with them, like they have stood strong when taking on Trump.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_vindman.t5vKbb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20231119_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4503%2E5257348%2Ea-T9qG)**
When I testified before Congress during the first impeachment of Donald Trump, I did it to stand up for our democracy.
My brother and I were both attacked by Trump. Both of our careers in the Army suffered and ended before their time.
Since both of us stood up to Trump, Republicans’ abuse of power and attacks on our democracy have only grown.
Most recently, extremists in Congress chose Mike Johnson to be Speaker of the House – the “mastermind” of the attempt to overturn the 2020 election and undermine our democracy.
We need more members in the House who are willing to stand up to extremism and who are prepared to hold corrupt officials accountable.
We need members with the courage to put their constituents first.
My brother Eugene has defended this nation throughout his career, he stood up to Trump, and he will do that in Congress. Adam Schiff does that. But they can't do it without your help:
**[Can you please use this link to contribute directly to my brother Eugene Vindman's campaign for Congress in Virginia and Adam Schiff’s campaign for Senate in California? Eugene and Adam have stood with us and for the Constitution, now they need our help.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_vindman.t5vKbb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20231119_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4503%2E5257348%2Ea-T9qG)**
Eugene’s congressional campaign is extremely important to me. Thank you in advance for donating to Eugene and Adam’s campaign today. This means a lot to me personally.
Alexander Vindman
[DONATE NOW](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_vindman.t5vKbb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20231119_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4503%2E5257348%2Ea-T9qG)
---

Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=4503%2E5257348%2Ea-T9qG)

_**Fellow American - I am all in for President Trump.**_

I endorse him wholeheartedly, and believe to my core that we have to make Biden a one-term president.

[**DONATE TO SPEAKER JOHNSON & PRESIDENT TRUMP ➞**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f390320278244b5b873a8ba35a0a27be&_e=fho_jGpUF23tRntIBfPQ4sLg3byNnZ_vAKFAXOr9bvCZz9dkd_ALo-yFIbgSmCVWgXjlmAGRUL5X37AiZxLBp4uEh-XtUjc2nJ-n3_-ANEFX6zcMrN1P3OEzhWHfGHgK07qs2VfyrIkJKP0GX6DhECeLo6cy1UrIVfHVZy0ThsUnENljQKfcB2yd4eVmZiqpO0q_ortYkEladaDTAEOSEOa27trjKzQLJEdhxlt6fxESb83oZrfKfF5M7TMEEhp-QxNt8MyhctAfXq_fOCEyGaOARnjMH_bn-yvn1y9FtTX7c3_pV6p1W5GLTBBGcAuaKD9T7Gm5mlOqZqAByD-nHNaZq91jvzDCTsW7hkgUA8zATZD3yHmvtIjy5jZAHrSa)
Under President Trump, we built the greatest economy in U.S. history, took concrete steps to secure our southern border, projected strength abroad, and fought back against the radical Left EVERY DAY – **no matter what they threw at us.**

President Trump made America great again, _and I know we can do it once more._

[**But it will take an army of conservative warriors stepping forward in this fight.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f390320278244b5b873a8ba35a0a27be&_e=fho_jGpUF23tRntIBfPQ4sLg3byNnZ_vAKFAXOr9bvCZz9dkd_ALo-yFIbgSmCVWgXjlmAGRUL5X37AiZxLBp4uEh-XtUjc2nJ-n3_-ANEFX6zcMrN1P3OEzhWHfGHgK07qs2VfyrIkJKP0GX6DhECeLo6cy1UrIVfHVZy0ThsUnENljQKfcB2yd4eVmZiqpO0q_ortYkEladaDTAEOSEOa27trjKzQLJEdhxlt6fxFGYTsDbQm5L8hJrrGHIRG2dCWEGyXaAhyIx6aSZQpEVmA4AB-AfaMA09NFAdg8CsyfMeuZd_q0LtuQwm-ZyFkJ-f12RLMcrB5Sae-GTxXtLBk0xsQYnOU9cO7Z2rXpcIZbBSyUuXSGSaufvGEIMXxC)

[**Democrats are going to call on every big-Liberal donor to keep President Trump OUT of the arena,_and we are going to need to have the resources to respond._**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f390320278244b5b873a8ba35a0a27be&_e=fho_jGpUF23tRntIBfPQ4sLg3byNnZ_vAKFAXOr9bvCZz9dkd_ALo-yFIbgSmCVWgXjlmAGRUL5X37AiZxLBp4uEh-XtUjc2nJ-n3_-ANEFX6zcMrN1P3OEzhWHfGHgK07qs2VfyrIkJKP0GX6DhECeLo6cy1UrIVfHVZy0ThsUnENljQKfcB2yd4eVmZiqpO0q_ortYkEladaDTAEOSEOa27trjKzQLJEdhxlt6fxF6txuhj35aEsnniBzUEYgsiNJ-rFQeKwH0bKoqotoqq4Oe8sYu3tiuFOqpY3RjV_uxvhTzkC0Afl_vofXYlhNweja4fA_BVqWR5VGulagx-AJeyGVmUg9Frb56erxjimAZRvvNJ1kwy65jtlIhXw9X)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: 2023 November e-newsletter
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2023 November e-newsletter
News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County.
---
|
---
|
---
| **San Mateo County welcomes Chinese President Xi and President Biden for historic diplomatic meeting**
---
| Dear friends,
San Mateo County and the Filoli Estate will be memorialized forever for bringing President Joe Biden and Chinese President Xi Jinping together in a historic meeting Wednesday, Nov. 15 to ease tensions between the world’s two largest economies.

Our two nations need to find diplomatic solutions on issues including climate change, countering the fentanyl crisis, approaching artificial intelligence and restoring communication between our two militaries.
---
As a San Mateo County Supervisor, I am proud our incredible county and the historic Filoli Estate was the setting to bring our two nations closer together after President Xi and President Biden haven’t met face-to-face in a year.

As wars wage across the world, China and the United States met the moment in San Mateo County to work toward ending the downward spiral in diplomatic relations our two nations have faced.
---
| **San Mateo County stands united against hate** The San Mateo County Board of Supervisors declared Nov. 12-18 as United Against Hate Week at its meeting Tuesday, Nov. 14 in a proclamation I cosponsored with Board President Dave Pine.

The United Against Hate campaign was created by civic leaders in the Bay Area in 2017 in direct response to the sharp rise in expressions of hate in our communities, and United Against Hate Week emerged specifically from a poster campaign in response to white supremacist rallies that occurred in Berkeley and San Francisco in 2017.

The proclamation was presented to Kalimah Salahuddin, Vice President of the Jefferson Union High School Board of Trustees and board member on the San Mateo County Reach Coalition who spoke on dismantling systemic bias and long-standing barriers to access across our county.

United Against Hate Week is when communities, groups, individuals work together against hate, restore respect and civil discourse, embrace the strength of diversity and build inclusive and equitable safe communities for all.

A special thanks to the Office of Community Affairs Director Emma Gonzalez and the Immigrant Services Team for their continued work to ensure San Mateo County is a welcoming county for all - residents and visitors alike.
---
---
| **
Cities embrace projects to improve lives of older adults** If you wish to see and understand positive social change in a community, take a look at the Age-Friendly Cities initiative being undertaken in San Mateo County in partnership with the Center for Age-Friendly Excellence (CAFE).

I introduced the concept to the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors in March 2019 and want to enlighten you on the progress San Mateo County cities have made with support of Measure K funding over the past four years to become certified age friendly by the World Health Organization.

CAFE has provided expert technical assistance to the participating cities in San Mateo including Brisbane. CAFE organizes representative city task forces; conducts comprehensive qualitative and quantitative research on unmet needs; explores and leverages existing community strengths and offers policy and program recommendations.

With that, I am proud to announce that the cities of Pacifica, Daly City, Brisbane, Half Moon Bay, South San Francisco, Millbrae, Burlingame, San Mateo, Belmont, San Carlos, Hillsborough, Foster City, East Palo Alto, Redwood City and Colma are all certified with San Bruno and Atherton on track to be certified by the end of December.
---
| **
Grant supports business resource center for Daly City/Colma Chamber of Commerce**

I am honored to announce a significant one-time grant of district-discretionary Measure K funds of $75,000 to the Daly City/Colma Chamber of Commerce. This strategic investment will not only sustain its crucial operations but also establish a pivotal business resource center.

This initiative holds the potential to catalyze substantial economic development for the residents and businesses of Daly City and Colma, marking a substantial step toward a brighter, more prosperous future for businesses in these two cities.
---
| **
$200,000 grant awarded for Brisbane Community Pool energy upgrade**

I am delighted to announce I awarded the city of Brisbane a $200,000 grant in Measure K district-discretionary funds to replace the aging boiler at the community pool—a significant consumer of fossil fuels—with cutting-edge electric heat pump water heaters.

This project embodies a shared commitment to a healthier community and a cleaner, more sustainable future. This project was guided by the insights of the 2018 Zero Net Energy Study conducted in collaboration with the Bay Area Renewable Energy Network.

The transition to electric heat pump water heaters not only aligns with our environmental goals but also sets an example for other communities striving to reduce their carbon footprint.

It is through collaborative efforts that we can transform challenges into opportunities and create a lasting legacy of sustainability for generations to come.
---
| **Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d26ea8f9d5&e=c0babbc643). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org). ** **
---
| **Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=85278f652d&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=61196859dd&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=acbf486044&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 **Interns wanted to join our team **

We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d43f458c4e&e=c0babbc643). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org) In friendship,
David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=98d3b9e97d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=98d3b9e97d).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&afl=1)

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73628504/439140646/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njg3ZjYzMi1mMTg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAfphWv5E5hbh7AL071hpVQj2ZmPUSwaHXA6ivAuMto=&emci=98638909-5785-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5687f632-f186-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6787172) Folks, Americans everywhere are preparing for what will likely be the most expensive Thanksgiving dinner in recent history. In fact, everything seems to be more expensive these days. Groceries, childcare, rent, car prices, and much more have all seen dramatic increases in price recently. **But you know what hasn’t increased? The federal minimum wage.** Minimum wage has sat at $7.25 per hour since 2009. And even though many states have increased their own minimum wage, the fact remains that there are still tens of thousands of hardworking Americans making poverty wages. Let’s put it this way: If you’re making $7.25 per hour, a pack of toilet paper likely costs more than one hour of your labor. Yeah. We think it’s time for a change, too. [Will you stand with us in calling on Congress to _finally_ raise the minimum wage?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73628505/439140647/742950140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njg3ZjYzMi1mMTg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAfphWv5E5hbh7AL071hpVQj2ZmPUSwaHXA6ivAuMto=&emci=98638909-5785-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5687f632-f186-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6787172)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: boots on the ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
a personal invite
| | |
---
Team, I've spent these past few months traveling all across Florida, meeting voters like you up and down our beautiful state.
It's been an honor to hear your stories, learn about the issues impacting your communities, and strategize solutions to the problems that matter most. Every day of this campaign, I grow more and more proud to call this state home.
This is a 100% grassroots campaign. That's why I'm taking the time to meet with voters so that we can build a ground-up, truly grassroots strategy. **I wish I could sit down and talk with every single voter personally. But since that's not possible (we're a BIG team!), [I'm doing the next best thing by inviting you to participate in my new Boots on the Ground Priorities Survey. Please, will you submit your responses before this survey closes at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73629134/439142621/1714337816?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk325-su-fl&refcode=jtk325-su-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBhYTdjZTMtZjE4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5TpSRbrh2ixmxyurIrb4hS-tMbsTS5m00cPteFT58c0=&emci=6850f838-a485-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=20aa7ce3-f186-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=3969733)**
| | [JOIN: Boots on the Ground Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73629135/439142622/1714337816?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk325-su-fl&refcode=jtk325-su-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBhYTdjZTMtZjE4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5TpSRbrh2ixmxyurIrb4hS-tMbsTS5m00cPteFT58c0=&emci=6850f838-a485-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=20aa7ce3-f186-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=3969733)

Your feedback is so valuable to my team as our race really gets underway, so I'm incredibly grateful for your help here.

Thank you so much,

Debbie

clean_body: a personal invite | | | Team, I've spent these past few months traveling all across Florida, meeting voters like you up and down our beautiful state. It's been an honor to hear your stories, learn about the issues impacting your communities, and strategize solutions to the problems that matter most. Every day of this campaign, I grow more and more proud to call this state home. This is a 100% grassroots campaign. That's why I'm taking the time to meet with voters so that we can build a ground-up, truly grassroots strategy. I wish I could sit down and talk with every single voter personally. But since that's not possible (we're a BIG team!), | | Your feedback is so valuable to my team as our race really gets underway, so I'm incredibly grateful for your help here. Thank you so much, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Food insecurity and the holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Thanksgiving is a time to express gratitude with our families and celebrate community with our neighbors. But for many Texans, Thanksgiving is a time of added stress and fear due to **food insecurity.**

**According to Feeding Texas, 1 in 8 Texans do not have access to sufficient food to meet their basic needs.** (That’s nearly 4 million people, more than the combined population of Dallas and Houston). In every Texas county, children, seniors, veterans, and working families do not have consistent access to food for an active, comfortable lifestyle.

**The holidays worsen the effects of food insecurity.** Children don’t have access to school lunch programs. Lower temperatures may mean making a choice between paying the heating bill or buying groceries. Delving even deeper, southern regions of the United States with higher rates of Black, Hispanic, and immigrant populations face food insecurity as a result of systemic inequality that has led to disparities in policies, wealth, and employment.

**I am running for Congress to end food insecurity and ensure that all of our neighbors in TX-32 can thrive. By practicing an attitude of gratitude, we all can help elevate our community.**

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Joe Manchin ISN'T running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek, here's the situation.
Joe Manchin isn't running for Senate. That makes defending our *tiny* majority in the Senate even tougher next year.
With West Virginia almost certainly a lock for the GOP, Mitch McConnell just needs to flip one more state to win a majority -- _and that could be Pennsylvania._ 😨
We beat the odds and elected John Fetterman as the 51st Democratic vote last year. We know that if this team comes together, we can beat the 2024 odds and defend our Senate majority. But it will take all of us. 💪
**[John is ready to do all he can, but he needs our help. Can you rush a contribution to power his work + help us fight off far right attacks today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231119-1?refcode=em20231119-1-8672&refcode2=8672_434096_kVVJzn&akid=8672%2E434096%2EkVVJzn)**

Next year, there will be million$ in dirty corporate PAC money spent in battleground states. We're fighting an uphill battle — so we need a ton of grassroots support *now* to have a chance to win.
**[That's why we're reaching out. Please, chip in any amount today to help us keep our campaign going + stand up to the GOP.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231119-1?refcode=em20231119-1-8672&refcode2=8672_434096_kVVJzn&akid=8672%2E434096%2EkVVJzn)**
Thanks for everything you do.
-- Team Fetterman

Peter -

**I have always known the importance of a good team.** _It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day._

It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America.

**I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on.** [**Today I am asking you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=375be607e508409f8896cfddcbbe4653&_e=JYQ2GF3NUe2ieZg1AEOIuCLmOnvy11ag6D9akLcfjpLePowa3YktbXkabcON2ZmbbOrqJ6F8rQLS40N_DNP9IRqLpja3XfX05wfzyg0rBZzUZli0n9VHhMlHV0K6QX9-05FVY7y0QaAX3B2mkaXaBzdDQSuPrhu7T7cp54GgN72jAcXPesLBEMNAMtBZDQ9Okr9OIpYF_yRXQWcP0Da-7yjw0AKGMeKdHiTIVhduOSG05ybZveGRiDV9gV5OEfYR7HgRkIjcQ6mDk85oWsRPyGl4tJ0IwnRIW9wlWVmwn5dKc85ed1D4TiE_10E2W3ZNCkfteSvd_G_iAglKR5PxOUbQkXW5Sdp_3_IH9wlK_LAbIiJ9kCL2CfWBwn4Ljd8NmXRVfurgnDPkvgUijbq0Q74zSiyQBXlBnosEsh_rCtI%3D)
[** JOIN SPEAKER JOHNSON’S TEAM > **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=375be607e508409f8896cfddcbbe4653&_e=JYQ2GF3NUe2ieZg1AEOIuCLmOnvy11ag6D9akLcfjpLePowa3YktbXkabcON2ZmbbOrqJ6F8rQLS40N_DNP9IRqLpja3XfX05wfzyg0rBZzUZli0n9VHhMlHV0K6QX9-05FVY7y0QaAX3B2mkaXaBzdDQSuPrhu7T7cp54GgN72jAcXPesLBEMNAMtBZDQ9Okr9OIpYF_yRXQWcP0Da-7yjw0AKGMeKdHiTIVhduOSG05ybZveGRiDV9gV5OEfYR7HgRkIjcQ6mDk85oWsRPyNJqX94DzI8-8tnmKaxBEmKVFZ3ytVcgK8NjoS2q3Fk6GtSkRRFfnHIuz-bZq6LDzGAAWJpJHiUm3X0AeBqh7POV7CupHdReLlAX7_VYxUOz9TXgUgsdLC6KMppAvGVvyjJZj0MBtuYQ6GFKKtJi01Q%3D)
**Why I need your help:** _"Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."_ As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. This is especially true TODAY – as the Left is determined to dismantle the very foundations our great nation was founded upon.

Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to _"re-engineer"_ – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on.

**The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country.**

Their actions speak louder than their words, [**and I need your help to fight back and protect our republic.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=375be607e508409f8896cfddcbbe4653&_e=JYQ2GF3NUe2ieZg1AEOIuCLmOnvy11ag6D9akLcfjpLePowa3YktbXkabcON2ZmbbOrqJ6F8rQLS40N_DNP9IRqLpja3XfX05wfzyg0rBZzUZli0n9VHhMlHV0K6QX9-05FVY7y0QaAX3B2mkaXaBzdDQSuPrhu7T7cp54GgN72jAcXPesLBEMNAMtBZDQ9Okr9OIpYF_yRXQWcP0Da-7yjw0AKGMeKdHiTIVhduOSG05ybZveGRiDV9gV5OEfYR7HgRkIjcQ6mDk85oWsRPyGEtnWeGFuPQCz7MUDVYSPlQRiJsSRwG4SBuuGnswJ_Fz2ZDlgRv08IXno0Qpc8cQzXancpQhiFF-N_BVVpU7G-K6S_Vj5cU0gvIImSW7TUIgujrh9GeSRrG30gznoO6Dqxe4snheeU6lkbSCx7g8jo%3D)

As Speaker of the House, I am the new boogeyman. Democrats are coming at me with everything they have, to try and take back the House, un-seat vulnerable Republicans, and take over FULL control of Washington.

I know that saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, [**which is why I am assembling a team of foot soldiers I can rely on. I need to know you’ll have my back when I need you most.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=375be607e508409f8896cfddcbbe4653&_e=JYQ2GF3NUe2ieZg1AEOIuCLmOnvy11ag6D9akLcfjpLePowa3YktbXkabcON2ZmbbOrqJ6F8rQLS40N_DNP9IRqLpja3XfX05wfzyg0rBZzUZli0n9VHhMlHV0K6QX9-05FVY7y0QaAX3B2mkaXaBzdDQSuPrhu7T7cp54GgN72jAcXPesLBEMNAMtBZDQ9Okr9OIpYF_yRXQWcP0Da-7yjw0AKGMeKdHiTIVhduOSG05ybZveGRiDV9gV5OEfYR7HgRkIjcQ6mDk85oWsRPyJD-bO1U87WWpwDSLNgU9mh-lc69ZEiuTZZVIvkGkhXdpARpPJQeVv7g92e6EUVP93fpLATpWQkhIfiOnA2EALPY9JeXei2EFJH_JXRiGSTfKsAtxfe_uH4DoyZUCd0tmcpqtV5seI823oHek1hezCw%3D)

[** BE PART OF TEAM JOHNSON > **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=375be607e508409f8896cfddcbbe4653&_e=JYQ2GF3NUe2ieZg1AEOIuCLmOnvy11ag6D9akLcfjpLePowa3YktbXkabcON2ZmbbOrqJ6F8rQLS40N_DNP9IRqLpja3XfX05wfzyg0rBZzUZli0n9VHhMlHV0K6QX9-05FVY7y0QaAX3B2mkaXaBzdDQSuPrhu7T7cp54GgN72jAcXPesLBEMNAMtBZDQ9Okr9OIpYF_yRXQWcP0Da-7yjw0AKGMeKdHiTIVhduOSG05ybZveGRiDV9gV5OEfYR7HgRkIjcQ6mDk85oWsRPyKX4ZBSOd6LEYGr6voW8Tg2nzz8BG3txrl_-xspRedRyspSp7PaPHF61VmKb8_KCnt0h31i0wMKPDRdlpbuTZm_YnSSxygTltKypSE5Yis4DAMn11fuXfAeFShLlFaRbXopqJF4DwZ_sifSoc7sIUKU%3D)
Freedom is fragile and needs our vigilant protection. We need to expand our majority in 2024 to defend our country against the anti-American policies being pushed by the Left.

It’s time to come together, work as a team, and ensure the future of our country. [**I can’t do this without you.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=375be607e508409f8896cfddcbbe4653&_e=JYQ2GF3NUe2ieZg1AEOIuCLmOnvy11ag6D9akLcfjpLePowa3YktbXkabcON2ZmbbOrqJ6F8rQLS40N_DNP9IRqLpja3XfX05wfzyg0rBZzUZli0n9VHhMlHV0K6QX9-05FVY7y0QaAX3B2mkaXaBzdDQSuPrhu7T7cp54GgN72jAcXPesLBEMNAMtBZDQ9Okr9OIpYF_yRXQWcP0Da-7yjw0AKGMeKdHiTIVhduOSG05ybZveGRiDV9gV5OEfYR7HgRkIjcQ6mDk85oWsRPyAoXDaVazFyZBznuCkR6zPS7pAPfSJypg9i2P182v5xla_DwGQ7QLyvwvB3yQu18ALt0G6lqpAKdjMoDwkDQkfZsAk9xpF9nPdOynHA3gVNn5MwD40adm6ZCniqz0tequyZp-wuvUwuUl3VSKJKOEeo%3D)

clean_body: Saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, which is why I am assembling a team of foot soldiers I can rely on. I need to know you’ll have my back when I need you most. | | Peter - I have always known the importance of a good team. It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day. It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America. I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on. Why I need your help: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. This is especially true TODAY – as the Left is determined to dismantle the very foundations our great nation was founded upon. Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to "re-engineer" – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on. The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country. Their actions speak louder than their words, As Speaker of the House, I am the new boogeyman. Democrats are coming at me with everything they have, to try and take back the House, un-seat vulnerable Republicans, and take over FULL control of Washington. I know that saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, Freedom is fragile and needs our vigilant protection. We need to expand our majority in 2024 to defend our country against the anti-American policies being pushed by the Left. It’s time to come together, work as a team, and ensure the future of our country. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Whether it’s the Republican Party, the Democrat Party, or the media – we’re done with you. | | Fellow American, It turns out that if you go after the establishment, they get pretty angry. I say let them be angry. I'm speaking the TRUTH on topics you're not supposed to talk about. I'm approaching the issues that face our country from a different perspective than anyone else in the field. It goes against the establishment's interests and they're targeting me because of that. | I am not a career politician who relies on the support of mega-donors or Super PACs. Get the cronies out of politics and government and watch what gets done. Whether it’s in the Republican Party, the Democrat Party, or the media – we’re done with you. In TRUTH , Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Bob Casey
subject: Warning: This email starts with a dad joke
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1164%2E552475%2EeJRXOY)
Peter, people ask why I love maps so much, so here’s my official statement:
_Geology rocks, but geography is where it's at._
Dad jokes aside, Peter — when I look at the map of Pennsylvania, I see home.
I love Pennsylvania, and I’ve dedicated my career to working to ensure we’re investing in our families, union workers, and seniors across this great Commonwealth.
When Mitch McConnell looks at the map, he sees something else: **an opportunity to take back the Senate.**
National Republicans will spend unprecedented sums to attack me, flip Pennsylvania red, and retake Senate control in 2024. That’s nothing to joke about.
**[Let’s show the GOP that Pennsylvania is ready for the major fight ahead. Can you chip in any amount to keep me in the Senate and protect our majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-1?refcode=em20231119&recurring=true&refcode2=1164_552475_eJRXOY&akid=1164%2E552475%2EeJRXOY)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ [Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-1?amount=15&refcode=em20231119&recurring=true&refcode2=1164_552475_eJRXOY&akid=1164%2E552475%2EeJRXOY) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-1?amount=25&refcode=em20231119&recurring=true&refcode2=1164_552475_eJRXOY&akid=1164%2E552475%2EeJRXOY) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-1?amount=50&refcode=em20231119&recurring=true&refcode2=1164_552475_eJRXOY&akid=1164%2E552475%2EeJRXOY) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-1?amount=100&refcode=em20231119&recurring=true&refcode2=1164_552475_eJRXOY&akid=1164%2E552475%2EeJRXOY) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-1?amount=250&refcode=em20231119&recurring=true&refcode2=1164_552475_eJRXOY&akid=1164%2E552475%2EeJRXOY) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-1?refcode=em20231119&recurring=true&refcode2=1164_552475_eJRXOY&akid=1164%2E552475%2EeJRXOY)
---
We can’t take anything for granted in Pennsylvania. My mega-millionaire opponent, not to mention dark money super PACs, will run attack ads in every one of our 67 counties — and they could make this the most expensive Senate battleground race of 2024.
The only way to take on the GOP is with support from people like you.
**[We have to do all that we can to defend this seat and our Democratic majority in the Senate. Peter, can I count on you to chip in to my re-election campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-1?refcode=em20231119&recurring=true&refcode2=1164_552475_eJRXOY&akid=1164%2E552475%2EeJRXOY)**
Thank you, Peter. Together, we’re putting in the work to ensure the Pennsylvania map stays blue on Election Day.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1164%2E552475%2EeJRXOY)

To give by check:

Philadelphia, PA 19102

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Urgently asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter -

Last Monday, my primary challenger from last year announced his 2024
campaign. He wants a rematch against me, and we're going to give it to
him.

I'll explain more in just a moment, but if that's all you need to hear to
add your support, [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231119-io.q74QH9&refcode=em20231119-31908&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31908%2E1203867%2EM2z01X ]I'm personally asking you to split a $3
contribution between our campaign and Justice Democrats today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231119-io.q74QH9&refcode=em20231119-31908&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31908%2E1203867%2EM2z01X ]Contribute $3

Now here's the truth, Peter:

We already knew that this race — no matter who my opponent was — would
attract an obscene amount of outside spending from right-wing dark money
groups and Republican billionaires nationwide.

But after pouring over half a million dollars into supporting my opponent
last time around, you can be sure that the likes of AIPAC's United
Democracy Project and Clarence Thomas-bankroller Harlan Crow are going to
pull out all the stops in 2024.

That means even more bigoted attack ads blanketing the airwaves in my
district.

It means more lies and disinformation spread on social media.

And yes — it means more resources required to fight back.

We can't afford to take anything for granted in this primary, and the only
way we can continue our movement's fight for justice is if we're all in it
together. That's why I'm asking:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231119-io.q74QH9&refcode=em20231119-31908&amount=3&t=1021&akid=31908%2E1203867%2EM2z01X ]Can you split a $3 contribution between my campaign and
Justice Democrats today? Lots and lots of grassroots donations is how we
fund this movement, so please add yours if you can.

When we faced a surge of last-minute super PAC spending in 2022, this
grassroots team stepped up with a surge of our own — $5, $10, and $25 at a
time.

We fought back, and we won. Now it's going to take all of us standing
together once more to do it again.

Thank you so much for anything you can chip in today.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231119-io.q74QH9&refcode=em20231119-31908&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=31908%2E1203867%2EM2z01X ]Contribute

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231119-31908-footer&t=1023&refcode2=31908_1203867_M2z01X&akid=31908%2E1203867%2EM2z01X

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=31908%2E1203867%2EM2z01X

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

That's why I'm asking: [ ]Can you split a $3 contribution between my campaign and Justice Democrats today? Lots and lots of grassroots donations is how we fund this movement, so please add yours if you can. When we faced a surge of last-minute super PAC spending in 2022, this grassroots team stepped up with a surge of our own — $5, $10, and $25 at a time. We fought back, and we won. Now it's going to take all of us standing together once more to do it again. Thank you so much for anything you can chip in today. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar [ ]Contribute Contribute to Justice Democrats:

body:
Derek,

Polls show a razor-thin presidential race in
Wisconsin next year.

Recent polls from Marquette University, The New York Times, Emerson
College, Morning Consult, and more are reminders that the race is
neck-and-neck and that we need to do everything we can in Wisconsin to
make sure Donald Trump, or whoever the Republicans nominate, doesn’t win
our state’s electoral votes next year.

We have what it takes to keep Wisconsin blue next year. Voters reelected
Tony last November, and earlier this year rejected an anti-abortion
extremist running for the state Supreme Court.

Next year, we’ll reject Donald Trump and keep Wisconsin, and the White
House, blue.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: A year ago, the Colorado Springs community was changed forever
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
An LGBTQ+ club should be a safe haven for individuals to mingle with friends, dance, and meet new people. But instead, a night out turned into a nightmare at LGBTQ+ nightclub Club Q on this day last year.
On the night of November 19, 2022 a mass shooter wielding an assault weapon opened fire at Club Q in Colorado Springs, taking the lives of five innocent people and injuring 25 others.
This act of gun violence was a horrifying attack on the LGBTQ+ community. No one should fear for their lives because of who they are or who they love.
We will not rest at GIFFORDS until our leaders take comprehensive action to make our communities safer in Colorado and all across our nation. We must call on our elected officials to pass the Disarm Hate Act. This is how we can keep guns out of the hands of people motivated by hatred and bigotry.
The fight towards a future free from gun violence isn’t easy, but the fights worth having rarely are. Please, keep standing with us. Your voice is crucial, and your support makes a difference.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: Friends - An LGBTQ+ club should be a safe haven for individuals to mingle with friends, dance, and meet new people. But instead, a night out turned into a nightmare at LGBTQ+ nightclub Club Q on this day last year. On the night of November 19, 2022 a mass shooter wielding an assault weapon opened fire at Club Q in Colorado Springs, taking the lives of five innocent people and injuring 25 others. This act of gun violence was a horrifying attack on the LGBTQ+ community. No one should fear for their lives because of who they are or who they love. We will not rest at GIFFORDS until our leaders take comprehensive action to make our communities safer in Colorado and all across our nation. We must call on our elected officials to pass the Disarm Hate Act. This is how we can keep guns out of the hands of people motivated by hatred and bigotry. The fight towards a future free from gun violence isn’t easy, but the fights worth having rarely are. Please, keep standing with us. Your voice is crucial, and your support makes a difference. A new poll from Reuters shows that nearly 70% of Americans and 80% of Democrats want an immediate ceasefire to protect civilian lives in Israel and occupied Palestine. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv6y_JxWcM-FQVemZsIBZYnRUzB5k2mCSCx6phq5kMfq_jh4t_nIsFQOXT34wylJAz7kaFQ4FSpzJmIann-sBFPbXapkPpC_1w47T4tt64FN9pV5MMA7ZtwMEd-RBcagolhqS7CABbSL_zuGHSoSO5wM6aYHjuztoi_kYdMOfD2begqMQn_m06ZDhZKZL2fsy3ByNnzOrYc-chBNz6HuvGBQ/41f/cIpsq6AaSLS8TJp21JV0iQ/h0/jt8L4TLeb_MpQIfj-agRgbG36aFR4bRb_UripnUqUAA)

Friend, **When militaries use the incendiary weapon known as white phosphorus near civilian populations, it’s a war crime.** The Israeli military has used it repeatedly in Gaza―one of the most densely populated places in the world―as well as southern Lebanon. White phosphorus burns skin to the bone, causing horrendous wounds that can reignite during treatment. While white phosphorus burns on just 10% of the body are often fatal, survivors endure lifelong psychological trauma and social exclusion due to their disfiguring injuries. **We cannot let the United States government enable such inhumane atrocities.** [**Sign now to call on President Biden: Demand Israel ban white phosphorus in military operations, and demand a ceasefire immediately.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk4wHTn5vb2ybkfx5v80X3YOSkHsPNdOx5bm5FkJ67chYm9wwx0xDfJBuU_2i5I1CHWUpoZq-sXMrwPVgBH2dQ8g-2a6s7yYe6hGXHC1e-5NGDOrMzvW8mk_DDxm8qrfYTvUyQ0nQwx06tKHTlV3BlMzTJ-1xOmSAk5Tzo6Qv-JNMF1pHbfp9E7dV3Ko90KFL9E6sgky6c5sa8fcEXOlYEMfGY2scSyIgdvnfv9VZevEsC1FYhb4Oszpp1O4ft4CRHKb-qDb7eyCJUi3yKXt4pFyI5Dg7rDMspxkDwmQ7j0KeMOKUvKeD-Mz35msGjuvnpUOwoaX84HOhIEGkx8wPgvwq1BjXz4uVOXRFlXGw8BSzp47_mawfHySubgnPoXhiVtXlre9vCLjD1joXQ3e0jwlnnGd5UOIlmu7B3xXdUM8pFaNq7aDxV1i5O1qznXNQ3A-Y5FOyAwZ3ST1AQSw89o/41f/cIpsq6AaSLS8TJp21JV0iQ/h1/f7G_h6NRXSAweY8-R-vuVAR1WjkeW3Z-phGv44qUqFo) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk4wHTn5vb2ybkfx5v80X3YOSkHsPNdOx5bm5FkJ67chYm9wwx0xDfJBuU_2i5I1CHWUpoZq-sXMrwPVgBH2dQ8g-2a6s7yYe6hGXHC1e-5NGDOrMzvW8mk_DDxm8qrfYTvUyQ0nQwx06tKHTlV3BlMzTJ-1xOmSAk5Tzo6Qv-JNMF1pHbfp9E7dV3Ko90KFL9E6sgky6c5sa8fcEXOlYEMfGY2scSyIgdvnfv9VZevEqwBnpNdcVrP4b-_iROcZCTtKUZf1-j_7IYrB8xaJDWmqn_jkuSmJpMnFcqferhPya-cBmnXk9lBfoEszJ-Wkg4wiOFfI1oW0JhrZmQxSCBwEVOROL-UCH3YbikcyKheQ2kFHnESv2tB_1ceyBDKObRMkwjf1iEx5u6_dXBIA-ApRIfr2n3UUS9r8QLmieE1A0iNJLyzLvQDtOUSmyFmzxf34AtcsVVVmjdS3pnQgUD2/41f/cIpsq6AaSLS8TJp21JV0iQ/h2/j5Mv20szgt-4zrGZfGI23O4_JEfx6Ne9-XQP61m_x40)

Already, Israel’s military has killed more than 11,000 Palestinians in October and November.The majority are children, and thousands more are wounded or missing under the rubble.
The U.S. government is fully backing this genocide, with the White House calling for and many of my colleagues in Congress voting to send $14 billion more U.S. taxpayer dollars to escalate the slaughter further.
**We cannot lose our shared humanity.** The vast majority of Americans of all backgrounds are demanding a ceasefire, as are families of Israeli hostages. We know that war crimes do not justify more war crimes, and we must continue to speak out for peace.
[**Sign now to urge President Biden to demand a ceasefire and to demand Israel ban the horrific use of white phosphorus against civilians.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk4wHTn5vb2ybkfx5v80X3YOSkHsPNdOx5bm5FkJ67chYm9wwx0xDfJBuU_2i5I1CHWUpoZq-sXMrwPVgBH2dQ8g-2a6s7yYe6hGXHC1e-5NGDOrMzvW8mk_DDxm8qrfYTvUyQ0nQwx06tKHTlV3BlMzTJ-1xOmSAk5Tzo6Qv-JNMF1pHbfp9E7dV3Ko90KFL9E6sgky6c5sa8fcEXOlYEMfGY2scSyIgdvnfv9VZevEjEQcZytXPWppdONxwpyCJNVuKjBs2gxk5h90tE4cXSq1IQ4_gzSKIoTc9PwLa9tAdJmtTYGceeh6jTEqNkf46EovGCt8MWmIUnZ0pkhd1hpatfYw8iVW_WL2Ri_HCVpcekJS2YqVsWQXQ_OI6C9esE2rxDKHebJ7_fUcxYcCQZPX4HqaHRJ7hUSrN4A7MGUifigNcMl8UzzvtQ5nLbiToJNcb8z4_LaNAooE-SumMBp/41f/cIpsq6AaSLS8TJp21JV0iQ/h3/rRJ7q7Ho_6Di3ZOI0rCE0habiOWF-IsUi4rOSKpoyfo)

Each year, the United States provides billions of dollars of aid to the Israeli military, without any restrictions on how the money is used.
On top of this, the U.S. House recently authorized an additional $14 billion U.S. taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military without conditions. **We cannot let our tax dollars fund this horrific genocide of Palestinians, which has already killed more than 11,000 people―the majority of whom are children.**
A new poll from Reuters shows that nearly 70% of Americans across the political spectrum want an immediate ceasefire.3 Only a handful of members of Congress are listening to their constituents and demanding a ceasefire, **but pressure is building to end the violence.**
This past week alone:

* More than 500 officials in Biden’s administration sent the President a letter demanding a ceasefire.
* Palestinians and human rights organizations sued President Biden for unconditionally supporting the Israeli government’s genocidal actions.
* And, just yesterday, Americans across the country rallied, marched, and held sit-ins in a National Day of Action for Palestine.

clean_body: A new poll from Reuters shows that nearly 70% of Americans and 80% of Democrats want an immediate ceasefire to protect civilian lives in Israel and occupied Palestine. | | | Friend, When militaries use the incendiary weapon known as white phosphorus near civilian populations, it’s a war crime. The Israeli military has used it repeatedly in Gaza―one of the most densely populated places in the world―as well as southern Lebanon. White phosphorus burns skin to the bone, causing horrendous wounds that can reignite during treatment. While white phosphorus burns on just 10% of the body are often fatal, survivors endure lifelong psychological trauma and social exclusion due to their disfiguring injuries. We cannot let the United States government enable such inhumane atrocities. | Already, Israel’s military has killed more than 11,000 Palestinians in October and November.The majority are children, and thousands more are wounded or missing under the rubble. The U.S. government is fully backing this genocide, with the White House calling for and many of my colleagues in Congress voting to send $14 billion more U.S. taxpayer dollars to escalate the slaughter further. We cannot lose our shared humanity. The vast majority of Americans of all backgrounds are demanding a ceasefire, as are families of Israeli hostages. We know that war crimes do not justify more war crimes, and we must continue to speak out for peace. Together, we will not be silenced. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Nov 18, 2023 Subject: President Biden: Demand Israel ban white phosphorus To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Numerous media outlets including the Washington Post , and humanitarian groups such as Amnesty International, are reporting on the Israeli military’s illegal use of white phosphorus on civilian populations.1,2 This is a war crime and President Biden must condemn these actions immediately. White phosphorus, when used against people, burns skin down to the bone and reignites internally, destroying organs. This incendiary weapon is literally melting children’s faces in Gaza. In recent weeks, Israel’s government has also illegally dropped white phosphorus bombs on civilians in Lebanon. Each year, the United States provides billions of dollars of aid to the Israeli military, without any restrictions on how the money is used. On top of this, the U.S. House recently authorized an additional $14 billion U.S. taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military without conditions. We cannot let our tax dollars fund this horrific genocide of Palestinians, which has already killed more than 11,000 people―the majority of whom are children. A new poll from Reuters shows that nearly 70% of Americans across the political spectrum want an immediate ceasefire.3 Only a handful of members of Congress are listening to their constituents and demanding a ceasefire, but pressure is building to end the violence. This past week alone: Dozens of rabbis joined me in DC to support our Ceasefire Now Resolution. Thousands of Jewish peace advocates risked arrest in civil disobedience actions for a ceasefire in Chicago, Oakland, Boston, LA, and DC. More than 500 officials in Biden’s administration sent the President a letter demanding a ceasefire. Palestinians and human rights organizations sued President Biden for unconditionally supporting the Israeli government’s genocidal actions. And, just yesterday, Americans across the country rallied, marched, and held sit-ins in a National Day of Action for Palestine. We see the human rights violations the U.S. government is enabling, and we are saying: No more! Together, we will keep building a world with freedom, safety, dignity, and equality for everyone. In solidarity, Rashida 1 2 3 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Our record-breaking grassroots movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me share a little more about how we got here.
#
You’ve helped us accomplish so much over the last 11 months, Peter.
>From launching this campaign on January 6th to calling out Josh Hawley on cable news to breaking Missouri fundraising records, your support has helped us put a national spotlight on this U.S. Senate race.
**And now, multiple polls are showing that we’re in a neck-and-neck race with Josh Hawley — the GOP’s most unpopular U.S. Senator running in 2024.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39335?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU)
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to add your first donation of any amount toward my campaign to defeat Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. **But first, please let me share a little more about how we got here.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39335?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39335?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU)
I grew up in mid-Missouri. And like so many other Americans, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher.
But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That’s the Missouri I grew up in.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39335?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU)
Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia.
When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39335?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU)
While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people.
**I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back.**
So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind.
**And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country** — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all.
I want to codify Roe v. Wade, secure voting rights, and ban anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams forever. I want to put working people in charge of our country. But I need your help to get it done.
**Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building the people-powered movement that's going to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I need you on our team.[Please add a donation of any amount right now so we can continue building this movement and finally give power back to everyday, working people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39335?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39336?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39336?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39335?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU)
---
I’m not just running to make a point — **this is a race we can win.**
**Josh Hawley is vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his seat with only 51% of the vote — and after he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th, he became the least popular Republican Senator up for re-election in 2024. In Missouri’s last Senate race during a presidential election, the margin was only 2.7%.
Since Hawley was elected, Missourians have broken with him and taken back their power at the ballot box by voting to raise the minimum wage, expand Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, and legalize cannabis.
TIME Magazine called me the “clean-cut, populist Marine veteran who could give Democrats a fighting chance." And if we’re able to get this message in front of voters early in this race, we have a real shot at defeating Josh Hawley in 2024 and flipping Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
**But I need you on this team to get it done, Peter.** GOP insiders and even Hawley’s own campaign have already started attacking me — and over the coming months, they’re bound to get even more vicious. That’s why we need to start preparing right now to fight back and deliver our positive message to voters.
**[Will you chip in anything you can right now so we can keep building this record-breaking grassroots movement and stay prepared for the fight ahead? I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything makes a big difference to our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39335?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39336?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=11&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39336?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=12&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39336?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=13&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39336?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=14&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39336?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=15&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39336?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=16&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39335?refcode=em20231119-4213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU)
---
Together, we can take back power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real, everyday people in charge of our country.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231119-4213-footer&t=18&refcode2=4213_614464_XZNGdU&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=4213%2E614464%2EXZNGdU). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: This is a hard email to write.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hey, friend – it’s Sherrod.

This isn't the email I wanted to write, but I really have no other choice. Unfortunately, **a brand-new poll shows me neck and neck with my millionaire GOP opponents.**

So my team just set an **urgent 24-hour goal to raise $100,000** to make sure we have the resources we need to fight back and pull ahead. But if we fail to reach this, we could fall behind, right as the election year starts.

[So please, will you split $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project right now to help me reach my 24-hour goal, take the lead, and win in Ohio?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57200?t=6&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO) | [**CONTRIBUTE $10 »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57200?t=7&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO)
---
Look, winning this race will be anything but easy: Mitch McConnell has personally named me a top target for defeat – and my GOP opponents are writing themselves multi-million dollar checks to try and buy this seat.

My campaign relies on $10 donations, not million-dollar checks, folks. Now, I'm proud of that, but it also means I need folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to power our campaign to victory.

**So if I'm going to surge ahead in the polls, I need everyone reading this email to help me reach my fundraising goal in the next 24 hours.**

[I know you care about keeping this seat blue and defending our razor-thin Senate majority, so I'm counting on you to make a gift: Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help me hit my goal and win in Ohio?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57200?t=8&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57201?t=9&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57202?t=10&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57203?t=11&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57204?t=12&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57200?t=13&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO)
Thanks for chipping in.

– Sherrod
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=11796%2E878179%2EmyyYnO)

body:
You're a Republican, Peter?

| Peter, Republicans are THRILLED: **_By failing to renew your Democratic Majority Membership, you have been marked as a REPUBLICAN in our system!_** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73639016/439158864/881099375?amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20231119_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2ZDMwZWY3LWZhODYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WsTdMQnmLrBcxAmK5VEQA3jU2muUoSS__8fLdZcjQHE=) **We never do this,_but we see no other option:_** We’re giving you until midnight TONIGHT to renew your membership and save our Democracy. | [THIS IS YOUR LAST CHANCE, Peter: CHIP IN $5 NOW TO RENEW YOUR DEMOCRATIC MAJORITY MEMBERSHIP »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73639020/439158865/881099375?amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20231119_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2ZDMwZWY3LWZhODYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WsTdMQnmLrBcxAmK5VEQA3jU2muUoSS__8fLdZcjQHE=)
---
_❌ Are you a Republican, Peter?

_**Fellow American - I am all in for President Trump.**_

I endorse him wholeheartedly, and believe to my core that we have to make Biden a one-term president.

[**DONATE TO SPEAKER JOHNSON & PRESIDENT TRUMP ➞**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3f2f7b7c386049e0b7d6cd47bb544a5b&_e=49f3cW9lj66fL3CAx0xxzfIvNhnA0OfaWOpyLXUpfTiQIbASvu6S1xyPTGVY9g4VlSSfjpdOnd1RBwJmOwgAjmPEGYe0ykx78RTOGMxCfLtvUttBwunzbasav-w0baE8agkmFNC4koH5SD7YEfaCV_darntQssXFCH7bKyKWoHaS3E2GnRsKnFaA4G89QJxSOWj_S4AgxptNzPfOf8YqDhbiSebFSvPEV5QvR00jwU8ts599oKIRHYurjJHd05xLPG0vCKrtxBg8DoSnDEQ04ORxDslm4Y9vvIZUKP051RBwZzHD9jgLKawMjz26gllAhbXo3UcEI7jRahcS7cQFRA5u0VBT5B9AUeny5Uf5kQ0vtf5NPMDHVAJhtkdVIQMn)
Under President Trump, we built the greatest economy in U.S. history, took concrete steps to secure our southern border, projected strength abroad, and fought back against the radical Left EVERY DAY – **no matter what they threw at us.**

President Trump made America great again, _and I know we can do it once more._

In fact, take a look at what we’ve already been able to do because of your support:
