Here’s the truth, Peter: We’re anticipating a big slowdown in fundraising during the Thanksgiving break — something we call the “Thanksgiving slump.” I get it! Folks spend the week traveling, cooking, spending time with family, or watching football. However people chose to spend the holiday, one thing’s for sure: They’re not taking the time to read emails like this one. As you may know, we rely on the fundraising appeals in these emails to fuel every piece of work we do. So, when folks stop opening these emails, we have fewer resources to advocate for legislation or support our candidates. And this slowdown couldn’t come at a worse time. We’re running up against our end-of-month deadline, and hitting our goal is critical to achieving all of the work we’re hoping to do in 2024 to take back the House. **JUST** REAL **NEWS**

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**First, Ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading?
---|---
2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information??
3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important?

[There is a better way!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=64f0326945c94824b7998fe35f346973&_e=b9BCsHL1dh26j83uMJtnx4bTAO6wVrUvSRw8WtOQ11UDEDyeLwBBR-8k0SaloZRaxlffpkcen4HTiQC2RO_u7xbUTBTC8h3GUqm9B_m6uViVRM516gmG-9WQtBAt6-qFDsISEjFc81XLEweoxQyB_5RNj0Q-OjqAJiQkQazwNRp2H_VQRMMMAh0lt56GnPPGIrk4X8euEHck64uUU3MLBw%3D%3D)

Instead of being a Fake News victim — sign up today for a **FREE** newsletter called [_The Flyover_](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=64f0326945c94824b7998fe35f346973&_e=b9BCsHL1dh26j83uMJtnx4bTAO6wVrUvSRw8WtOQ11UDEDyeLwBBR-8k0SaloZRaAnPypL0BZhHAjh-DMbwk4Pr07XtEPX40e3Y9VfhFGpBxNw5SR_JPZodsGfRgi_BtVk4a3Fyn2walqWDOGghCcCstqagoK8EeW7jd8bwecApkeVyOP692b0nGPvPuIXxQQbEV1RQ0l9dl3qzrTSAYHw%3D%3D). Without the hidden agenda, slant, or bias, our talented team of editors dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day - so you don't have to. Get informed on breaking news, politics, business, sports, world affairs, science, technology, and many other topics with a single email - a 5-minute read, once-a-day - delivered directly to your email inbox.

You know it's bad when half of the American people decided national news organizations simply want to mislead, misinform, and push biased opinions on the American public.

This massive shift happening in the American Media is a good thing. The corporate elite news media has lost the trust of the American people.

Don't don't get left behind & miss this EXCLUSIVE opportunity to sign up for FREE today.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: WATCH: new ad running in Florida re: DeSantis extreme abortion law.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
My PAC launched a TV ad in Florida highlighting Ron DeSantis' draconian law outlawing abortions at six weeks in Florida that criminalizes women and their doctors.

Friends —
I’ll be debating Ron DeSantison November 30th on Fox News, and I hope you'll tune in. You can expect me to promote Joe Biden's record to an audience that isn’t used to hearing about his record of success.
And you can expect me to highlight the extremism Ron DeSantis has embraced in an effort to win the Republican nomination.
To that end, my PAC launched a TV ad in Florida highlighting Ron DeSantis' draconian law outlawing abortions at six weeks in Florida that criminalizes women and their doctors.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2974?t=1&akid=1674%2E4767699%2EiFY6wr)
Ron DeSantis will never be president, but the people of Florida need to know the damage he caused in pursuit of his goals.
Gavin Newsom

name: Travis Tazelaar
subject: Another way to get involved with VoteVets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Impactive has the potential to take VoteVets and our coordinated action to the next level.
#
Derek,
For over 15 years VoteVets has been on the frontline fighting for Veterans and Military Families. But our members, volunteers, and donors are the backbone of this organization and its successes. Every action you take makes a difference.
Veterans will be familiar with the use of the term “Force Multiplier.” Tools or tactics that increase effectiveness. VoteVets is adopting a new force multiplier right now — an organizing platform called **Impactive** that will allow us to fight in a more united and coordinated way.
Will you join us?
We have two easy ways to sign up.
1\. **[Click here to create a web account.](https://act.votevets.org/go/7332?t=1&akid=19842%2E3013755%2EE_Uary)** Enter the VoteVets campaign code: 492079. Enter your email address when prompted and request a one-time link. Go to your email inbox on your computer and click the link from Impactive. You've successfully joined the VoteVets campaign if you see the VoteVets logo in the top left corner.
2\. Go to the App Store or Google Play and download the **Impactive for Organizing** app. Enter all of the information as prompted and VoteVets’ campaign code: 492079. Enter your email address when prompted and request a one-time link. Go to your email inbox on your mobile device and click the link from Impactive. You've successfully joined the VoteVets campaign if you see the VoteVets logo in the top left corner.
If you have any issues with your onboarding, reply to this email or send a line to organizing@votevets.org.
Impactive has the potential to take VoteVets and our coordinated action to the next level.
I hope you’ll come aboard.
Thanks a lot,
Travis Tazelaar
Veteran, Organizing Director
VoteVets.org

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

More and more is being written about the Montana Senate race every week - and with every new article, it becomes clearer how Democrats in red states like Montana hope to win their races.

* Use Biden's massive campaign operation to their advantage. While they plan to distance themselves from the president publicly, they're going to be using his resources behind the scenes:

_**"With a Biden versus Trump rematch on the horizon, Roberts said Democrats will be able to collaborate with the Biden campaign in key battleground states and build the infrastructure necessary to wage successful campaigns."**_

"_**For Democrats to hold the Senate, they'll need to rely on voters splitting their tickets at the presidential and Senate levels."**_
If the sources in the article I read are to be believed, **the way Democrats intend to hold onto this critical Senate seat - and their majority - is by having their candidates pretend to be something they're not.**

name: Team Nikki
subject: The Farm to Fly Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Folks, Nikki is laser-focused on helping farmers across our district. Earlier this month, she introduced the _Farm to Fly Act_ — bipartisan legislation aimed at allowing homegrown renewable fuel to power our aviation sector while supporting growth in rural economies. If Congress passes this bill, our government will take much-needed steps to cut harmful emissions, support family farmers, and reduce our dependence on foreign energy sources used to fuel airplanes. name: Speaker Mike Johnson

|
---
| | |
Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

name: Prudent Politics
subject: the only gold company Mike Huckabee recommends
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

SPONSORED

NEW Gold & Silver
Information Kit

Yours FREE For a
Limited Time
My Friend,

With all the
stress-inducing news out there right now, some people are
starting to believe: "America has reached a crisis point."

If you feel the same
way, and you still have money tied up in traditional assets like
savings accounts, 401(k)s and IRAs...

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: We know it’s a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hey there,
We know we’ve reached out a lot this month asking you to support Alex and other Senate Democrats. No doubt about it. So we wanted to take a second before the holidays to explain why your support is so important to what we’re trying to accomplish.
**If we lose our democratic majority in the Senate, Mitch McConnell and the GOP will _immediately_ start implementing a right-wing extremist agenda.**
We’re talking about a _national abortion ban._
We’re talking about _attacks on our immigrant communities._
We’re talking about _attacks on our LGBTQ+ communities._
We’re talking about an environmental policy that leaves California and our country _unprepared for the devastating impacts of climate change._
We’re talking about _tax breaks for the massive corporations and the ultra-wealthy._
And we’re even talking about _attacks on our free and fair elections_ -- the cornerstone of our democracy.
Alex is working hard to support his colleagues in tough races across the country, but he can’t do it alone. No one can.
**The ONLY way we’re going to maintain our majority in the Senate and keep making progress for California and the country is if folks like you step up and get involved.**
Fundraising tends to slow down around holidays, so we’re counting on a lot of contributions TODAY before folks check out to spend time with their families.
**What do you say?**
[**Can you please make a contribution to Alex Padilla today? We’re doing everything we can to hold and even build on our majority, and your support makes a BIG difference.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-november23.KyL7fa&refcode=em231119-1-30&t=1&akid=1605%2E159979%2EVW7BVP)**
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-november23.4BZx5i&refcode=em231119-1-30&amount=5&t=2&akid=1605%2E159979%2EVW7BVP)**
---
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-november23.4BZx5i&refcode=em231119-1-30&t=3&akid=1605%2E159979%2EVW7BVP)**
---
Thank you so much, for anything you can afford to give and for everything you’re doing to support Alex and our Democratic majority in the Senate.
Team Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1605%2E159979%2EVW7BVP)

name: =?utf-8?Q?State=20Representative=20Ryan=20Chamberlin?=
subject: Weekly Newsletter
body:
Update from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/voteryanchamberlin/conservative-businessman-ryan-chamberlin-12662980?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | | **UPDATE FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| **Hello, everyone!

Thank you for reading my weekly update. It is an honor to share with you what I have been up to in the district and Tallahassee over the last week. **I want to hear about the issues important to you, so please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or concerns. **If we work together, we can make District 24 stronger than ever.** We have a lot to do, but I am looking forward to the strides we will make to better our community in the upcoming months.
---
| | **REC Victory’s Call **
---
|
---
---
| Last Friday evening, I attended the **REC Victory’s Call** and had the opportunity to spend some time with some honorable people, including former Florida Governor, Senator Rick Scott and other elected officials within our state.
---
|
---
| | **Florida’s Professional Firefighters**
---
|
---
| Monday evening, I joined **Florida’s Professional Firefighters** from all around the state to watch some Monday night football and to meet those who risk their lives every day.
---
| | **Florida Physical Therapy Association**
---
| |
---
On Tuesday morning, I met with the **Florida Physical Therapy Association** which included some physical therapists from our district.

We had a productive meeting where we discussed their legislative priorities. It was a pleasure to have the opportunity to talk about these important matters with them.
---
| | **Alzheimer’s Community Care Reception**
---
| |
---
Tuesday evening, I attended the **Alzheimer’s Community Care Reception** and also met with their members at the Capitol the next day.

Alzheimer’s Community Care has provided community-based, family-centered care for more than 25 years to thousands of families in Palm Beach, Martin, and St. Lucie Counties.
---
| | **Florida Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Contractors Association**
---
| Also, on Tuesday evening, I attended the**Legislative Reception of the Florida Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Contractors Association.** FRACCA is the voice of Florida's AC industry, representing contractors, engineers, and manufacturers.
---
| | **Florida Department of Corrections**
---
|
---
---
| I had the opportunity to meet with the **Florida Department of Corrections** ' wardens and circuit admins to discuss legislative proposals along with discussions on facilities across the state and in Marion County.
---
| | **Meetings at the Capitol**
---
| |
---
Throughout the course of this week, I had a series of meetings to engage in discussions with various groups and organizations. They were very productive and I look forward to prioritizing objectives aimed at enhancing the quality of our state and district.

I met with the **Florida Alliance for Vacation Rentals** to discuss legislative priorities that they have for this upcoming Session, and met with **Defend Florida** , which is an election integrity group, to discuss safe and honest elections in Florida.
---
| I also had the opportunity to meet with the members of **Alzheimer’s Community Care** to discuss their legislative priorities and appropriations for this upcoming Session.
---
|
---
| After a long two weeks of committee meetings, I am looking forward to driving home and getting back to my district and family. I hope everyone has a great weekend!

Truly yours,
**Representative Ryan Chamberlin**
---
|
---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=443922c030&e=d1c1b9864f "LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE")
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._
Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative526 E Park AveTallahassee, FL 32301-2568
[Add us to your address book](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=3acf84f1c3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=3acf84f1c3).

---

clean_body: A new report from Priorities USA proves what we’ve known all along — the path to the White House runs through Michigan. | Team, 15. That’s how many electoral votes we delivered to President Biden and Vice President Harris in 2020 — and now a new chart released by Democratic group Priorities USA shows that they’re counting on us to deliver again. = | = Democratic group Priorities USA released a new chart outlining what it will take for Democrats to hold the White House in 2024, and it proves what we’ve known to be true all along — the path to the White House runs through Michigan. = But the road ahead will not be easy. Polls are showing that 2024 will be one of the closest presidential elections in our nation’s history, and MAGA Republicans are busy raising hundreds of billions of dollars to defeat us. The only thing standing between the White House and MAGA’s extreme agenda of attacking our fundamental freedoms and ripping away our benefits is states like Michigan. That’s why instead of waiting until we’re closer to Election Day, we’re asking you to get involved now. Your generous donations will help us invest in things like advertising and organizing so that we can reach as many voters as possible ahead of Election Day 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = We won in Michigan in 2020. We won in Michigan in 2022. And together we’ll win in Michigan in 2024. He’s been calling up his millionaire friends so that they can dump all their money into Florida and defeat me. And unfortunately, it looks like it’s working. | | | | | | It’s no secret that well-connected Democrats have the power to fund a candidate in Florida’s Senate race with tens of millions of dollars. name: John Bisognano, NDRC President
subject: Voters aren’t dumb, and they know what they care about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
When the process is fair, voters can make their voices heard.
|
---

Team,

Earlier this month, voters showed up across the country to make their voices heard in support of democracy.

→ In **Virginia** , voters rejected GOP Governor Glenn Youngkin’s right-wing culture war message and delivered Democrats control of both the State Senate and House of Delegates.

→ In **Kentucky** , voters in a deep-red state voted to reelect Democratic Governor Andy Beshear, who has been a champion for voting rights and abortion rights.

→ And in **Ohio** , despite shameless attempts by Republican lawmakers to undermine the democratic process, voters chose to enshrine protection for abortion rights in the state constitution.

**Over and over again, Republicans have shown their disdain for democracy and their willingness to subvert it to hold on to power. And over and over again, voters have shown that they’re not dumb, and they know what they care about, by showing up to vote for Democracy Defenders.**

[**_We’re less than a year out from a truly consequential election in 2024, so we must keep fighting across the country to ensure voters can make their voices heard. Will you rush a donation now to power the NDRC’s democracy-saving work?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73646866/439176193/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231119_FR_11J_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2OTA1NzhkLTA3ODctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=56UcthDNJbRg4ak7ZMEcSA9G6actgPIwEfmtLNL30zw=)

Unfortunately, the news from this year’s elections wasn’t all good. In Mississippi, advocates worked tirelessly to activate Black communities to make their voices heard in the governor’s race. **But on Election Day, voters encountered hours-long waits – and many polling places even _ran out of ballots_.**

We must be prepared to combat these kinds of threats to voter access all across the country next year. Voters have made it clear that they have the power to enact real change. But we must ensure fairness in our elections so voters can make their voices heard.

As Attorney General Eric Holder said recently, **“Voting rights protect all other rights. But those rights are under attack—and our democracy is under attack. It’s up to us to do the work . . . We have to make real America’s promise of inclusion in our democracy.”**

[**_The NDRC is working nationwide to make real America’s promise of inclusion in our democracy, and our work is powered by people like you. Will you donate today to help us continue this work across the country?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73646867/439176194/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231119_FR_11J_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2OTA1NzhkLTA3ODctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=56UcthDNJbRg4ak7ZMEcSA9G6actgPIwEfmtLNL30zw=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: When the process is fair, voters can make their voices heard. | Team, Earlier this month, voters showed up across the country to make their voices heard in support of democracy. → In Virginia , voters rejected GOP Governor Glenn Youngkin’s right-wing culture war message and delivered Democrats control of both the State Senate and House of Delegates. → In Kentucky , voters in a deep-red state voted to reelect Democratic Governor Andy Beshear, who has been a champion for voting rights and abortion rights. → And in Ohio , despite shameless attempts by Republican lawmakers to undermine the democratic process, voters chose to enshrine protection for abortion rights in the state constitution. Over and over again, Republicans have shown their disdain for democracy and their willingness to subvert it to hold on to power. And over and over again, voters have shown that they’re not dumb, and they know what they care about, by showing up to vote for Democracy Defenders. = Unfortunately, the news from this year’s elections wasn’t all good. In Mississippi, advocates worked tirelessly to activate Black communities to make their voices heard in the governor’s race. But on Election Day, voters encountered hours-long waits – and many polling places even ran out of ballots. We must be prepared to combat these kinds of threats to voter access all across the country next year. Voters have made it clear that they have the power to enact real change. But we must ensure fairness in our elections so voters can make their voices heard. As Attorney General Eric Holder said recently, “Voting rights protect all other rights. But those rights are under attack—and our democracy is under attack. It’s up to us to do the work . . . We have to make real America’s promise of inclusion in our democracy.” = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, team – we couldn’t do this without you. Biz John Bisognano President, NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| | Peter, This time of year is tough for me. My name is Captain Hung Cao. I served for over 25 years all over the world defusing bombs and protecting you and your family from foreign terrorists who only care to kill and take away the freedom we hold so dear. Leaving for deployment was never easy. I have a wife and five kids at home but I had a duty to protect and defend the country I love.
---
---
**Now - I have a new duty: running for the U.S. Senate in Virginia.** **Washington needs a FIGHTER, someone who’s not beholden to dark money groups, a leader who’s seen firsthand the troubles we face.** Under the current leadership of Joe Biden and the U.S. Senate Democrats, America looks weak, our citizens can’t afford to live, and our southern border is being invaded. We have become a second thought in our own country, and the only people benefitting is the Washington Establishment. I am running for the U.S. Senate to defeat one of Washington’s Biggest Insiders – career politician, Tim Kaine. _My time in the Navy may be done, but my duty to our country is nowhere near finished._ My uniform may change to a suit, my boots may change to dress shoes, and my rifle may change to a pen, but there is one thing that will never change - my love and service to our country. I owe it to my kids, my fellow brothers and sisters who have fallen on the battlefield, and to YOU to make our future a better one. **[I will never waver, but I do need your support. Can you fuel my fight with just a few dollars or whatever you can afford today?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=bde0ee0be3614d0f92a8b00fb68849c3&_e=qYJX8xAZ42GLdYM8nUK13D09qA77AZ0MTISGuRjXeah9fneFr87pd4sYR3Nb8efbkAjyUc6UsYbIa6gJIxN77P8GHhYAlUYr4rVmfrnNLHOpIXdnjxb6Knu27U-nQEFuDQ6IPWZ5tK7MaJXAk_m2nF9XJLfld2J4wS4ZnSWbVsNhISU6UU2uIwUeGIZeqdXXFsLFrC1UGt2jhYRFZMogOwsqCgrhKwKi-bQ-AMOaS-T76zlB-_cXfl4Pwi9S3aZYQ7vzFDj-4fUFm5yic9sDrxzcCpWeOTBLZsF9lvSAeHS1xYEo_b2kOKE0w8bYZTqCcS0OgcEkGNpjhs2mr84SuWL3uhks9iUEbAM9mpbcOwuxYVYec2tf9Bcxbwt3Dm0pqxcpguPs7wJJ61tB_Q1nJALM2jA5cyQQDc_tZ_bjr0U%3D)**

Fellow American,
I know you’ve been getting a ton of emails from me, but you have to understand the gravity of the situation.

[**While House Republicans are trying to keep the People’s House open and make it easier for Americans to live in Joe Biden's America...**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=21097f43c4b0455e9e5ad6b66afeebae&_e=w_bgiU_2x9eZm1_-FQ7dEawV31GSuLYgScOaV_GQuPs9nm7JWhcBuNOjNnG5omxog3n2X72mue5ypPxc5GnFaAK5VSs6gLGAav-efTLTRMvO3CNjxZWmFz2af3NaRVcqjYYR85BD3T8MJyBcOKOHfgldsjNt0medPKjR1Ozi3fMufHdiRzosR_YCHXoZmAFBAbucOaXqiLtFCERwKGG5kUtyweuEFmfC-pw1uDfMCPFPthMdWfjDUwbvHfvMelUDCGg9stgS-jeBLR3o91tXz-kvp7da4BdZ7qgAa8Y3DRHfqncAcQwVZc9V0kkGzSTNGXpiSPBiZy1yZt2xko3R6d9TTrIdS4XHfoh1xF2yvGWFYilGiHQRfDiHzBuMixNM) **_Democrats are raking in cash so they can reclaim the majority and give Nancy Pelosi back the gavel._**

**This is what we’re dealing with:** Pelosi and her gaggle of far-Left Democrats are calling on liberal mega-donors to flood vulnerable House races with cash and buy up seats in purple districts.

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

It's been a busy two weeks—between the field narrowing, our campaign rising in the polls, Christie crushing it in the debates, his visit to Israel, his speech at the Hudson Institute, and multiple trips to New Hampshire, you could say Chris has the momentum at just the right time! As for Trump, let's be totally honest. The walls are closing in on DJT. Legally, politically, and financially. But we all know why that's happening. Chris Christie has been the one person taking him on directly, and we're winning. That's one of the many reasons all of us at Team Christie are proud to be part of this campaign, and proud that you're here with us in the fight to get the Truth out! Thanks for reading the newsletter and please, if you can help us reach our new goal of 100k donors before the end of the year, it will make all the difference as we approach the 4th debate. [If you haven't yet given, could you chip in $5 now?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=fb976496199f4743a468749ff8cb14e0&_e=Y1Co9ziDi09ElMV5p7ozsXO4qMo8TwCKdg8g-9uHaCTANGMgE2oKjLbOHH9riKdcJecqvfpPSAMzn6FeWnPOOjqcmHnRUOvb1vHxV5IcISB_-2MR5PoV_Yrznfk3IefJO5VAaYQ_a9tTsMZXSEoKT7o3QHRUZXSyM5g5pcEsqfceXrQN2H1Nykrts6flFry4fhUTjMRfAROXKFgpeA6kzJepGCWB6tRcLF3Y0T-nqwQ6m7TltF8F4BVXLh-shp6m) If you HAVE already given, could you ask a like-minded friend to chip in to help Chris fight and win? Thanks,Team Christie

clean_body: | | | It's been a busy two weeks—between the field narrowing, our campaign rising in the polls, Christie crushing it in the debates, his visit to Israel, his speech at the Hudson Institute, and multiple trips to New Hampshire, you could say Chris has the momentum at just the right time! As for Trump, let's be totally honest. The walls are closing in on DJT. Legally, politically, and financially. But we all know why that's happening. Chris Christie has been the one person taking him on directly, and we're winning. That's one of the many reasons all of us at Team Christie are proud to be part of this campaign, and proud that you're here with us in the fight to get the Truth out! Thanks for reading the newsletter and please, if you can help us reach our new goal of 100k donors before the end of the year, it will make all the difference as we approach the 4th debate. If you HAVE already given, could you ask a like-minded friend to chip in to help Chris fight and win? Thanks,Team Christie Our campaign released an extensive and detailed memo yesterday outlining Chris' path to victory. It's getting some major attention in the press so we thought we should share it with you. We've made the full text of the memo available here: | | Did you see Chris on Newsmax this week? He clashed with Eric Bolling on why the walls are closing in on Trump and how the case against him isn't just being tried for political reasons. Trump's own former Chief of Staff is testifying against him. If you missed it, watch the exchange below. "Christie: Don’t Interrupt Me When I Say Something That Makes You Comfortable" | | This week we are featuring all of our Team Christie hats – you don't want to miss this opportunity! - | | Last weekend Chris went to Israel to witness firsthand the atrocities committed by Hamas terrorists. | | | | | | | | Did you miss Chris Christie's Speech at the Hudson Institute regarding his trip to Israel? News outlets are calling it one of the most important speeches of his campaign, so it is a must watch! | | Have a great Thanksgiving week! Team Christie | | | | | | | | | | | | - ---|---|---

Israel and Hamas have agreed to a tentative ceasefire agreement that
would allow for a five-day pause in exchange for hostages in Gaza,
according to the Washington Post. The deal was reportedly brokered
between Qatari mediators in Doha, Qatar, alongside Israel, the United
States and Hamas, according to the Washington Post.

‘Strike One And Two’: House Republicans Express Frustration With Mike
Johnson, GOP Leadership Over Stopgap Spending Bill

Several House Republicans are disappointed with House Speaker Mike
Johnson’s leadership of their conference following the passage of a
continuing resolution to fund the government on Tuesday.

On May 2, 2011, American soldiers raided Osama bin Laden’s compound in
Pakistan and recovered an undated letter to the United States. It was
a propagandistic letter calling for endless wars against American
imperialism. It circulated on several news sites including The
Guardian.

clean_body: = | Peter, Nancy Mace’s divisive rhetoric has earned her headlines on Fox News, Donald Trump’s attention, and the branding of a MAGA celebrity. She’s the right-wing’s darling, but she’s South Carolina’s national embarrassment. = Now, here’s why we urgently need to defeat Mace: — Mace helped write South Carolina’s draconian current 6-week abortion ban. Now, they’re planning to take away any exceptions for rape or incest. The only woman Nancy Mace has ever fought for is Nancy Mace. — Even members of Mace’s own party are embarrassed by Mace’s extremism. Former House Speaker Kevin McCarthy told reporters that Mace hasn’t “earned the right to be reelected.” — Mace is sharing with her colleagues that she is in the running for Donald Trump's VP pick. She's ready to campaign for every MAGA issue Trump supports. The list goes on. Mace has proven time and again that she cannot be trusted to represent SC-01 without putting her political ambitions first. We’ve had enough. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Moore HQ = | | Paid for by Michael B. body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, November 19th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdKfUol6ra6mgPDPO5Av17ebqZ-0PlkKD67Ip1NrjXoVQS73nkONopTIobHBAf6eadq-ErCOUGNoWLNnHwNDkZO8Q5oQfCx161lOqyNEVA9bBramy6rCX4tIoyS8SVIPjBxKGtssR22bz5pw2UHIzacSC3IihV_7PpAen9QfkmHE8mRsG_zi1K5lbFL7r-YMstrByxRmJxWHEGk20U8p--i_FFN9zsGcO4Gq7Xx-XvhfPKwJTFqdR7eWfMuGcAwszK9wxbFRoYfshFKwjS8xFMqvQYwgvtomu1Ig6jpTkZT_-7F37OIWQq_Xm83RPddm-Alkl-Q3ySeGiGU2YLrQtBqVzHo48JclSHiDfkQeN4qzg9V49SSUfDudF4vyhITVUImAkRj1HJvkyLL-rsjSzUENzKA7EjHT0NiqnuW63D_isQB146Ocsp_cK1lT3P8OniQ8Z85oPKl99HpSR4T69I9c0aNLNOYJRF54DtEYdtIE65r4MBuYRZk5iOh6XmwExpsKNzipJFJqcLC02BjYIdkHmKVSlImqxbTxR4T0f6R059UX7k4yAw-4S_9d_UgFjxFZoHzqO6ACXQolj1FvoMnQ/41f/64mtd_roRs6wz3Xs5bbHqA/h0/4-ciWGFxO2tNE740j58mMrpSFzLnH4cLysNp0kEI6ek)
---
1️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Democrats nominate the state's first Black House Speaker **
In Virginia, following Democrats’ victories earlier this month, the newly elected Democratic majority announced Del. Don Scott as their unanimous nominee for the House Speaker. [With the most diverse legislative makeup in the state's history, and Scott's nomination continuing the historic momentum, we’re celebrating Virginia’s path into a more inclusive future →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTEBokwJ0izHXMWrpJl2hHytHI1wusZnYs4t3vJszAAN8bNivGYy2iB2i0PkPZVK9asha38c7KNXl7tT6bLfDzdFPGPsH1y6uuys5Nt7s_ytYYChdeKWFCakeAD0Yhv5xfTNYGzHy1pq62ny5OpyRdY97Nz2MWllVKjknUCs4JvkqMVG2goiczAoAPDBfQMRT7jGuLXZlUM_2-N54IEZK--60QRu-s72_F51tcHBujdlq4SZFsn128z0yVyrG9Ros-QGdpO3_sWh8LYaObkr3SaghTxG1MNCCQm-VU-4EMY-_EAAUSz41SiJ7MXDFr0h3cbZjk1ztAorJyQ-Xz5nxSrxxnQGK8WxJx81XEm6VfjkT5BnMyFmwfztiWLtAZrgrCe1ESxI3U2SFOGa-DQ327uSwqx2HouqUkW9T7sERglVxg859BtZU5IApEChsbsE3sC_DzPhXK2QUlgKlEYNUTKZLyLff1g7wGk64j_syezCNV8PM-8QDdF8EKkausYSKy6fRiAd5lcs0NXDRIrfKO3mqw-jWGknmsh9aAzgo-YiEvooaeM4mwZDuUrlK5LNNDBC38cr7G1wtIr9BH6o_xN3xGjjoFh7MJgcF1B-IZTyqhGdURZ3pC-PQwmG21nH-Yo-s6UmbhRIg-n9aMMat2EvudjLa5c4YFTOzHUDxh0vkpCCGSX48eeGzuIbKkBiqC0qcfffBQGCDzlzvwb31wgRNTxQZ5ijIo-dwmDB8bZnOZD51_r5lKVen1z_hn0L3T0nxz4GZVPVlYEsNVMzBsZtc9yBz4qBjOuUeDNfJuYxTLa1RZjQYu9IaEvPrRzoIkfaIFwmRbb83iEL2PQBbiSgD20jB74G23b-2tKQibeuVxobNfgqmhi6xa1sZqDgJ_XxwYnCjt3HUsNtb8wKxrc/41f/64mtd_roRs6wz3Xs5bbHqA/h1/xlw-WnbkqSKJG5C0G_Pr_pEQ8WZi0tjnU_vWTaYhGsA)

2️⃣ **_Ohio:_ Republicans look to attack abortion rights by limiting judicial power**
In Ohio, after a successful ballot measure enshrined the right to abortion in the state's constitution earlier this month, GOP lawmakers are attempting to make the state’s Republican-held legislature the sole authority on decisions around the new amendment. [**Voters made their choices clear and fought to protect abortion, but these Republicans will stop at nothing to reverse the will of the people and attack our fundamental freedoms →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIuxh3_XyHQLrs97S-lrBc8Khvil5lzUGYO-OVLF5FxwAiDKs7uf5rvZZPkKFzj8Hvbef5bjesKMx42NJ7_3bzhkCqgvfDGqRhOc--RdvzjfuY6untI1gxi_mDJEvLVpkAUbGU3w3ex-OWU0BWr2hBEA_OjQqVntAwxSv9atvJh3-lL3Q8jsL6ebkwgKYTigQjkoY1_Y2JtNYvz2Dby0ru4p3_ZSAjac1wPzMAtIKJM9P8dUug_0PydTkjA_WPKPwM2NKOxhsWX6lNfoPC_GtEACTXo46gxlNyY4aUdNrt5fp8rfEkAYvZgIFVUNty-5TpIhElC6UjbFFuGHuQDYDsi2FwKm9qEyJMsAyHctTEdQ8heVPOswdoMG2vFxLK1xzSAmPoAebdACJa6mTgNBOzbf0J3UsOdfigwuU-ScZ1LvSlV4Be7LLVHKMY6TmKNxWnLXkaEO7o-Iifhjt3EIrL9q_upmKLAd4NiqKFIURtkZO2mf8wbQCk-XxcA6B8RwkCKwmFmy_skqyiCheVY3cdPxhC8CofBCkiq3-1RVip2mRarPJVop24VcskwY5-_K71h-diF_Bn7pS5Mla0ZKLWHqh-r3CVzwLaXR2aurbz01sa-fQ3CpV7RvX7XxSMvJLI4MQTff_b0MTuWkfU1vgwxW_g_qh7xDcUpr0300y71SMn6v_cQqBMRTsr1oYK3ylsi4Omqk9jeVmqxAQ_F7mieKsxhWdUzK7NcvkmYkpYkkCfPlxCqedORG_uw590PcISMaEItfPUskIA46Ix02cUaPSV_-MgoyhkqBATz6ddSt_Vof4DKLsOCkXSATWZ6kMw/41f/64mtd_roRs6wz3Xs5bbHqA/h2/h8SOG5H4vH4cD95qmR3ZLmKulYoIx5hHFeB5MdZv62Q)
3️⃣ **_Michigan:_ Two Democrats win mayoral races, tying the state House **
In Michigan, after securing a Democratic trifecta in 2022, Democrats are now gearing up for special elections to fill two Democratic seats. [**In the meantime, the House is in a deadlock and all hands are on deck before the special elections →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDAE0OyaCWqf1UezdYmhY-27_cA2WKK-ysvBiO9Quy4c6zh4Rr0_vMrRErDqAQIIBzo_0i59Dp95edhzW329FknG2r_gD6CO79bbGOIDEM3H2k8mjH__ZFzcaU-BlLZmhIug2QP3O9w1Y5Cjp1HNdmVNMdEmXqiuHm0bTdGJLfmwErm2mLzNNv9pDpFi01No5rBjkS6aAyWDsTsCDBa3pauj_hkxcByV_imDWroXsp1XB3nsJDsZSIZvTqdN6gQBS7neoEsf-3Y2ojrgZ_JKfTwYqlg6fF468T4u0wB3V69ulviGX7nFFKsk3_g0AuLqm7YECEhtQVoiDSrfS9GWKc8HKwgrpk2pSraKGANg6JCFVZDw-knF5yQEjhulRXP-CPeb8bquiPaOCb-I7Azs1NYwp1c2cVFkP-BWGbWgGvJfYIeDmL2zzbbFfEcDwisuzIYk3R1Z_r1hVxELF0Wca6vMbFOPkGlGQG1JQ5f7lkrT1yqCll_F6jEjDp1B_3VvkqvyeZSjom1zOLRlSuwh4HaKFct1gOaE01CqD99hXTZaGKR2TKst8vKg4ftH5vdq47STXxqwS57Nl4wasSQyjIrnwZlvUmmLknhTc2zxfc_vQ3uuAA8U2dmOiD5HHdJK03mhlbwn1xHSVRd3_u3AaafJWH6oSa56_zAYvJXPvae7EG-41daux-cZ4AFHG5goNeBswAtqaTBRWaBcerveV1MMhAXrsJxTiZg7HsvDs3VBdw6OifbUwSia6N9x9xQX1DiJdiH8ySq0zfoCY9wkI-3dZtQgn3QQ6InkIWvfTXzPiXa2XYJAio22DV43DneLS6-MTSRjRvmOWxhISSQfNe-g/41f/64mtd_roRs6wz3Xs5bbHqA/h3/u5S6ssQUAunSXmlY1ufsm-2pRvFFvbJtGXzCVKJV1xs)
📖 **_Read:_ “How we won in Virginia” **

Friend,

Ronny Jackson here.

Just a few years ago, when I proudly served as Assistant to the **President and Chief Medical Advisor under President Donald J. Trump,** only brighter days seemed ahead for our nation. We had:
* **An economy that was BOOMING**
* **Gas prices were LOW**
* **A border that was SECURE**

clean_body: Help us get ready for some big fights in 2024 >> | | Team, Two years ago, we embarked on our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign, a $5 million initiative dedicated to safeguarding direct democracy and preserving the integrity of ballot initiatives. Today, our approach remains multifaceted: we're ready to litigate when required, spearhead aggressive "Vote No" campaigns against anti-democratic bills, and counter any suppressive measures that make their way to ballots. But the very core of our mission relies heavily on supporters like you. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Sadly, extremist politicians and vested interests are steadily eroding voting rights across our nation. Their tactics have evolved from voter suppression and redistricting to now targeting the significant strides we've made with ballot measures. As we approach the pivotal year of 2024, we anticipate even more intensified attacks on the ballot measure process. The stakes have never been higher, and we're preparing to meet this challenge head-on. = = Thanks for your help, The Fairness Project Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . name: Team Tina
subject: What’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

#

Peter, Tina knows how important the strength of her grassroots team is to her success as Governor. It was your support that got her elected, and now it’s your support that is helping her to make progress on key priorities and put Oregon on a brighter path. So now we’re calling on this team to take action in support of Tina once again, [_**by filling out our end-of-year priorities survey.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73650123/439188874/759621224?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgyZGZjNy0xNjg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlb19dU_aoqZ7et8BnW5-kWcpevHCG08j3BVw-v-yO8=&emci=c903edcd-4686-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=bb82dfc7-1687-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=15353729) This quick survey is an easy way for her to get a snapshot of what issues are at the top of your mind as we round out Tina’s first year in office. Friend, far-right extremists like Jim Jordan and Rick Scott have been scheming for _years_ to cut Social Security and other lifesaving programs like Medicare. Earlier this year, President Biden destroyed their hopes of passing cuts through Congress — but this fight is far from over.
Now, the Supreme Court has heard arguments on a case that could DOOM Social Security, Medicare, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau and so many other programs that American families rely on.
_Experts are warning that the Supreme Court's ruling could even "trigger a second Great Depression!"_
**We need Americans to make their voices heard loud and clear NOW to tell the extremists on the Court that we won't let them destroy these programs that millions of us count on. But our petition is missing 1,295 signatures — including yours! clean_body: the Supreme Court could END Social Security... | | | SCOTUS ALERT:Supreme Court set to rule on case that could END Social Security! | | Friend, far-right extremists like Jim Jordan and Rick Scott have been scheming for years to cut Social Security and other lifesaving programs like Medicare. Earlier this year, President Biden destroyed their hopes of passing cuts through Congress — but this fight is far from over. Now, the Supreme Court has heard arguments on a case that could DOOM Social Security, Medicare, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau and so many other programs that American families rely on. Experts are warning that the Supreme Court's ruling could even "trigger a second Great Depression!" We need Americans to make their voices heard loud and clear NOW to tell the extremists on the Court that we won't let them destroy these programs that millions of us count on. But our petition is missing 1,295 signatures — including yours! | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell Kroger no more pesticide-contaminated food
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130438?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop grocery giant Kroger from selling food grown with TOXIC pesticides!**[**Act now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130439?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Friend, right now, people are picking food grown with _**TOXIC PESTICIDES**_ off store shelves to feed their children and family members. They might not know that these chemicals have been linked to **cancer, learning disabilities, hormone disruption, and more!** Imagine spending your hard-earned money at the grocery store, carefully selecting fresh produce to create a nutritious meal for your family, only to later learn that the food might be contaminated with harmful pesticides. This is a reality that none of us should have to face. **Despite mounting evidence that toxic pesticides are harmful to people and the planet, Kroger, one of the nation’s largest grocery retailers, continues to sell pesticide-contaminated food to its customers.** Rather than commit to selling more _sustainably grown, healthy, and organic foods_ and shifting away from toxic pesticides, Kroger continues to prioritize profit over the well-being of people like you and me. [**Friend, please demand Kroger stop selling food grown with TOXIC PESTICIDES and protect the health of families across the country by 11:59pm TONIGHT! **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130440?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130441?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Glyphosate, a chemical found in many foods, has been linked to severe health impacts. A recent study found that _**80% of U.S. children and adults had traces of glyphosate in their bodies. That’s a staggering figure -- and children are especially vulnerable to pesticide health impacts.**_
It doesn’t have to be this way, Friend. Our food can be produced without toxic pesticides sustainably and at-scale, protecting our health and the health of our planet. **We need YOU to help push Kroger to act!** [**We need 4,782 more signatures to hit our goal! Send your message to Kroger and help fight toxic pesticides >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130442?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2130443?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting people from toxic pesticides,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: I’m a teacher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
and we need more of those in Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73650937/439191627/-849459103?refcode=ea.09535469-1a87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.09535469-1a87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTUzNTQ2OS0xYTg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=auXrpiM3CLpgD0-Nqy2puMD9eyqRF3ZFOjEsvMTN3Ro=&emci=489eddbc-8d85-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=09535469-1a87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=46764483)
---
Hey — I’m not your average Senate candidate. I’m not a lifelong politician, for starters — I’m a teacher. I went into the field of special education to give kids an even playing field. And as any good teacher does, I learned a lot from my students. I learned _quickly_ that there aren’t one-size-fits-all solutions to every problem, that actions speak louder than words, and that patience may be a virtue, but time’s a finite resource, too. **Honestly, it seems like Congress needs more leaders who’ve learned these lessons.** Right now, there’s too much chaos with too few results for everyday Americans. There’s a heck of a lot of talk, but very little substance. _My opponent knows all about that_ — Marsha Blackburn’s been in Congress for two decades, and what has she gotten done for Tennessee? _A whole lotta nothing._ **We can do better, Tennessee.** **_[So let’s teach Marsha a lesson or two about getting sh*t done. Please, chip in to help me defeat Marsha Blackburn and deliver real results for the people>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73650938/439191628/209297649?refcode=ea.09535469-1a87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.09535469-1a87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTUzNTQ2OS0xYTg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=auXrpiM3CLpgD0-Nqy2puMD9eyqRF3ZFOjEsvMTN3Ro=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73650939/439191629/209297649?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.09535469-1a87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.09535469-1a87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTUzNTQ2OS0xYTg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=auXrpiM3CLpgD0-Nqy2puMD9eyqRF3ZFOjEsvMTN3Ro=) | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73650940/439191630/209297649?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.09535469-1a87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.09535469-1a87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTUzNTQ2OS0xYTg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=auXrpiM3CLpgD0-Nqy2puMD9eyqRF3ZFOjEsvMTN3Ro=)

clean_body: and we need more of those in Congress. | Hey — I’m not your average Senate candidate. I’m not a lifelong politician, for starters — I’m a teacher. I went into the field of special education to give kids an even playing field. And as any good teacher does, I learned a lot from my students. I learned quickly that there aren’t one-size-fits-all solutions to every problem, that actions speak louder than words, and that patience may be a virtue, but time’s a finite resource, too. Honestly, it seems like Congress needs more leaders who’ve learned these lessons. Right now, there’s too much chaos with too few results for everyday Americans. There’s a heck of a lot of talk, but very little substance. My opponent knows all about that — Marsha Blackburn’s been in Congress for two decades, and what has she gotten done for Tennessee? A whole lotta nothing. We can do better, Tennessee. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you! Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. name: COURIER
subject: Help us name our TX newsroom
body:
We’re coming to Texas. And we need your help picking a name for our newest newsroom!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73651209/439192626/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJlOWU2MDQtMWM4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GzR_v6ub25v3CgSC6wZmjjGHQdeXKlWLdS-WICsgELQ=&emci=0de9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=1be9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
While historically seen as a Republican stronghold, Texas has shown itself to be a state in transition. Over the last few election cycles, Republicans have lost some ground in key races. For example, after winning election in 2012, Sen. Ted Cruz was _narrowly reelected_ in 2018 by a margin of 2.6 percentage points.
As 2024 approaches, we expect this trend to continue, which is why we’re happy to announce today: ⬇️
**[COURIER is coming to the Lone Star State!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73651210/439192627/-1847183197?contactdata=fFF0G4SJfeiQMuXptYx7A8ggeZmkfHMdVcgE3tMLPCnPXaAmv9fRqFvVsCP/rHsiyIoGhwsL69WR0dVbFjby4hYJNOr6pf9qqYcob3+jDX7RzXvbrYJy/v7KvXxgcwJD4PQGOxV+iRcS4OeTIf5P1ae+wZxPofNJ0hHZW37o9b8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJlOWU2MDQtMWM4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GzR_v6ub25v3CgSC6wZmjjGHQdeXKlWLdS-WICsgELQ=&emci=0de9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=1be9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)**
And it couldn’t come at a more urgent time. As Texas Republicans continue to mount attacks on reproductive rights, education, and democracy itself, COURIER is in a unique position to inform and engage Texas voters with the news they need to know.
As we work to open our TX newsroom, there’s one small detail we need to finalize. **_We need a name for our newest newsroom._**
**That’s where you come in, Peter.[Can you help support our mission of providing accessible, fact-based journalism by helping us name our Texas newsroom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73651211/439192628/-1847183197?contactdata=fFF0G4SJfeiQMuXptYx7A8ggeZmkfHMdVcgE3tMLPCnPXaAmv9fRqFvVsCP/rHsiyIoGhwsL69WR0dVbFjby4hYJNOr6pf9qqYcob3+jDX7RzXvbrYJy/v7KvXxgcwJD4PQGOxV+iRcS4OeTIf5P1ae+wZxPofNJ0hHZW37o9b8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJlOWU2MDQtMWM4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GzR_v6ub25v3CgSC6wZmjjGHQdeXKlWLdS-WICsgELQ=&emci=0de9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=1be9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)**
[Share your thoughts ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73651212/439192629/-1847183197?contactdata=fFF0G4SJfeiQMuXptYx7A8ggeZmkfHMdVcgE3tMLPCnPXaAmv9fRqFvVsCP/rHsiyIoGhwsL69WR0dVbFjby4hYJNOr6pf9qqYcob3+jDX7RzXvbrYJy/v7KvXxgcwJD4PQGOxV+iRcS4OeTIf5P1ae+wZxPofNJ0hHZW37o9b8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJlOWU2MDQtMWM4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GzR_v6ub25v3CgSC6wZmjjGHQdeXKlWLdS-WICsgELQ=&emci=0de9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=1be9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
Our network of newsrooms in nine (now soon to be ten!) key battleground states are committed to neutralizing misinformation in the spaces where it typically thrives by delivering quality reporting to the communities that need it the most.
But opening a newsroom isn’t easy. It takes time and resources to hire journalists and build a network of readers. However, before we do any of this, our newsroom will need a recognizable name. **[That’s why we’re asking: Will you share your thoughts on what we should name our TX newsroom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73651213/439192630/-1847183197?contactdata=fFF0G4SJfeiQMuXptYx7A8ggeZmkfHMdVcgE3tMLPCnPXaAmv9fRqFvVsCP/rHsiyIoGhwsL69WR0dVbFjby4hYJNOr6pf9qqYcob3+jDX7RzXvbrYJy/v7KvXxgcwJD4PQGOxV+iRcS4OeTIf5P1ae+wZxPofNJ0hHZW37o9b8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJlOWU2MDQtMWM4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GzR_v6ub25v3CgSC6wZmjjGHQdeXKlWLdS-WICsgELQ=&emci=0de9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=1be9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)**
[Share your thoughts ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73651214/439192631/-1847183197?contactdata=fFF0G4SJfeiQMuXptYx7A8ggeZmkfHMdVcgE3tMLPCnPXaAmv9fRqFvVsCP/rHsiyIoGhwsL69WR0dVbFjby4hYJNOr6pf9qqYcob3+jDX7RzXvbrYJy/v7KvXxgcwJD4PQGOxV+iRcS4OeTIf5P1ae+wZxPofNJ0hHZW37o9b8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJlOWU2MDQtMWM4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GzR_v6ub25v3CgSC6wZmjjGHQdeXKlWLdS-WICsgELQ=&emci=0de9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=1be9e604-1c87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
Thank you for sharing!

More to come,

— COURIER

clean_body: We’re coming to Texas. And we need your help picking a name for our newest newsroom! Peter, While historically seen as a Republican stronghold, Texas has shown itself to be a state in transition. Over the last few election cycles, Republicans have lost some ground in key races. For example, after winning election in 2012, Sen. Ted Cruz was narrowly reelected in 2018 by a margin of 2.6 percentage points. As 2024 approaches, we expect this trend to continue, which is why we’re happy to announce today: ⬇️ And it couldn’t come at a more urgent time. As Texas Republicans continue to mount attacks on reproductive rights, education, and democracy itself, COURIER is in a unique position to inform and engage Texas voters with the news they need to know. As we work to open our TX newsroom, there’s one small detail we need to finalize. We need a name for our newest newsroom. That’s where you come in, Peter. Our network of newsrooms in nine (now soon to be ten!) key battleground states are committed to neutralizing misinformation in the spaces where it typically thrives by delivering quality reporting to the communities that need it the most. But opening a newsroom isn’t easy. It takes time and resources to hire journalists and build a network of readers. However, before we do any of this, our newsroom will need a recognizable name. Thank you for sharing! More to come, — COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A game of shame and blame
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Their MO is to try to shame and blame — and elect a Republican majority.
#
Peter, have you heard the latest on AIPAC's plans?
If not, let me catch you up:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47617?refcode=em20231119-3183&t=1&akid=3183%2E420207%2EzvGqsU)
**Let's say it out loud: AIPAC backs extreme election deniers for election,_and then goes after people of color_ — most of whom are women — who dare to do our jobs and fight for our constituents. **
Their MO is to shame and blame in order to **elect a Republican majority.**
AIPAC's huge investment means we need to raise our own funds in order to counter their massive spending.
But we know that, with the support of our grassroots movement, **our progressive champions WILL win because they work for the people and stand up for our democracy.**
[**Are you ready to mobilize our grassroots power to support our progressive movement against these fights? If so, please consider chipping in $3 or whatever you're able to give to strengthen our forces.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47617?refcode=em20231119-3183&t=2&akid=3183%2E420207%2EzvGqsU)

Ted Cruz is the guy who fled to Cancún in 2021 while his Texas constituents faced a disastrous winter storm. He's the guy who spends more time being Trump's lapdog, chasing media headlines, and fearmongering about a culture war rather than actually delivering for Texans.

Colin Allred has been delivering for Texans in the House for nearly five years now. **He prioritizes legislation over headlines and real issues over buzz words.** Colin already holds a safe seat in Texas but he knows that __Ted Cruz needs to be stopped.__ He's someone who fights for Texas and fights for democracy — not petty political fights.

**Peter, it's been 33 years since a Democrat held a statewide position in Texas.** It's more than time to end the drought, and we know Colin Allred is the man for the job. He's ready to secure the Democratic majority for the Senate in 2024 and fight for all Texans and Americans.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Let's get real, Peter — Ted Cruz is a joke. He's a sad excuse of a U.S. senator and it's ridiculous that he's the face of Texas in Congress. The good news: He's up for reelection next year. Our path to maintaining and expanding our Senate majority starts with Rep. Colin Allred. He's running for Senate in Texas, he’s endorsed by The Collective PAC, and he's ready to beat out Ted Cruz once and for all. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Ted Cruz is the guy who fled to Cancún in 2021 while his Texas constituents faced a disastrous winter storm. He's the guy who spends more time being Trump's lapdog, chasing media headlines, and fearmongering about a culture war rather than actually delivering for Texans. Colin Allred has been delivering for Texans in the House for nearly five years now. He prioritizes legislation over headlines and real issues over buzz words. Colin already holds a safe seat in Texas but he knows that Ted Cruz needs to be stopped. He's someone who fights for Texas and fights for democracy — not petty political fights. Peter, it's been 33 years since a Democrat held a statewide position in Texas. It's more than time to end the drought, and we know Colin Allred is the man for the job. He's ready to secure the Democratic majority for the Senate in 2024 and fight for all Texans and Americans. — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. Fellow American,
I know you’ve been getting a ton of emails from me, but you have to understand the gravity of the situation.

[**While House Republicans are trying to keep the People’s House open and make it easier for Americans to live in Joe Biden's America...**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=524e6905895f4405b7e7058288fc009f&_e=ButDR7XRYsp3uEa9FkScysXqsgXcQNVuHVJjvla9p68eBWoNkfbjLsFBI-80hTbb1GLPhRSpLMcMkj53a5J7nFYUuEZiNkt1j9uuyLBNRAEm8SUw-4Ig5tyR1-YbrSotpIx5Qw4v8AOCWECXOIo_cAgyWK9Pn6RQdGtJ7xbB8YH_WvFGQc2ai40fNELDySXAZs0F_VCMI0nQZG28BtRkTZpyp_i34EHG4DFOliEklEcCoM39iGJ_hxGhsQ65C3UGniF7Ewq_Dlk2EQFoSdJIZ7OxfpWyGdx_M9X3d_cHDX032f832uN3zyKGSqneJYmuMIfBrldKAWTud8Z34wew52edMzFothFGR8klDW_MSW8o6SCivxteCLrvb6as31FAi0jB9la4jQD4mvhjW3x4JQ%3D%3D) **_Democrats are raking in cash so they can reclaim the majority and give Nancy Pelosi back the gavel._**

**This is what we’re dealing with:** Pelosi and her gaggle of far-Left Democrats are calling on liberal mega-donors to flood vulnerable House races with cash and buy up seats in purple districts.

The Democrat machine will do anything and everything to restore totalitarian control in Washington.

Republican candidates across the country are relying on me to help fund their races, provide leadership, and ultimately secure the House majority, _but our coffers are drained._

name: Katie Porter
subject: New recipes for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Sure, it’s no banana bread or black bean soup.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33399%2E3422442%2EqTAYHt)
Derek, as you can imagine, being a single mom, Congresswoman, and Senate candidate means I have to do a _lot_ of planning.
_Heck_ , meal prep alone can be an ordeal, between planning each week’s recipes, putting together the shopping list, getting the groceries, actually doing the cooking, etc.
But look, I’m not emailing you today to talk about my meal prep—I’m emailing you to talk about my recipes to better our country.
[**I’ll share one of those cards in a moment—but first, if you want to help me unrig our economy, shake up the Senate, and build a strong California, will you pitch in and support my campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231119-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_KPR_20231119_V1_F&refcode2=33399_3422442_qTAYHt&akid=33399%2E3422442%2EqTAYHt)
Alright, here’s what I have for you:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231119-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_KPR_20231119_V1_F&refcode2=33399_3422442_qTAYHt&akid=33399%2E3422442%2EqTAYHt)
Sure, it’s no famous banana bread or black bean soup, but this is _definitely_ one of the best recipes I’ve ever come up with.
**[But, like every great recipe, I need all of the ingredients first—and the most important one here is winning this race for the US Senate. Will you do your part and help me win by chipping in to support my campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231119-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_KPR_20231119_V1_F&refcode2=33399_3422442_qTAYHt&akid=33399%2E3422442%2EqTAYHt) **
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231119-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_KPR_20231119_V1_F&refcode2=33399_3422442_qTAYHt&akid=33399%2E3422442%2EqTAYHt)
If you’re on the fence about giving, keep in mind that your gift today will really count—because, just like when I go grocery shopping, my campaign is going to stretch every dollar as far as it can!
Thanks!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_KPR_20231119_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33399_3422442_qTAYHt&akid=33399%2E3422442%2EqTAYHt)**

Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks is in trouble; I need you to see this message before it's too late. Currently, she's fighting tooth and nail to make our country strong and proud, but unfortunately, the Democrats are driving attention to her race because they want to outspend and unseat her.

**This is BAD NEWS. We can 't afford to lose a SINGLE seat in the House of Representatives during the 2024 election. There's too much on the line.
**

**
| [**RUSH $25**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=4e016aaaab13487dbabcc833b7482007&_e=SfYpkbiiMj2PivrrX1koqZRF3S5MEAiGhGe317BeepSjX4fErPK4VGUC1qQzsAbTCRvPjcER7uXC78DSNoPGOH7Hkc1teTeHZum6fmwcLZpQJswZ8NAdrGyj-9-N23leaNCgJd10gjq5PuCR4XS2AEhYFvl2kqCVBfZDDZalLQtr8FZergvIQQb5cse1PNulg8gvGMcdp1E59ycvkoXJqcbwJD1X-tdHpr_gc_pIc_xG6C5KIWsZ-fsb-2kUv_pKfXMipHXKvK7jKFeZ0f3G08ZfBZRwsWmUzcR9ROVxMI29J4HexAfsZLS8IuWe1LVL)
---

Trust me when I say beating the radical Left and taking back Washington is possible, but we must band together and work to show the Left a unified conservative front.

**I 'm asking you -- can you help my friend and dedicated conservative warrior, Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks, reach her upcoming deadline?
**
[**RUSH ANYTHING FOR MARIANNETTE**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=4e016aaaab13487dbabcc833b7482007&_e=SfYpkbiiMj2PivrrX1koqZRF3S5MEAiGhGe317BeepSjX4fErPK4VGUC1qQzsAbTCRvPjcER7uXC78DSNoPGOH7Hkc1teTeHZum6fmwcLZpQJswZ8NAdrGyj-9-N23leaNCgJd10gjq5PuCR4XS2AIJyqDmvOh-TDGTU18AYUNfj4Ut2sJ15lj5RDON_zIEIDr8_YZjYgCO_2hosZt_vet_rH8bbJ5AQo9IU4wAXMJBkYD17yVZOYg2mgHm3IG14CXlNJz5H0b8RcOIRSKh2-PE5Ov1D7Mzlxnh86flOVqvvHWPQXTt352nXZ_Vp0thT)

Your support is extremely important in ensuring conservatives are ready for the 2024 election. **[We can't do this without your help.](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=4e016aaaab13487dbabcc833b7482007&_e=SfYpkbiiMj2PivrrX1koqZRF3S5MEAiGhGe317BeepSjX4fErPK4VGUC1qQzsAbTCRvPjcER7uXC78DSNoPGOH7Hkc1teTeHZum6fmwcLZpQJswZ8NAdrGyj-9-N23leaNCgJd10gjq5PuCR4XS2AERnV76EaqQFn00Wj0qjqb_1aYW3aCjvkzEAXnDfvV0mqK0iZFJBky8Uy4QeBySAGPV77TITzYTWEVMlwc2Q5Xgqr2zDQaPTkHMH8O-qNtYxcowTJsquqXzi2Bb4snrOa-Nstja6uF-pyfg42C0CxLwRc9fBxgEccomDzcwsBChD)**
