name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! 2023 Victories, $100M vs. The Squad, Peace Candidate Barbara Lee, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Progressives Victories in 2023! | $100 Million vs The Squad |
Peace Candidate Barbara Lee for Senate | Make Amazon Pay Black Friday |
Transforming the Mass Dem Party | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12479?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1011&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12479?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1012&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]Make a statement and support Our Revolution’s critical work to elect
progressive leaders who will fight alongside our movement for economic
justice, social justice, and racial justice. Pitch in $10 today and we’ll
send you these three new stickers as our thanks!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1013&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1014&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

BIG NEWS — Barbara Lee triumphed Saturday in the CA Democratic Party
endorsement vote for the U.S. Senate seat in California — beating out
opponents Adam Schiff and Katie Porter!

Our Revolution leaders and activists were with Barbara Lee at the
convention, where she won 42% of the delegates in the endorsement vote for
the U.S. Senate race.

“I am incredibly proud and honored to receive the support of so many
hard-working Democratic Party delegates,” said Congresswoman Lee.

“From day one, this campaign has been focused on delivering the
progressive agenda that working people in California deserve: a Green New
Deal, single-payer healthcare, and economic, racial, social and
environmental justice for all,” she said.

“Our momentum is picking up speed, and tonight’s vote is evidence that our
movement is touching people across the Golden State. The people want a
tried and tested progressive with the record to prove it. I’m ready to
deliver.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1015&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Thanks to our grassroots supporters, Our Revolution had a big showing at
the convention, holding exciting progressive events with Barbara Lee and
helping to organize delegates to back her candidacy!

On Friday, we joined her for the grand opening of her booth at the
Convention Center and hosted our Progressive Party with CA Working
Families Party, then kept it going with a special reception with Barbara
Lee in downtown Sacramento — followed by a big volunteer event on
Saturday!

Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12497?t=1016&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]rallied the crowd
to keep growing the upswell of progressive energy behind Barbara, which we
see paying off with this major endorsement from the state party delegates!

For more about Barbara and to volunteer with Our Revolution’s organizing
team, please visit our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12373?t=1017&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]Progressives for Barbara Lee website and sign up
today!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1018&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

2023 VICTORIES! Our Revolution endorsed more than 100 candidates for
elected office at all levels of government, and over 74% won, thanks to
our grassroots supporters and activists!

Bernie Sanders started Our Revolution to engage folks in the political
process and grow power from the bottom up — and that’s exactly what we’re
doing.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1019&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Our candidates ran strong progressive campaigns, and your donations
powered millions of direct voter contacts — email, texts, calls, and more
— to mobilize voters to elect progressives coast to coast.

In his post-election analysis, John Nichols said on [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12489?t=1020&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]Democracy Now that
Tuesday’s results show “a much more progressive country than a lot of the
pundits would tell you. In election after election, people voted for
abortion rights, labor rights, and progressive values.”

“This is a very powerful reminder that there’s a route forward. But it
isn’t a route of concession,” Nichols said. “It’s a route of activism and
engagement with communities that are rising up and saying they want a
different direction, a more progressive direction, for this country.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12470?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1021&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]Read all about our 2023 victories below - but first! - if you can,
please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up and gear up for the big
elections ahead in 2024!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1022&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Looking to the battles ahead in 2024, we know we must defeat the far right
in the Presidential election while also electing more progressives to
Congress — folks like Barbara Lee, who will be a powerful partner for
Bernie Sanders in the Senate.

Our movement will also need to unify to defend progressive allies who have
become a target of powerful lobbying groups hoping to oust them from
office.

AIPAC is getting ready to spend over $100M to try to replace pro-peace
members of Congress like Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and Ayanna Pressley —
at a time when 66% of Americans want our government to work toward a
ceasefire.

Last week, the Republican-led House of Representatives voted to censure
Rashida Tlaib - the only Palestinian-American in Congress - for her
support for civilians in Gaza and the West Bank, which has earned her
relentless slander from her colleagues in Washington and the press.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12491?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1023&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]SIGN NOW to protect our hard-won progressive caucus from cynical dark
money and rightwing attacks. The working class can't afford to lose the
power of these seats.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1024&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

In September of 2001, Barbara Lee cast the lone “No” vote in Congress
against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She endured death threats,
hate mail, and media slander for years. But history vindicated her.

Today, Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California
calling for a ceasefire in Gaza. Check out this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12238?t=1025&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]LA Times article on
why Barbara is the Peace Candidate in this race compared to her opponents
Katie Porter and Adam Schiff.

Join us in standing with her, and sign up to volunteer with Our
Revolution’s team to help elect Barbara Lee to the Senate. Election Day is
March 4th!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12492?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1026&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]VOLUNTEER FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1027&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

We’rve added Pittsburgh to our list of progressive cities with the
election of Sara Innamorato into the powerful seat of Allegheny County
Executive.

We backed Sara as she beat big money back in May to win the primary and
now she forms a progressive trifecta in the city with Mayor Ed Gainey and
U.S. Rep Summer Lee, whom she ran alongside successfully for PA House back
in 2018 with Our Revolution’s support.

As County Exec, Sara will lead the second-largest county in Pennsylvania
and have the power to help protect abortion care, push for county-wide
housing, and address human rights violations in the county jail.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1028&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Great news out of Virginia, all of our candidates won — holding the State
Senate, flipping the State House, and forming a bulwark against Gov. Glenn
Youngkin to maintain Virginia as a bastion for reproductive rights in the
South.

Winners include Nadarius Clark, Rozia Henson, Adele McClure, and Joshua
Cole for Virginia State House; and Jennifer Carrol Foy, Stella Pekarsky,
and Lashrecse Aird for State Senate.

We didn’t overlook any progressive candidates in Virginia, including Steve
Descano who won Fairfax County Commonwealth Attorney, and Parisa
Dehghani-Tafti who won Arlington County Commonwealth Attorney.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1029&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Abortion wins in Ohio! Organizers fought hard to get out the vote and shut
down the rightwing playbook — passing Ohio Issue 1 to enshrine abortion
rights in the state Constitution.

After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a small but loud group of
deep-pocketed extremists took to the states, determined to gut abortion
laws. But the resistance has been successful.

Marijuana legalization also passed in Ohio, showing that Democrats need
young folks and progressives to hit the ground and drive voter turnout.

Looking ahead to 2024, we’re already kicking off organizing around Fair
Maps to fend off Republican gerrymandering schemes in the Buckeye State.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1030&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Our Revolution candidates are taking over city councils in Ohio!

Congrats to OR members Trevor Elkins, who won Newburgh Heights Mayor, and
Kim Mann, the newest member of Fairview Park City Council! Jan-Michele
Lemon Kearney also won a seat on the Cincinnati City Council.

And, there was an exciting victory for our entire slate in Hilliard, Ohio,
where progressives have now taken control of the City Council, including
Cynthia Vermillion, Emily Cole, and Greg Betts!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1031&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

“Progressives took control of the Minneapolis City Council” - [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12493?t=1032&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]Star
Tribune

All 9 Our Revolution Twin Cities candidates won, taking over the City
Council in Minneapolis: Jeremiah Ellison, Elliot Payne, Jason Chavez,
Aisha Chughtai, Katie Cashman, Soren Stevenson, and Robin Wonsley.

In St. Paul, progressives snagged City Council victories with Mitra
Jalali, Nelsi Yang, Anika Bowie, Saura Jost, and Cheniqua Johnson.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1033&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

We’re also growing progressive power in Duluth, MN, where Our Revolution
candidate Wendy Durrwachter won a tight race for City Council. If we win
one more seat, Democrats will have control of the council.

Wendy is a single mother, restaurant worker, and accomplished composer —
and she will bring a necessary working class perspective to the council:
"When something needs to be done, I step up and do it. I’m not afraid to
call out those who abuse their power."

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1034&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Victories in the Seattle area!

As corporations broaden their dark money fundraising networks into city
council and school board races, we need working-class champions ready to
confront them head-on.

That’s why we were proud to endorse this winning slate of progressive
candidates in Washington state! Our slate winners include Charles Adkins
for Everett School Board, Tammy Morales for Seattle City Council, and
Teresa Mosqueda and Jorge Baron King for King County Council.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1035&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Our Revolution stood with Izola Shaw in her run for Rockville City Council
At-Large and we are proud of her victory. Our organizers made more than
15,000 voter contacts in her district and turned out the progressive vote
for this great candidate!

OR Member Izola Shaw was chair of the Montgomery County Racial Equity and
Social Justice Advisory Committee, helped found the County’s Racial Equity
Network (MORE), and helped pass the Racial Equity and Social Justice Act.

She has worked with the County Executive on public works, policing, rent
stabilization, and environmental protection through the Rockville City
Academy.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1036&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Our entire slate of candidates won in New York City, making the council
even more progressive to advance our priorities in the Big Apple!

These winners include Carlina Rivera, Althea Stevens, Amanda Farias,
Tiffany Caban, Lincoln Restler, Jennifer Gutierrez, Crystal Hudson, Chi
Osse, Sandy Nurse, Alexa Aviles, Shahana Hanif, and Rita Joseph.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1037&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

And, the whole Our Revolution-endorsed Ithaca Solidarity Slate was
victorious — Jorge DeFendini and Phoebe Brown won re-election to the
Ithaca Common Council, and Kayla Matos won her race to join them on the
council.

This is exciting news out of Ithaca, where these progressive council
members can make a real difference in the everyday lives of working-class
folks in the community.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1038&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

In Onondaga County, Maurice Brown won a seat in the legislature with a
pledge to confront vital community issues like the lead crisis, high
housing costs, and unreliable public transportation.

These are the races that determine the direction of cities and help us
build progressive power at the level of government closest to people’s
lives.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1039&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Our Revolution member Jared Evans was re-elected to the Indianapolis City
Council with 53% of the vote in a district that Trump Republicans won in
2022 and which city media predicted would go Republican again.

We’re getting many Republicans to vote Democrat for the first time because
progressive policies offer real material improvements to people’s lives
and because of the direct voter mobilization operation that our grassroots
donors make possible.

Jared has been a strong progressive ally in Indianapolis, fighting for
higher wages, good jobs, and more for the blue-collar neighborhoods he
serves in District 17 — and we are proud to have his back!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1040&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Our Revolution endorsed Sheila Jackson Lee for Houston Mayor, and on
November 8th she got enough votes to make it to the runoff against John
Whitmire — a Democratic defector who sides with radical Republicans on
voter suppression and racist policing policies.

U.S. Rep. Jackson Lee is a long-time member of the Congressional
Progressive Caucus, and she’s a fighter for Medicare for All, the Raise
the Wage Act, and the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act.

As the next Mayor, she’s committed to promoting policies to expand
healthcare, create good jobs, increase affordable housing, promote safe
and reliable public transportation, and protect the city from climate
disasters.

She’s also been endorsed by SEIU Texas, the Communications Workers of
America, and other key Our Revolution allies.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1041&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Congrats to the Our Revolution Medford slate! OR members and progressives
won big for the Medford City Council in Massachusetts: Anna Callahan, Zach
Bears, Kit Collins, Justin Tseng, Emily Lazzaro, and Matt Leming.

Also, for the Cambridge School Board, winners include Richard Harding,
Jose Luis Rojas Villarreal, David Weinstein, and Rachel Weinstein.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1042&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

The above wins from last Tuesday come on top of major victories earlier
this year as Our Revolution has been blazing a path for progressive
cities.

In April, we helped elect progressive Mayor Brandon Johnson to take the
helm in Chicago - where he already delivered on a promise to raise wages
for tipped workers in the city.

Our Revolution teamed up with One Fair Wage this year to make sure
everyone gets a living wage and tipped workers aren’t left behind.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1043&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

And, our organizers were key to winning a progressive majority in St.
Louis with new Board President Megan Green joining progressive mayor
Tishaura Jones in Cori Bush’s congressional district.

They’re taking on developers in a fight for affordable housing, and
they’ve already passed a universal basic income pilot program!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1044&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1045&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

This Thanksgiving, we are grateful for the solidarity of all our movement
allies here and around the world.

This Black Friday, workers from around the world will stand shoulder to
shoulder in a global day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay its workers,
pay its taxes, and pay for its climate damage.

Keep an eye out for strikes and protests in over [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12494?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1046&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]30 countries for
dignity on the job and a sustainable future for all!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1047&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Our Revolution partner U.S. Rep. Ro Khanna has introduced the State-Based
Universal Health Care Act!

This is a bill that would allow states to develop their single-payer
healthcare plans! This is instrumental in the pathway toward a federal
Medicare For All program.

State by state, we are fighting for universal healthcare, but we’re also
partnering with Ro Khanna and Bernie Sanders in a push to end medical
debt, stop hospital price-gouging, and lower drug prices.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1048&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1049&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Our Revolution Massachusetts organizers just won the state Democratic
Party’s support for Medicare for All, union organizing rights for state
house staff, and an audit of the state legislature!

Meanwhile, resolutions calling for a majority-elected Party leadership,
more transparent governance, and incentives to get “dark money” out of
primaries were defeated — but with major declines in party membership, the
fight for a more democratic, grassroots-oriented party continues.

“We are thrilled that four resolutions were adopted by the state
committee,” said Michael Gilbreath, a Wayland Democrat and leader of Our
Revolution MetroWest. “However, we have to keep fighting for a more
active, democratic, and transparent Democratic Party.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1050&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

Corporate donors are planning to spend more than ever against our
progressive candidates next year because they know the working class is
taking back power. Donate now to grow our election fund so we can beat
back oligarchy with democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12346?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1052&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]PITCH IN NOW FOR 2024!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12479?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1053&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ][IMG]

Cost of food and housing continue to skyrocket, and wealth inequality
continues to explode thanks to billionaires and corporations rigging our
political system.

We need more voices speaking up and fighting back — on the streets and in
the halls of power. That’s why we’re organizing the progressive movement
and electing progressive leaders coast to coast who will actually get to
work for the American people instead of serving Big Pharma, Wall Street,
defense contractors, and other special interests.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12479?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1054&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]Make a statement and help support Our Revolution’s critical work by
pitching in $10 here to get these three new stickers for the price of one!

You can help elect Barbara Lee to the Senate from anywhere in the country
— making calls, sharing on social media, and more. If you're in
California, you can help by knocking on doors or reaching out to friends -
even hosting or attending a house party!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11202?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231119_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1056&akid=4917%2E5885482%2ErMbDsa ]We invite you to join Our Revolution’s Progressives for Barbara Lee's
organizing team. Let's make this a people-powered campaign and send
Barbara Lee to the Senate.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Progressives Victories in 2023! | $100 Million vs The Squad | Peace Candidate Barbara Lee for Senate | Make Amazon Pay Black Friday | Transforming the Mass Dem Party | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]Make a statement and support Our Revolution’s critical work to elect progressive leaders who will fight alongside our movement for economic justice, social justice, and racial justice. Pitch in $10 today and we’ll send you these three new stickers as our thanks! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BIG NEWS — Barbara Lee triumphed Saturday in the CA Democratic Party endorsement vote for the U.S. Senate seat in California — beating out opponents Adam Schiff and Katie Porter! Our Revolution leaders and activists were with Barbara Lee at the convention, where she won 42% of the delegates in the endorsement vote for the U.S. Senate race. “I am incredibly proud and honored to receive the support of so many hard-working Democratic Party delegates,” said Congresswoman Lee. “From day one, this campaign has been focused on delivering the progressive agenda that working people in California deserve: a Green New Deal, single-payer healthcare, and economic, racial, social and environmental justice for all,” she said. “Our momentum is picking up speed, and tonight’s vote is evidence that our movement is touching people across the Golden State. The people want a tried and tested progressive with the record to prove it. I’m ready to deliver.” [ ][IMG] Thanks to our grassroots supporters, Our Revolution had a big showing at the convention, holding exciting progressive events with Barbara Lee and helping to organize delegates to back her candidacy! On Friday, we joined her for the grand opening of her booth at the Convention Center and hosted our Progressive Party with CA Working Families Party, then kept it going with a special reception with Barbara Lee in downtown Sacramento — followed by a big volunteer event on Saturday! Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese [ ]rallied the crowd to keep growing the upswell of progressive energy behind Barbara, which we see paying off with this major endorsement from the state party delegates! For more about Barbara and to volunteer with Our Revolution’s organizing team, please visit our [ ]Progressives for Barbara Lee website and sign up today! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] 2023 VICTORIES! Our Revolution endorsed more than 100 candidates for elected office at all levels of government, and over 74% won, thanks to our grassroots supporters and activists! Bernie Sanders started Our Revolution to engage folks in the political process and grow power from the bottom up — and that’s exactly what we’re doing. [ ][IMG] Our candidates ran strong progressive campaigns, and your donations powered millions of direct voter contacts — email, texts, calls, and more — to mobilize voters to elect progressives coast to coast. In his post-election analysis, John Nichols said on [ ]Democracy Now that Tuesday’s results show “a much more progressive country than a lot of the pundits would tell you. In election after election, people voted for abortion rights, labor rights, and progressive values.” “This is a very powerful reminder that there’s a route forward. But it isn’t a route of concession,” Nichols said. “It’s a route of activism and engagement with communities that are rising up and saying they want a different direction, a more progressive direction, for this country.” [ ]Read all about our 2023 victories below - but first! - if you can, please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up and gear up for the big elections ahead in 2024! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Looking to the battles ahead in 2024, we know we must defeat the far right in the Presidential election while also electing more progressives to Congress — folks like Barbara Lee, who will be a powerful partner for Bernie Sanders in the Senate. Our movement will also need to unify to defend progressive allies who have become a target of powerful lobbying groups hoping to oust them from office. AIPAC is getting ready to spend over $100M to try to replace pro-peace members of Congress like Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and Ayanna Pressley — at a time when 66% of Americans want our government to work toward a ceasefire. Last week, the Republican-led House of Representatives voted to censure Rashida Tlaib - the only Palestinian-American in Congress - for her support for civilians in Gaza and the West Bank, which has earned her relentless slander from her colleagues in Washington and the press. [ ]SIGN NOW to protect our hard-won progressive caucus from cynical dark money and rightwing attacks. The working class can't afford to lose the power of these seats. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] In September of 2001, Barbara Lee cast the lone “No” vote in Congress against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She endured death threats, hate mail, and media slander for years. But history vindicated her. Today, Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California calling for a ceasefire in Gaza. Check out this [ ]LA Times article on why Barbara is the Peace Candidate in this race compared to her opponents Katie Porter and Adam Schiff. Join us in standing with her, and sign up to volunteer with Our Revolution’s team to help elect Barbara Lee to the Senate. Election Day is March 4th! [ ]VOLUNTEER FOR BARBARA LEE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We’rve added Pittsburgh to our list of progressive cities with the election of Sara Innamorato into the powerful seat of Allegheny County Executive. We backed Sara as she beat big money back in May to win the primary and now she forms a progressive trifecta in the city with Mayor Ed Gainey and U.S. Rep Summer Lee, whom she ran alongside successfully for PA House back in 2018 with Our Revolution’s support. As County Exec, Sara will lead the second-largest county in Pennsylvania and have the power to help protect abortion care, push for county-wide housing, and address human rights violations in the county jail. [ ][IMG] Great news out of Virginia, all of our candidates won — holding the State Senate, flipping the State House, and forming a bulwark against Gov. Glenn Youngkin to maintain Virginia as a bastion for reproductive rights in the South. Winners include Nadarius Clark, Rozia Henson, Adele McClure, and Joshua Cole for Virginia State House; and Jennifer Carrol Foy, Stella Pekarsky, and Lashrecse Aird for State Senate. We didn’t overlook any progressive candidates in Virginia, including Steve Descano who won Fairfax County Commonwealth Attorney, and Parisa Dehghani-Tafti who won Arlington County Commonwealth Attorney. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Abortion wins in Ohio! Organizers fought hard to get out the vote and shut down the rightwing playbook — passing Ohio Issue 1 to enshrine abortion rights in the state Constitution. After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a small but loud group of deep-pocketed extremists took to the states, determined to gut abortion laws. But the resistance has been successful. Marijuana legalization also passed in Ohio, showing that Democrats need young folks and progressives to hit the ground and drive voter turnout. Looking ahead to 2024, we’re already kicking off organizing around Fair Maps to fend off Republican gerrymandering schemes in the Buckeye State. [ ][IMG] Our Revolution candidates are taking over city councils in Ohio! Congrats to OR members Trevor Elkins, who won Newburgh Heights Mayor, and Kim Mann, the newest member of Fairview Park City Council! Jan-Michele Lemon Kearney also won a seat on the Cincinnati City Council. And, there was an exciting victory for our entire slate in Hilliard, Ohio, where progressives have now taken control of the City Council, including Cynthia Vermillion, Emily Cole, and Greg Betts! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] “Progressives took control of the Minneapolis City Council” - [ ]Star Tribune All 9 Our Revolution Twin Cities candidates won, taking over the City Council in Minneapolis: Jeremiah Ellison, Elliot Payne, Jason Chavez, Aisha Chughtai, Katie Cashman, Soren Stevenson, and Robin Wonsley. In St. Paul, progressives snagged City Council victories with Mitra Jalali, Nelsi Yang, Anika Bowie, Saura Jost, and Cheniqua Johnson. [ ][IMG] We’re also growing progressive power in Duluth, MN, where Our Revolution candidate Wendy Durrwachter won a tight race for City Council. If we win one more seat, Democrats will have control of the council. Wendy is a single mother, restaurant worker, and accomplished composer — and she will bring a necessary working class perspective to the council: "When something needs to be done, I step up and do it. I’m not afraid to call out those who abuse their power." ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Victories in the Seattle area! As corporations broaden their dark money fundraising networks into city council and school board races, we need working-class champions ready to confront them head-on. That’s why we were proud to endorse this winning slate of progressive candidates in Washington state! Our slate winners include Charles Adkins for Everett School Board, Tammy Morales for Seattle City Council, and Teresa Mosqueda and Jorge Baron King for King County Council. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution stood with Izola Shaw in her run for Rockville City Council At-Large and we are proud of her victory. Our organizers made more than 15,000 voter contacts in her district and turned out the progressive vote for this great candidate! OR Member Izola Shaw was chair of the Montgomery County Racial Equity and Social Justice Advisory Committee, helped found the County’s Racial Equity Network (MORE), and helped pass the Racial Equity and Social Justice Act. She has worked with the County Executive on public works, policing, rent stabilization, and environmental protection through the Rockville City Academy. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our entire slate of candidates won in New York City, making the council even more progressive to advance our priorities in the Big Apple! These winners include Carlina Rivera, Althea Stevens, Amanda Farias, Tiffany Caban, Lincoln Restler, Jennifer Gutierrez, Crystal Hudson, Chi Osse, Sandy Nurse, Alexa Aviles, Shahana Hanif, and Rita Joseph. [ ][IMG] And, the whole Our Revolution-endorsed Ithaca Solidarity Slate was victorious — Jorge DeFendini and Phoebe Brown won re-election to the Ithaca Common Council, and Kayla Matos won her race to join them on the council. This is exciting news out of Ithaca, where these progressive council members can make a real difference in the everyday lives of working-class folks in the community. [ ][IMG] In Onondaga County, Maurice Brown won a seat in the legislature with a pledge to confront vital community issues like the lead crisis, high housing costs, and unreliable public transportation. These are the races that determine the direction of cities and help us build progressive power at the level of government closest to people’s lives. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution member Jared Evans was re-elected to the Indianapolis City Council with 53% of the vote in a district that Trump Republicans won in 2022 and which city media predicted would go Republican again. We’re getting many Republicans to vote Democrat for the first time because progressive policies offer real material improvements to people’s lives and because of the direct voter mobilization operation that our grassroots donors make possible. Jared has been a strong progressive ally in Indianapolis, fighting for higher wages, good jobs, and more for the blue-collar neighborhoods he serves in District 17 — and we are proud to have his back! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution endorsed Sheila Jackson Lee for Houston Mayor, and on November 8th she got enough votes to make it to the runoff against John Whitmire — a Democratic defector who sides with radical Republicans on voter suppression and racist policing policies. U.S. Rep. Jackson Lee is a long-time member of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, and she’s a fighter for Medicare for All, the Raise the Wage Act, and the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. As the next Mayor, she’s committed to promoting policies to expand healthcare, create good jobs, increase affordable housing, promote safe and reliable public transportation, and protect the city from climate disasters. She’s also been endorsed by SEIU Texas, the Communications Workers of America, and other key Our Revolution allies. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Congrats to the Our Revolution Medford slate! OR members and progressives won big for the Medford City Council in Massachusetts: Anna Callahan, Zach Bears, Kit Collins, Justin Tseng, Emily Lazzaro, and Matt Leming. Also, for the Cambridge School Board, winners include Richard Harding, Jose Luis Rojas Villarreal, David Weinstein, and Rachel Weinstein. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The above wins from last Tuesday come on top of major victories earlier this year as Our Revolution has been blazing a path for progressive cities. In April, we helped elect progressive Mayor Brandon Johnson to take the helm in Chicago - where he already delivered on a promise to raise wages for tipped workers in the city. Our Revolution teamed up with One Fair Wage this year to make sure everyone gets a living wage and tipped workers aren’t left behind. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] And, our organizers were key to winning a progressive majority in St. Louis with new Board President Megan Green joining progressive mayor Tishaura Jones in Cori Bush’s congressional district. They’re taking on developers in a fight for affordable housing, and they’ve already passed a universal basic income pilot program! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This Thanksgiving, we are grateful for the solidarity of all our movement allies here and around the world. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Friend,
After our last email, I got a lot of questions like: Are we out of the woods yet? Are we in the clear? And the short answer is no. We are continuing to do absolutely everything in our power to get our November numbers back on track, and I’m hoping you can help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Simply put, this race is going to come down to fundraising numbers. Which is exactly why we need a new way forward for politics in this country. We are supposed to be a government of the people, by the people, for the people.... Not a government by career politicians for corporate agendas, chaos, and dysfunction.
When I say I’m running for Senate to make Washington work, I mean it. And I want to do it together with all of you. So will you please consider donating today if you haven’t already? And if you have, will you please consider giving more? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
We only get one shot, this opportunity comes once in a lifetime. So let’s do it right.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
With gratitude,
Lexi Reese
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Paid for by Lexi Reese for Senate
Lexi Reese for Senate
PO Box 620780
Woodside, CA 94062
United States

name: Powered By People
subject: Donald Trump is back in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
It’s on us to do everything we can to stop Trump in Texas.
#
**Donald Trump is back in Texas today.** Just two weeks after holding a campaign rally in Houston, he is now in the Rio Grande Valley to receive Governor Abbott’s endorsement, exploiting our border communities as a backdrop for their photo ops.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231119.5Af6My&refcode=ema20231119-235128&t=1&akid=235128%2E444211%2EyY1fAh)
With Trump campaigning this hard in our state — trafficking in the kind of lies and hatred that bring out the worst in our fellow Texans — it’s going to take all of us fighting back to stop him from taking back the White House next year.
[**Can you chip in to Powered by People today to help us organize in Texas and stop Trump?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231119.5Af6My&refcode=ema20231119-235128&t=2&akid=235128%2E444211%2EyY1fAh)
On the campaign trail, Trump has been bragging about his role in ending _Roe v. Wade_ and prompting extreme abortion bans in states like Texas. He’s promising to double down on the anti-immigrant cruelty of his first four years by carrying out the “the largest domestic deportation operation in American history.” And we already know the attacks he’ll bring on our democracy if he’s allowed a second term.
**As he increases his investment in Texas, Trump has been growing his lead in both the GOP Primary and against President Biden — meaning it’s now more important than ever that we put in the work to counter him.**
[**Please chip in $3 today to support our efforts to reach, register, and mobilize the voters we need to stop Trump and counter MAGA extremism in Texas.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231119.5Af6My&refcode=ema20231119-235128&t=3&akid=235128%2E444211%2EyY1fAh)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231119.5Af6My&refcode=ema20231119-235128&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=235128%2E444211%2EyY1fAh)**
Thank you for doing your part.
— Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20231119-235128-footer&t=23&refcode2=235128_444211_yY1fAh&akid=235128%2E444211%2EyY1fAh)**

name: Lindsey Cheek
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lindsey Cheek for AG
body:
Lindsey Cheek for Attorney General

Peter,

Over the past few months, I’ve had the privilege to travel across Louisiana, meeting so many amazing people. Your stories, your challenges, and your dreams have been the driving force behind my campaign for Louisiana’s Attorney General.

Unfortunately, yesterday’s election results didn’t quite go in our favor. It’s disappointing, but does not mark the end of our shared journey to make Louisiana a better place.

I am profoundly grateful for the support you’ve shown me throughout this campaign. Whether you proudly displayed a yard sign, chipped in a few bucks, or simply opened emails like these, your commitment has contributed to a vision of a brighter future for the people of Louisiana. It’s this dedication that fills me with hope for what lies ahead.

I’ve never considered myself a politician, and running for office was not something I ever anticipated. But, I’ve never been one to back down from a challenge, especially when times are tough. My decision was rooted in the belief that women, workers, and families deserve representation, not oppression. Together, we’ve shown a light on the issues facing Louisiana.

Thank you for being a part of this journey.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Cheek

Lindsey Cheek for Attorney General
P.O. Box 56683
New Orleans, LA 70156
United States
LindseyCheekforAG.com [https://www.LindseyCheekforAG.com] | info@lindseycheekforag.com [info@lindseycheekforag.com]

body:
Hey there, team. We just wanted to bump John’s email for you all today. Thanksgiving is a special time for John, as it reminds him of why he’s in this fight.
__ | | | Hey there, team. We just wanted to bump John’s email for you all today. Thanksgiving is a special time for John, as it reminds him of why he’s in this fight. [**So, as we get closer to Thanksgiving each day, we hope you’ll read John’s email and chip into his campaign to help send him to Washington to deliver a future we can all be thankful for.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=5729ff61112b49a0bc45c5919179dbd6&_e=mcRnpuvnkkYcM4xLcUuwjmUjJ9g3sv2fZ1T9TrR9y6pKbEa4HPbfVy_7AD0nt_XbVwsdG_wTnQN39o5vIgr68cEGbbTzNDA5SWsepvbNAIfNF52qkHz9ggtzi9s7RnFzWx7EuA_fDQf0gJNZUj-A8DED7wBgr8UtittfWyYI7UZGtMkFftDpaMK-jkZGzx5oCcZJasRaOsjL7HbgLCyPdf_DdQ3Hog_rgPxvDlUSFpCD_ylfcM4qVHII3tDWmzqk7GH1GbDjGCzYQnynX3WF6AeOiZIMlzBHTkAhm1Rt3A9lefn35G46Md4O5iqZOkH9iNws9ay43s2jUgg_rctTXLJR5CvFd6iDmYBKRSb2cnCXW_C42nDdDyga_y6S2G7otGositlveDo5SFCk_jZduQ%3D%3D) Best, Team Padora \---- Begin Original Message ---- [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=5729ff61112b49a0bc45c5919179dbd6&_e=mcRnpuvnkkYcM4xLcUuwjmUjJ9g3sv2fZ1T9TrR9y6pKbEa4HPbfVy_7AD0nt_XbVwsdG_wTnQN39o5vIgr68cEGbbTzNDA5SWsepvbNAIfNF52qkHz9ggtzi9s7RnFzWx7EuA_fDQf0gJNZUj-A8DED7wBgr8UtittfWyYI7UZGtMkFftDpaMK-jkZGzx5oCcZJasRaOsjL7HbgLCyPdf_DdQ3Hog_rgPxvDlUSFpCD_ylfcM4qVHII3tDWmzqkMcYFdYTGwYQsf4mWg4MH2a7dhBTx3paZhWmoc05AP5bWbjdyX97HWCChvhE25gL-IQ02GNdIaDNkoLBM4UBt4dppoLX6zCrnQHpk681KjhAhLGfG69y5-T0QgyPdrZmvjyHqDunygptHVqm3IJSrCQ%3D%3D) Folks, Thanksgiving is right around the corner! I _love_ Thanksgiving. It’s easily one of my favorite holidays. Something about spending time with loved ones surrounded by great food and drinks, celebrating the things we’re most thankful for just can’t be beaten. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=5729ff61112b49a0bc45c5919179dbd6&_e=mcRnpuvnkkYcM4xLcUuwjmUjJ9g3sv2fZ1T9TrR9y6pKbEa4HPbfVy_7AD0nt_XbVwsdG_wTnQN39o5vIgr68cEGbbTzNDA5SWsepvbNAIfNF52qkHz9ggtzi9s7RnFzWx7EuA_fDQf0gJNZUj-A8DED7wBgr8UtittfWyYI7UZGtMkFftDpaMK-jkZGzx5oCcZJasRaOsjL7HbgLCyPdf_DdQ3Hog_rgPxvDlUSFpCD_ylfcM4qVHII3tDWmzqkiLXkxAQYNQBZSJZ2-Quq_yFDA0N5rfRZG2rhAuze12Ly_xoUzVlpS_hoJEbtGK6rlv0Z0TnTc5hwvaYjSanTLhldsy001X6jYW4ceePxtB4_d2Ju8s0fYUgrgrbrLLT-zZFKLrVGowvAlPvdVmH6kg%3D%3D) Growing up, we used to have the biggest Thanksgiving meals because all my cousins, aunts, and uncles would get together for one big party. It was easily more than forty people, if you can believe that! It’s a little bit different now, but my family has built our own new traditions. The day before Thanksgiving, we normally go for a family hike to the Wyoming border just to see the sights and take in the world around us. It’s something special we do together, and it’s always something I look forward to. I’m running for Congress to bring about a better future for my family and for our state and community. [**So, I hope you’ll take a moment today to help me get one step closer to Washington by making a donation of any amount you can to my campaign.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=5729ff61112b49a0bc45c5919179dbd6&_e=mcRnpuvnkkYcM4xLcUuwjmUjJ9g3sv2fZ1T9TrR9y6pKbEa4HPbfVy_7AD0nt_XbVwsdG_wTnQN39o5vIgr68cEGbbTzNDA5SWsepvbNAIfNF52qkHz9ggtzi9s7RnFzWx7EuA_fDQf0gJNZUj-A8DED7wBgr8UtittfWyYI7UZGtMkFftDpaMK-jkZGzx5oCcZJasRaOsjL7HbgLCyPdf_DdQ3Hog_rgPxvDlUSFpCD_ylfcM4qVHII3tDWmzqkk0JUHrrBOmnTi-fwoG1DgRpa7fG63NMukRa2xGrvI2XD378KCePJWe3Y4DtQi2pQsfDABre0QYUqBQe4RyB0vrK8Uip1-WPgYPalvoXObdkKhXnHRJd3KaBDzW57OV1PK264aPcbxfAiWhQD2y5Tuw%3D%3D) I’m thankful for you, friend. – John **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. [**Join me.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=5729ff61112b49a0bc45c5919179dbd6&_e=mcRnpuvnkkYcM4xLcUuwjiOL5NXyP-vCcvV4hlFPC3GpYzKnk85fGh7sDvWsNtTISMselYj2rNad1QwUngN5QoQiHpt47fEfVn5VmHYohysOPzJmLal4r--SkDI5A5SyAvUhalJ59G-dDDfCe7lm4LnmcexwD9h-iikoly3IlbOehnYglXWEq-Gbovh_tENAbf0vbrjDRqFhEMlsXow_cg%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=5729ff61112b49a0bc45c5919179dbd6&_e=mcRnpuvnkkYcM4xLcUuwjmUjJ9g3sv2fZ1T9TrR9y6qt-aZ3r66T_VV7Eii4vBhThqaQhIgt2HVOE5eJr98CoeFUbaVe2Uc_8a2eVMrkyMD9CbLDroyVZf2VSiaztkijAAg-7XkXKZZ7KVJTtFW6SpK_gWSSu-n0S5z2sA8AfIqWJKSEARulPNvgrycYs96v42yR3KGdZlf2RzQs-MmieUFfXs6OhzK9s0oe0FxiERRpgbEC12NLZEbKOY5qzLPymHKn-PF1f7vL08GxOpKX0dQNhUM5KHVurzdhvxDsLF6IlfP3SH6AirXBLAHSncxDA-8TiHIh4O-SszmBOzDA0HNs5lWDbqp2ecp6f5EW4TB5VHzckywK2sU6F6qULJkqBEPIJnD8qGPbAbUiAA8kMCh_L5lN2stxrK3Zz67QddvMdZDlY2IR2aI1KCwZgs3j) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

Hi Peter,
I decided to run for Congress because I know our communities in Arizona’s 3rd Congressional district deserve someone who will fight on their behalf and with their interests in mind.
As an organizer, a legislator, and a leader, I know that winning takes all of us coming together. It takes a team effort to oust corporate money, powerful special interests, and MAGA Republicans.
That’s how we’ve won before and how we will do it again – together. So, I’m asking you: Will you take a moment to forward this email to a friend or a colleague and share why you are on Team Terán?

Sí se puede,
Raquel

Hi Peter, Ryan Busse for Governor here. From Missoula to Glendive, I’ve been all over the state, and I put a couple thousand miles on my Chevy just this month alone! But let me tell you, no matter where I go, people get excited when I talk about how I’m bringing a new brand of leadership.

excited
for
lower
property
taxes,
*

lands,
*

governor
who

in

right
to
choose,

Fully
funded
public
schools,
*
Affordable
housing
and
good
paying
jobs.

Are you in? DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfm-em-fr-nov23?]

There’s so much opportunity to build something big here in Montana, and the folks I’m talking to are all in!

But Peter, it’s a busy holiday month which means donations are few and far between. And I get it! But holidays or not, I’m going to keep trucking across the state talking to voters about our mission to make our state affordable and safe for all Montana families. body:

We'll keep this short... The period of time around Thanksgiving is very hard for campaign fundraising. Understandably so. Some people are just offline, there may be shopping going on ... we get it. But if we are going to beat Trump or whoever the Republicans nominate, we can't afford a holiday slump. Because the attack ads against us aren't going to stop. So we're hoping to _gobble_ up as many donations as we possibly can today. The dollar amount you give isn't as important as the donation itself. subject: Here are the stakes:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Republicans see my boss as a top target.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73652764/439198380/537837852?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.11.19_b1_maco08cm_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGZkYTNjOS0yODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DeT70-3n_kOi-h-Od1dLjCp56pMZjrEUPqo2NNA-8VM=)
**Peter, Yadira is the leader we need representing us in Congress.** As her campaign manager, I know firsthand that she’ll always advocate for reproductive healthcare and put working families first in Washington.

_But national Republicans see her as a top target._ That’s why GOP-aligned groups spent multi-millions in CO-08 last cycle, and that’s why the NRCC is already spending in Colorado to beat her this time around.

While Yadira’s opponents put their time and money towards endless attack ads, Yadira is putting her time and energy into the people of Colorado - _because that’s what they elected her to do._

**[We’re hoping to raise an ambitious $25,000 online in November to fight back. Yadira doesn’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, so she needs your help to rise above all the attack ads and dark money coming her way. Can you donate $25 or whatever you can afford now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73652765/439198381/537837852?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2023.11.19_b1_maco08cm_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGZkYTNjOS0yODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DeT70-3n_kOi-h-Od1dLjCp56pMZjrEUPqo2NNA-8VM=)**

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: With gratitude for your support…looking a year ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Our campaign relies on the generosity and support of individual donors.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_unopens_3&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, As Thanksgiving approaches I want you to know how grateful I am for your support. It has been the fuel that has brought us so far. Now we need to reach voters across the country to get on the ballot in every state. This is an enormous challenge – but with your help I’m confident that we can achieve anything, including getting me elected President. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/ballot-access-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_unopens_3&n=2 "Ballot access video") We've been building our organization from the ground up with people like you who are ready to be part of the change we need. I’m looking forward to the campaign trail ahead where we’ll have the chance to take our message to voters across the country. **I’m asking you to commit to help keep our progress going with a[donation of $5 today.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_unopens_3&n=3) ** Every dollar you give brings us one step closer to the White House – a**nd every dollar matters.** **Please donate whatever you can.** | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_unopens_3&n=4 "Give $5 ->") [Give $5 ->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_unopens_3&n=4)

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1697a1f700c34faeaeb7c4fd1fe3d79c&_e=lJBne3R5DEe7tkN9mQlSzlBk5D1Q-ZCxBavPr1XZZGIOelykO7zRFKEEL2RTdIPzaMe0Fs_GazJrbNH0UId5FnCtvG2f7cdQ85RDDeNcQH3huw4n1xYuqQVH3HbXumN7mMfx_UpIXQC-jcAaAIu8S6dFCgYenWMl8Aed5GyZn4pH7JAcPhrHVDkimTdNhZTcTroCFIhSWW9mnBi4hFNe-mU31QkMybN-zL3QmJ3A6N7mgJBjocSetx6krJ-V8DfeQZHWvJfS8-oo0lMiEM2ZnevXCWTdNE-XwLldDJyIhjBkxHODvFX5OXzV6GyyWVu6iajRDYYYcJstPzm5PuLReD71YuL26eiIzzbmcS0epAI%3D)
---
Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC, a district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1697a1f700c34faeaeb7c4fd1fe3d79c&_e=lJBne3R5DEe7tkN9mQlSzlBk5D1Q-ZCxBavPr1XZZGIOelykO7zRFKEEL2RTdIPzaMe0Fs_GazJrbNH0UId5FnCtvG2f7cdQ85RDDeNcQH3huw4n1xYuqQVH3HbXumN7mMfx_UpIXQC-jcAaAIu8S6dFCgYenWMl8Aed5GyZn4pH7JAcPhrHVDkimTdNhZTcMrGZsQinVhbr5-ns4MbZITA0NuZ3N6tsQGpC_R4PDZHEgk1BUd4Rvx8PJenmCIPcCBZjHs4NnTb3g_nm5rXNrE8qbrhtG7tKxmpNFca5an0LqyyNZcPj34pU7sr1oMcxa9qb9GpE29rAGMUFT6zzlpC1aOqjigJ1OJZOLI0RiE4%3D)
---
The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

[Please have my back on this one:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1697a1f700c34faeaeb7c4fd1fe3d79c&_e=lJBne3R5DEe7tkN9mQlSzlBk5D1Q-ZCxBavPr1XZZGIOelykO7zRFKEEL2RTdIPzaMe0Fs_GazJrbNH0UId5FnCtvG2f7cdQ85RDDeNcQH3huw4n1xYuqQVH3HbXumN7mMfx_UpIXQC-jcAaAIu8S6dFCgYenWMl8Aed5GyZn4qTcT1vcSnugJcGt2jQjT9Hfsh6BWAcMDfCDUWfEs2wWbLIhjf4zAH6lBSub2Lwh8M5_FGPUbylZ9I9UfEqKllcIBTEdXZUWQqdzqJfxc8gNwIm60GquIx0hRwrgKl-qjqgMubawNIkj6dqKzSyqOx7EF9CTmxGQmcx01ncUnVRQcJyOUPdRA8a-KpFk82sHCg%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1697a1f700c34faeaeb7c4fd1fe3d79c&_e=lJBne3R5DEe7tkN9mQlSzlBk5D1Q-ZCxBavPr1XZZGIOelykO7zRFKEEL2RTdIPzaMe0Fs_GazJrbNH0UId5FnCtvG2f7cdQ85RDDeNcQH3huw4n1xYuqQVH3HbXumN7mMfx_UpIXQC-jcAaAIu8S6dFCgYenWMl8Aed5GyZn4pH7JAcPhrHVDkimTdNhZTc-0wc-qt8szUPTursfVD6QCkhdM5EsjbplasuYhvWB12qoHkOeIOjxvDIcfFiF-JXu4CgOqmHDoNBCtJ7TmbS95JGC9D-vHobBgN2d0mSz-OaaEtehYt0EssmQpfGtF0oSTVggiH6KwL3McErIixkspMcK8MJ4x_-YOws3ahZCyg%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $20**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1697a1f700c34faeaeb7c4fd1fe3d79c&_e=lJBne3R5DEe7tkN9mQlSzlBk5D1Q-ZCxBavPr1XZZGIOelykO7zRFKEEL2RTdIPzaMe0Fs_GazJrbNH0UId5FnCtvG2f7cdQ85RDDeNcQH3huw4n1xYuqQVH3HbXumN7mMfx_UpIXQC-jcAaAIu8S6dFCgYenWMl8Aed5GyZn4pH7JAcPhrHVDkimTdNhZTcinkqURFZXClpfWLT4Zi4Rl0_NEvqGjfYHYqrbivF74jF799jL4j1wY8_c4IqgYSpnIpxwTKxIoxTv4Ut8BN4dwR3Mu2NvIJHxNa0ClvfE3hjLfMuE3bk6FdWh6zi9-e4HCImG-pRRLDNqEmIJN2LKbCvnZQGFJPIEwyfVlrplQk%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $50**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1697a1f700c34faeaeb7c4fd1fe3d79c&_e=lJBne3R5DEe7tkN9mQlSzlBk5D1Q-ZCxBavPr1XZZGIOelykO7zRFKEEL2RTdIPzaMe0Fs_GazJrbNH0UId5FnCtvG2f7cdQ85RDDeNcQH3huw4n1xYuqQVH3HbXumN7mMfx_UpIXQC-jcAaAIu8S6dFCgYenWMl8Aed5GyZn4pH7JAcPhrHVDkimTdNhZTcgcr2N-PRf6Wl5As9Z5l4OSt840jGqnCI7T7fwe3BwOCHyrUtyaYKK4wbVRRWRqCNF5D3OX12ibJ8doA-Y9MfYUon4hwYTzWOicIwYTqieUfT0LgQtAQxckmu7b-4gqFJ7Mm1tih0P3BOxZFT947yApnQVYMqH6yyen9ppi3pA8k%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $100**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1697a1f700c34faeaeb7c4fd1fe3d79c&_e=lJBne3R5DEe7tkN9mQlSzlBk5D1Q-ZCxBavPr1XZZGIOelykO7zRFKEEL2RTdIPzaMe0Fs_GazJrbNH0UId5FnCtvG2f7cdQ85RDDeNcQH3huw4n1xYuqQVH3HbXumN7mMfx_UpIXQC-jcAaAIu8S6dFCgYenWMl8Aed5GyZn4pH7JAcPhrHVDkimTdNhZTc-ERQXztIqLtaa-8azhuk7_Py70LXGvmVzGTOFSyYnRKWFdN-MVntVG21x0bubDNs1Nzs1daCYjURscukfcMa1Jok0TMkPH7HmZnmd-8foVYI743w38h1VRdyZq5tLwD2UMCqdRdRmyw37FHQrg-7VbTcgp3FZMRfRHMq4PBv6YE%3D)
---
Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.

I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud.

Thank you & God bless.

**Pat Harrigan**
GOP Conservative Candidate
North Carolina's 14th District

name: Kathleen Riebe
subject: What this campaign has meant to me:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress
body:
The interactions I've had with so many folks across CD-2 have given me nothing but hope for our future, and it's never been more clear to me that Utahns want a new direction.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73653290/439200008/-1487052648?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjgxZmZmYjAtMmQ4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pBCb8Ij3xGpjAp6Kx5CLvNKVH45MzdxQg3MacbfyafE=&emci=0edf4d84-1b87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b81fffb0-2d87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=8062649)
---

| | Here we are, Peter, at the end of the _final_ weekend of this campaign. I'm busy fighting for every last vote, but I wanted to take a moment to reflect on what this journey has been for me and thank supporters like you for all you've done to help us get this far. As I've said from the start, I'm a teacher. I'm dedicated to doing all I can to set an example for the adults of tomorrow and ensure they can prosper. And as I saw our politics degrade — and spill over into culture wars that some cynically deploy in the classroom — I knew my voice was needed to help in the battle to restore common sense. I've continued to work full-time as a teacher throughout this campaign. On weekdays, my focus has been fully on my students – with evenings and weekends devoted to making my case to voters. I won't lie: it's been a packed schedule. So it speaks volumes about the grassroots support behind our campaign that we've been able to hit so many big milestones. We outraised my Republican opponent among Utah donors. We've visited every county in CD-2 and showed that we can speak, and get to, all communities. We forced national Republicans to invest resources in a district that was supposed to be safely in their column. And we did it all while never backing down from our principles. I've been proud to run as a pro-labor candidate because — and I can tell you firsthand as a teacher — stronger unions give working folks everywhere a fairer shot at success. I've highlighted the need for our federal leaders to get serious about protecting the environment so we can solve Utah's crisis and preserve our state's natural beauty. I've called out the extremists who've politicized school funding and tried to dictate every bit of education curricula. And I've never hesitated to emphasize the importance of reproductive freedom in this race and make clear that I'll oppose _any_ push by Congress to ban abortion nationally. The interactions I've had with so many folks across CD-2 have given me nothing but hope for our future, and it's never been more clear to me that Utahns want a new direction. I'm entering the final hours of this campaign in awe of what we've accomplished. Because we've reminded folks what Utah's values are — and that those values are always worth fighting for. More soon, _Kathleen_ P.S. Every final bit of support makes a difference as we approach Election Day. clean_body: The interactions I've had with so many folks across CD-2 have given me nothing but hope for our future, and it's never been more clear to me that Utahns want a new direction. | | | | Here we are, Peter, at the end of the final weekend of this campaign. I'm busy fighting for every last vote, but I wanted to take a moment to reflect on what this journey has been for me and thank supporters like you for all you've done to help us get this far. As I've said from the start, I'm a teacher. I'm dedicated to doing all I can to set an example for the adults of tomorrow and ensure they can prosper. And as I saw our politics degrade — and spill over into culture wars that some cynically deploy in the classroom — I knew my voice was needed to help in the battle to restore common sense. I've continued to work full-time as a teacher throughout this campaign. On weekdays, my focus has been fully on my students – with evenings and weekends devoted to making my case to voters. I won't lie: it's been a packed schedule. So it speaks volumes about the grassroots support behind our campaign that we've been able to hit so many big milestones. We outraised my Republican opponent among Utah donors. We've visited every county in CD-2 and showed that we can speak, and get to, all communities. We forced national Republicans to invest resources in a district that was supposed to be safely in their column. And we did it all while never backing down from our principles. I've been proud to run as a pro-labor candidate because — and I can tell you firsthand as a teacher — stronger unions give working folks everywhere a fairer shot at success. I've highlighted the need for our federal leaders to get serious about protecting the environment so we can solve Utah's crisis and preserve our state's natural beauty. I've called out the extremists who've politicized school funding and tried to dictate every bit of education curricula. And I've never hesitated to emphasize the importance of reproductive freedom in this race and make clear that I'll oppose any push by Congress to ban abortion nationally. The interactions I've had with so many folks across CD-2 have given me nothing but hope for our future, and it's never been more clear to me that Utahns want a new direction. I'm entering the final hours of this campaign in awe of what we've accomplished. Because we've reminded folks what Utah's values are — and that those values are always worth fighting for. More soon, Kathleen P.S. Every final bit of support makes a difference as we approach Election Day. = | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress. |

name: Dan Pfeiffer
subject: We need to talk about Bob
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-2?refcode=em20231119-2&refcode2=1173_552475_jaqfh1&akid=1173%2E552475%2Ejaqfh1)
Peter, we need to talk about Bob Casey — the guy who took over the internet with his Map in 2020 and kept political junkies like me updated on Pennsylvania’s election results.
Well, Bob is up for re-election in 2024, and he needs our help. Because time is a flat circle, America is once again staring down the barrel of another Biden v. Trump match-up... and PA is at the center.
I can tell you from my experience working for President Obama in ‘08 and ‘12 that if we’re going to hold the White House and our Democratic Senate majority, Pennsylvania is a must-win.
I also know how important it is to raise massive resources early on. The more resources Bob has now, the more staff he’ll be able to hire, the more ads his team can put on the air, and the more voters his campaign can reach. Money donated today is exponentially more impactful than money donated in the final weeks of the campaign.
**[Will you join me in supporting Bob’s campaign by chipping in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-2?refcode=em20231119-2&refcode2=1173_552475_jaqfh1&akid=1173%2E552475%2Ejaqfh1)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-2?refcode=em20231119-2&refcode2=1173_552475_jaqfh1&akid=1173%2E552475%2Ejaqfh1)**
This Senate race is gearing up to be one of the most competitive and expensive of 2024. Bob is up against anti-choice extremist David McCormick, who supports a national abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. To add insult to injury, he’s a Connecticut (not a typo — he really lives in CT, not PA) finance bro that has a record of selling out workers to get rich.
If McCormick wins and the GOP regains control, they could gut Social Security and Medicare, raise taxes on the middle class while giving large corporations tax breaks, roll back LBGTQ+ rights, and pass a Federal abortion ban.
**That means that Bob and his team have zero room for error, because there is no Democratic Senate majority without winning in Pennsylvania.**
**[Will you contribute $5 to Bob Casey’s campaign? We need to keep Bob in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-2?refcode=em20231119-2&refcode2=1173_552475_jaqfh1&akid=1173%2E552475%2Ejaqfh1)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231119-2?refcode=em20231119-2&refcode2=1173_552475_jaqfh1&akid=1173%2E552475%2Ejaqfh1)**
Thanks for supporting Bob!
Dan
Co-host of Pod Save America
Former Senior Advisor to President Obama

Bob Casey for Senate

Philadelphia, PA 19102

subject: I’m inviting you to join me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERSHIP AMERICA NEEDS PAC
body:
Invite Enclosed

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=be28ca81fbc244b2acdcd83242fe51a4&_e=VULUe-pF_QsWE15ePKd4mkCNf9bonTfhCZUH9svuhoomx8TJLkHn19fX4V1AQfQRWXEqjw9qCvKV7A5FzwKbIHoSBL_GJbLSQQ1g6BY6QqtM-5LV6OxffG8F5_eA4Mc4BWP3IhNzu7zpx4PWtZzxLgqQb9rNpmt0m-hjqOHs6C-FoNWEzLxQMBah2MG1W6ks7PNTrua7qrDSa_0bjusnKW0xuePdBLHXbDz8OadX61zB_yyXzqmFf_8Bw93WQMHzupBOo8_aHjWfLcoqfAO7UbKClJ6oT8v2PSHNKzPpGjzjvea5oooKAs-6FCw_5eH4dI2kGs2OLCS_SYCuQ9YNKjgw97ZQ8ag8WSyQV7NVOBuWXZA3JQtCiN3jTxksFFvI5hstaTqIp-6HbWxRoHjEFMRNLmVNNfzs3_hy-MXcvyw%3D)
---
Friend,

It's official.

After my hard-fought race for New York Governor that helped deliver a Republican House majority, I'm launching my next battle:

**To defend the conservative gains we just won in New York and secure a Red Wave in 2024!**

I'm writing you today to personally invite you to join in this battle with my new Leadership America Needs PAC.

I hope you [accept this invitation before midnight tonight.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=be28ca81fbc244b2acdcd83242fe51a4&_e=VULUe-pF_QsWE15ePKd4mkCNf9bonTfhCZUH9svuhoomx8TJLkHn19fX4V1AQfQRWXEqjw9qCvKV7A5FzwKbIHoSBL_GJbLSQQ1g6BY6QqtM-5LV6OxffG8F5_eA4Mc4BWP3IhNzu7zpx4PWtZzxLgqQb9rNpmt0m-hjqOHs6C-FoNWEzLxQMBah2MG1W6ks7PNTrua7qrDSa_0bjusnKW0xuePdBLHXbDz8OadX61zIztUk5jCdvNcIfqrDTjO0h2y-iX-TDZdy0td4nGFR9WF-LcvDvk4PwzNTIhs7XYEtIfWh8u1QyxCvQgw2aj9aPzluOD5jXcqBRZP_wHwvR6l1R-wrmTGbuUZwajN9yE5frbzxuEWs2dLtrAdJUvBS8_yagABJJiDncFfMTPpdxaZnDHmcr2a4bTIgw_qm2J4%3D)

| [**Yes, Lee!**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=be28ca81fbc244b2acdcd83242fe51a4&_e=VULUe-pF_QsWE15ePKd4mkCNf9bonTfhCZUH9svuhoomx8TJLkHn19fX4V1AQfQRWXEqjw9qCvKV7A5FzwKbIHoSBL_GJbLSQQ1g6BY6QqtM-5LV6OxffG8F5_eA4Mc4BWP3IhNzu7zpx4PWtZzxLgqQb9rNpmt0m-hjqOHs6C-FoNWEzLxQMBah2MG1W6ks7PNTrua7qrDSa_0bjusnKW0xuePdBLHXbDz8OadX61zIztUk5jCdvNcIfqrDTjO0h2y-iX-TDZdy0td4nGFR9bRmJ8-HbHhXKQfSiq-hIpdqI-h2dmV7qOwSi01utyzkS0KuHkOR_P8GvLt-VSLEnLj1djW4BNPU2GEYUJTO3Atrp4EQXZBmWLxbj5j_3Als7ZOpREKlmCyiKWGx5JO-KswEv9JMPLCDREyGoav4nek%3D)
---

After my tough race against radical Kathy Hochul last year, I learned a critical lesson:

**_When conservatives come together, we can win MASSIVE victories in the most unlikely of places._**
Against all odds, how did we create a red wave in New York?

The answer is simple: **we engaged _first-time_ Republican voters on the issues that mattered most to them, including public safety, the economy, and education.**

clean_body: Invite Enclosed | Friend, It's official. After my hard-fought race for New York Governor that helped deliver a Republican House majority, I'm launching my next battle: To defend the conservative gains we just won in New York and secure a Red Wave in 2024! I'm writing you today to personally invite you to join in this battle with my new Leadership America Needs PAC. I hope you | After my tough race against radical Kathy Hochul last year, I learned a critical lesson: When conservatives come together, we can win MASSIVE victories in the most unlikely of places. Against all odds, how did we create a red wave in New York? The answer is simple: we engaged first-time Republican voters on the issues that mattered most to them, including public safety, the economy, and education. Winning over even more new Republican voters is the #1 mission of Leadership America Needs PAC, and we can't accomplish this mission without your critical support. If you're ready to join me in this mission, please I know what it takes to launch an effective congressional campaign in New York. I won't sugarcoat it for you... it 's expensive. Hi Peter —

**This month is the 15th anniversary of the passage of Prop 8** , the California ballot initiative and constitutional amendment that banned same-sex marriage in 2008. While Prop 8 was eventually overturned with the 2015 Supreme Court Decision, it left a nasty scar for many in my community, and it’s still written into the California constitution. **But in November, voters will even have the chance to finally repeal this discriminatory language from our constitution.** | [Chip in $20 now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73653497/439200812/-377887102?amount=20&refcode=SBD_JR_EM_FR_111923_Prop8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVkMDFiNzAtMmY4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JdvnBB2jflQNC-09Hae7_Da8LTS7_hzK3ZvMOmqtihs=)

Although gay marriage is officially legal now, LGBTQ+ attacks are on the rise, and red states continue to pass harmful legislation targeting our community. And with the radical Supreme Court MAGA majority, there is no guarantee that my marriage to Micheal will remain legal. **It’s time for Congress to finally enshrine protections for our community so that no one has to live in fear because of who they love or how they identify.**

**I talk a lot about what the American dream means, and for me, living without fear, regardless of who you love or how you identify, is a major piece of that.** That’s why I’ve included provisions in my proposed American Dream Act to support LGBTQ+ youth by providing safe spaces, mental health services, and support networks for parents and children while also ensuring access to inclusive and culturally competent healthcare for LGBTQ+ individuals.

I’m running for Congress because there is so much to do to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their dreams. But I need your help to get there. [So, please, pitch in $10 or $20 to keep my campaign afloat and elect an LGBTQ+ champion in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73653498/439200813/-377887102?amount=20&refcode=SBD_JR_EM_FR_111923_Prop8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVkMDFiNzAtMmY4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JdvnBB2jflQNC-09Hae7_Da8LTS7_hzK3ZvMOmqtihs=)

clean_body: Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter — This month is the 15th anniversary of the passage of Prop 8 , the California ballot initiative and constitutional amendment that banned same-sex marriage in 2008. While Prop 8 was eventually overturned with the 2015 Supreme Court Decision, it left a nasty scar for many in my community, and it’s still written into the California constitution. But in November, voters will even have the chance to finally repeal this discriminatory language from our constitution. | = Although gay marriage is officially legal now, LGBTQ+ attacks are on the rise, and red states continue to pass harmful legislation targeting our community. And with the radical Supreme Court MAGA majority, there is no guarantee that my marriage to Micheal will remain legal. It’s time for Congress to finally enshrine protections for our community so that no one has to live in fear because of who they love or how they identify. I talk a lot about what the American dream means, and for me, living without fear, regardless of who you love or how you identify, is a major piece of that. That’s why I’ve included provisions in my proposed American Dream Act to support LGBTQ+ youth by providing safe spaces, mental health services, and support networks for parents and children while also ensuring access to inclusive and culturally competent healthcare for LGBTQ+ individuals. I’m running for Congress because there is so much to do to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their dreams. But I need your help to get there. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = To a better future, Jirair * | = Meet Jirair An experienced federal policy leader, public health doctor and progressive voice for change, Jirair has dedicated his life to helping others and spent his career bringing diverse communities together to solve big challenges. Let's Build A Campaign Together That Lifts Up Every Californian. | = Paid for and authorized by Jirair Ratevosian for Congress Jirair Ratevosian for Congress 321 N. On Nov. 7, we had a major election night, and abortion won from coast to coast: _Twelve_ EMILYs List-endorsed local executives were elected or reelected, and Democrats not only held the Virginia Senate but also _gained a majority_ in the House. Not to mention the success of a pro-choice ballot measure in the not-so-blue state of Ohio.

**The momentum is on our side, Peter.** It's a fact that the majority of Americans are pro-choice — and they vote accordingly. But now, Republicans see that too, and they're already trying to change their messaging to hide their extremist anti-choice views and deceive voters.

****We're not letting Republicans get away with deceptive messaging around our fundamental rights, and we're certainly not going to let them steal our momentum. clean_body: We've got to keep our foot on the gas. | | | = Peter, this month's victories proved once again that when choice is on the ballot, choice wins. On Nov. 7, we had a major election night, and abortion won from coast to coast: Twelve EMILYs List-endorsed local executives were elected or reelected, and Democrats not only held the Virginia Senate but also gained a majority in the House. Not to mention the success of a pro-choice ballot measure in the not-so-blue state of Ohio. The momentum is on our side, Peter. It's a fact that the majority of Americans are pro-choice — and they vote accordingly. But now, Republicans see that too, and they're already trying to change their messaging to hide their extremist anti-choice views and deceive voters. **We're not letting Republicans get away with deceptive messaging around our fundamental rights, and we're certainly not going to let them steal our momentum. Will you donate now to help keep our pro-choice movement strong heading into 2024? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We have a critical year of elections ahead, with both the Senate majority at stake and the House majority within reach. Republicans are determined to pass a national abortion ban, and we need all hands on deck to MAINTAIN the momentum from our recent victories for the next 12 months. Republicans won't make it easy, but we can do it. As EMILYs List gears up for 2024, let's show anti-choice Republicans that we're just getting started. Donate now to help elect more Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot, all across the country: =** Thank you, Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers) Vice President of State and Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.
